programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (28 out of 39)

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: World Series Film
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1996 matchup between the Yankees and the Braves. Rookie of the Year Derek Jeter led New York from a 2-0 deficit to win four straight and bring the World Series back to the Bronx for the first time in almost 20 years.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Baseball's Seasons

programme.title: All-Star Highlights

programme.title: All-Star Highlights

programme.title: All-Century Team

programme.desc: Encounters of a creature 6 to 9 feet tall, covered in fur with super human strength have increased in the video age.

programme.title: Cosmic Conspiracy

programme.title: Bigfoot Girl
programme.desc: After encountering Bigfoot as a child, Kiana instantly felt a connection with the creature. With the help of other experiencers, she sets out to secret locations with recent sightings to find closure to the biggest question of her life.

programme.title: Epic Ghosts and Paranormal Hauntings
programme.desc: The cries of a howling ghost still echo through the woods in Miramichi, New Brunswick. Many believe it is the spirit of Ryan Garvon, a 1920's lumberjack.

programme.title: Bible Conspiracies
programme.desc: The marriage of Jesus and Mary; the destruction of the tower of Babel by an alien race called the Anunnaki, and the hidden code that holds the revelation about future events.

programme.title: Hunting Bigfoot
programme.desc: A mans quest to prove the existence of the elusive cryptid in whats been called the greatest sasquatch movie ever made

programme.title: UFO Chronicles: Pilot Encounters And Underground Bases
programme.desc: UFO experts discuss evidence that we are being visited by entities from other worlds.

programme.title: All God's Saints

programme.title: Alien Psychosis
programme.desc: A veteran returns home to his pregnant wife after being wounded in combat. Suffering from PTSD, Ryan begins to see strange beings in his house at night, caused by a sinister presence, which has been haunting him in his nightmares.

programme.title: American Sasquatch Hunters
programme.desc: Encounters of a creature 6 to 9 feet tall, covered in fur with super human strength have increased in the video age.

programme.title: Indistinguishable From Magic

programme.title: Ghost and Demon Children of the Damned
programme.desc: Ghosts and demons send chills up your spine, but there is something extra disturbing when they are Children!

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Shadow Watchers

programme.title: Escaping the Dead
programme.desc: Copenhagen has been hit by a new deathdrug. When two drug dealers attempt to capitalize on it, it backfires. They wind up fighting for their lives to escape psychopathic maniacs high on the new meth they are responsible for distributing.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic – the majestic snow covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The mountains and the sky sing in harmony as Bob Ross’ brushes tell a story of breathtaking hue and depth.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses beautiful shades of green that burst forth in this exciting and realistic display of nature’s wonder.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Snowy peaks point toward the heavens as Bob Ross surrounds all of this with a happy gathering of landscape finery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross’ easy method once again reveals the splendor of a little farm home in a winter wonderland and soft purple hills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross’ dramatic use of blue tones results in an emotional depiction of stark waves at night – all tucked inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross finds a barely visible lake being hugged by snowy mountains and some of nature’s finest greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will enchant you as he captures, on the canvas, a bright and cheery mountain scene right out of your dreams.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A timid little brook winds its way through a golden grassland created by Bob Ross’ precise, but easy-to-learn technique.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The mysterious night sky is pierced by amazing lunar rays which Bob Ross uses to illuminate a mighty mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A snow-covered winter fantasy land seems so real, and Bob Ross shows you how easy his special painting technique can be.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Faraway peaks appear to almost float amongst the clouds as Bob Ross creates a gently flowing river splashing into the foreground.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Get caught up in the magic as you watch Bob Ross produce a snowy summit and beautiful lake surrounded by shades of greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Haven’t you always imagined walking through one of Bob Ross’ beautiful landscape paintings? Watch as he makes a dream come true!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints the very best of nature -- stately evergreens and cool, still waters standing before a glorious brown mountain. A real beauty!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Dana Jester creates a Bob Ross-style mountain scene with dignified foothills and evergreens, and super vibrant bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross illustrates the illusion of infinity as mountain and water fade into the distance, created in a lovely half-oval painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rich, soft colors prove that fall has arrived! Join Bob Ross as he paints a quiet pond and surrounding foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to a lonely hidden cabin in the frozen mountainous north country with Bob Ross -- another black canvas masterpiece to fall in love with.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Shades of lushious red, lavender and gold surround a bubbling brook flowing through a serene oval painting by television’s favorite painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy a casual stroll down the pathway overlooking a quiet pond and breathe in the cool crisp fall air!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints some of Nature’s most awesome creations – magnificent snow-covered mountains! Beauty you just have to experience.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll into the quiet stillness of early daybreak with Bob Ross as he captures the essence of a sun shrouded forest on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross and experience the magic of early morning in an oval, as gentle trickles and splashes of a happy stream pierce the silence.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates the illusion of luscious textured wood as you are invited to step into another dimension of mountains overlooking a quiet river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Go on a real nature hike with Bob Ross – follow the overgrown path deep in the woods and enjoy the silent beauty of the surrounding stillness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into a snow-covered forest with Bob Ross, a scene that’s been gently warmed by the beauty of winter’s rustic touches of color.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you along to enjoy a fabulous mountain lake view with layers of soft hills and trees shrouded in heavy clouded haze.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cleverly constructed shape on canvas! Peek through the panes with artist Bob Ross and share a beautiful snowy day outside.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint Bob Ross shanty and experience the tranquility of mysterious distant mountains and an inviting pond just outside the door.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join guest artist Steve Ross today -- experience the magnificence of splendid mountains and glassy lake embraced by leafy trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Roll up your trousers and walk the beach with Bob Ross; enjoy a sky full of clouds and waves crashing carelessly upon the rocks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Envision yourself in a world of purple mountain tops and glistening waters that reflect the glowing sky; a magical Bob Ross scene!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a clear day Bob Ross creates an almighty mountain captured by a clear blue sky – another spectacular masterpiece on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Something new and different -- paint a wintry country scene on a wooden sawblade with guest artist Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the cool breeze and admire the beauty of turbulent waves, jagged cliffs and dark night skies -- Bob Ross paints a west coast seascape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the peacefulness of the calm evening as you take a walk with Bob Ross through the enchanted timber lands just before nightfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the warm swampy air and admire the overgrown trees with hanging Spanish moss and velvety bushes … all Bob Ross style of course!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Tony Randall (11/21/79)
programme.desc: Tony Randall spills on early experiences with girls, first time he bought condoms. Opines on sex ed. classes.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Only on The Tonight Show will you see Patrick Swayze talking about a song he wrote called "Sweet June Farts."

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Albert Brooks and Susan Sarandon head to the couch to talk about everything from love to clam shucking.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Sally Field dishes on Burt Reynolds, and Buddy Hackett discusses desert islands with beautiful women.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Flip Wilson (7/23/76)
programme.desc: Flip Wilson does stand-up, Pat Boone talks about the Olympics and a doctor waxes poetic on spanking children.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Tom Snyder confesses it’s hard being Johnny’s guest and describes his life in California.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '50s - Bob Hope (1/16/81)
programme.desc: Bob Hope talks about the game, his early days, and entertaining presidents and his distinctive schnoz.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '70s - Tim Conway (10/15/87)
programme.desc: Tim Conway chats about his 7, count ‘em 7, kids and his career as a practical joker, while in the service.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Mickey Rooney (3/13/84)
programme.desc: Mickey Rooney compares notes with Johnny on their many marriages. Comic Paul Rodriguez appears as well.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Dean Martin (12/12/75)
programme.desc: Dean Martin recounts celebrating Frank Sinatra’s big 6-0. Also playing Vegas and frequent forays into casinos.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Tony Randall (11/21/79)
programme.desc: Tony Randall spills on early experiences with girls, first time he bought condoms. Opines on sex ed. classes.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Tom Hanks (2/4/82)
programme.desc: Another superstar panel, with Lynn Redgrave and Tom Hanks, who talks about learning to juggle.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Richard Lewis (3/27/81)
programme.desc: Years before he was cast in Curb Your Enthusiasm, comic Richard Lewis did breakthrough stand-up.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Cloris Leachman (5/9/84)
programme.desc: Cloris Leachman reveals her favorite prize --mother of the year -- awarded by a club in New York.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - James Woods (10/8/81)
programme.desc: James Woods talks body casts, Peter Billingsley plans to quit acting when he turns 18 + Martin Mull appears.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Walter Matthau (3/23/82)
programme.desc: Walter Matthau disguises an eye problem, jokes about his roommate in the hospital and the awful food.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Dana Carvey (3/11/87)
programme.desc: Dana Carvey stops by and does impressions. Plus, Christopher Reeve talks Superman and Frank Olivier juggles.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Kevin Pollak (10/31/90)
programme.desc: Find out why is Kevin Pollak dressed as Cupid when he joins the show?

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Frequent guest Joan Rivers discusses her autobiography, and Joan Embery brings a rare Albino Koala Bear.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Burt Reynolds (8/2/78)
programme.desc: Pin up guy Burt Reynolds grouses about look-a-likes who impersonate him at public functions.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - David Letterman (7/13/84)
programme.desc: Fellow late-night host David Letterman stops by to talk about muggings in New York and earthquakes in LA.

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: A writer (Dale Evans) of cowboy novels saves herself and a border agent (Roy Rogers) with a trick from her latest book.

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: After the Civil War, cavalryman Capt. Hunt tries to strike peace with Acoma, a Native American chief. However, Judge Wilcox and others provoke Acoma, arresting him and shooting his men, prompting revenge from the chief.

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: Former Texas Ranger Tex Haines (Tex Ritter), now an attorney, is called back into law enforcement by his old pals Dave Wyatt (Dave O'Brien) and Panhandle Perkins (Guy Wilkerson), who want his help recovering some stolen gold.

programme.title: Captain Apache
programme.desc: An undercover Indian officer (Lee Van Cleef) exposes a landowner (Stuart Whitman) out to kill President Grant.

programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: A cowboy (John Wayne) romances a pretty woman (Marion Burns) while tracking the outlaw gang that killed his father.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A railroad surveyor (Randolph Scott) handles saboteurs, Indians and romance with a doctor (Jane Wyatt) in the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Cheyenne Rides Again
programme.desc: Cattlemen send an undercover cowboy (Tom Tyler) to bust an outlaw gang.

programme.title: The Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: A cowboy sleuth (Harry Carey) catches rustlers despite a rattlesnake.

programme.title: Desperadoes of the West
programme.desc: Ranchers and an Eastern businessman have a violent conflict when the latter hires outlaws to stop the ranchers from drilling for oil.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: A saloon singer (Ann Dvorak) and her rival like a marshal (Randolph Scott) who cleans up a drunken sheriff's (Edgar Buchanan) cow town.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Hooded vigilantes are involved in a boundary dispute.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: A gold watch is the only clue to a string of murders.

programme.title: Dusty's Trail
programme.desc: Dusty removes a thorn from a bear's paw and the bear follows him back to camp to everyone's dismay.

programme.title: Dusty's Trail
programme.desc: Dusty and Callahan rescue a beautiful society girl lost on the trail; Callahan falls in love with her and tries to become a gentleman to win her over.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: When a thief confesses to the robbery of a stage coach, he also implicates someone who worked the job as a partner, a banker.

programme.title: The Adventures of Champion
programme.desc: When a crooked ranch foreman discovers oil on a neighboring spread, he plots with a businessman to grab the property by killing one rancher and framing the other for the crime.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: A judge brings his own version of the law to the Old West town of Langtry, Texas.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: Sharon Bender's father is killed when her intentions to marry Adam over his objections are known.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Tagg (Jimmy Hawkins) and his friend Billy (Stuffy Singer) run away to a ghost town inhabited by an outlaw gang. With Gail Davis.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie uses the town's new fire engine to capture some bank robbers who are hiding in a shack near town.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Chingachgook find a group of new settlers, trapped in the Huron's territory.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: After several people are murdered Hawkeye seeks the help of his friend Benjamin Franklin.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An outlaw joins the Cartwrights' cattle drive, knowing it will take him to the town where his father is sheriff.

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A singing cowboy (Roy Rogers) clears the outlaw (Donald Barry) and his gang of a bank robbery done by bankers.

programme.title: Bike Heroes

programme.title: Bike Heroes
programme.desc: The Bike Heroes dominated the motorcycle Grand Prix World Championship in the 1980s and early 1990s.

programme.title: Bike Heroes
programme.desc: A small group of racers dominated the motorcycle Grand Prix World Championship during the ultra-competitive era of the late 1980s and early 1990s; they are the Bike Heroes. Chief among them was Eddie Lawson, who started his career in the era of Sheene and Roberts and ended it racing alongside Rainey, Schwantz and Gardner. Along the way the American legend contested 127 GPs, finishing on the podium a staggering 78 times, claiming 31 wins and being crowned World Champion four times. His remarkable consistency and rare mistakes brought him success and the nickname ‘Steady Eddie’, as well as legions of fans. Notoriously private, Lawson did his talking on the track, and that’s what this celebration of a true great is all about. In action-packed testing, practice and race footage we follow Lawson’s career from his 1983 debut to his 1992 swansong. From the drama of his first Grand Prix win and World Championship in 1984000, through the glory years with the Giacomo Agostini-run Yamaha team and his brief stint with Honda and onto the final years with Cagiva, scintillating race action and period interviews chart a stunning career. The film recalls how his 1986 battle with Gardner delivered 7 wins and 10 podium places from 11 races, as well as a second world crown, how he recovered from a serious shoulder injury to claim his third title and how he ignored controversy on and off the track to take an unlikely fourth championship in his first, and only, year with Honda. Then, of course, there was the disastrous year with Kenny Roberts at Yamaha before the surprising final chapter on board the wayward Cagiva. Lawson may not have been a fan of his ‘Steady’ nickname, but as the breathtaking action in this programme shows, he was one of the most consistent Grand Prix riders in history and fully deserves his place as a Bike Hero.

programme.title: Chicago 10
programme.desc: Archival footage, animation, and music are used to look back at the eight anti-war protesters who were put on trial following the 1968 Democratic National Convention.

programme.title: Feels Good Man
programme.desc: When Pepe the Frog becomes an unwitting icon of hate, his creator fights to bring Pepe back from the darkness.

programme.title: Ecstasy Of Order: The Tetris Master
programme.desc: Follows a group of record-holding Tetris players as they prepare to compete in the 2010 Classic Tetris World Championship.

programme.title: Hollywood Signs
programme.desc: Hollywood Signs is the documentary that celebrates autograph collecting, collectors, and our obsession with celebrities. It focuses on autograph dealing, the history of the autograph, autograph conventions, celebrities' point of view, and, of course, the folks whose lives revolve around autographs. Hollywood Signs is a love letter to a world with characters you definitely don't see every day.

programme.title: Side By Side
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves takes an in-depth look at the future of digital cinema, featuring interviews with cinematic masters James Cameron, David Fincher, David Lynch, Martin Scorsese, Steven Soderbergh and more.

programme.title: Travis Kelce: Sharp, Sturdy, Swift
programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL’s greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: Lewis Hamilton: The Winning Formula
programme.desc: As the only black Formula One driver in history, Lewis' journey to becoming the most decorated Formula One driver in history, is one of dreams, courage, and determination.

programme.title: Kobe Bryant: A Tribute
programme.desc: The sudden and tragic passing of Kobe Bryant, alongside his young daughter Gianna left the world in a stunned silence. Never before has a sporting star held such high esteem outside of their profession… But Kobe Bryant was a superstar. Unmatched on the basketball court and cherished on the red carpet– Kobe’s dedication to his career, his family and his charity work led to him being adored the world over.

programme.title: Kid Yamaka
programme.desc: In this deeply human story, Emmy-nominated director Matt Ogens explores boxer Zachary "Kid Yamaka” Wohlman’s difficult past, his training under world-class coach Freddie Roach, and his path to personal redemption through boxing, Judaism, and sobriety. With Zachary’s 2021 passing, this film serves as a moving tribute to his hustle, heart and soul and to all those who struggle with addiction.

programme.title: We Are Oscar Mike
programme.desc: Through his non-profit foundation, Oscar Mike, Noah helps rehabilitate other veterans through the adaptive sports that saved his own life.

programme.title: Five Star
programme.desc: With 41 full-ride Division 1 scholarship offers, Brandon Jones is one of the most heavily recruited high school football players in the country.

programme.title: The Magic Of Chess
programme.desc: Filmed at the 2019 Elementary Chess Championships at the Nashville Opryland resort, a group of children share their insights about the benefits of chess.

programme.title: The Human Trial
programme.desc: In 2011, filmmakers Lisa Hepner and Guy Mossman heard about a radical stem cell treatment for diabetes, a disease that kills five million people each year. The couple secured unprecedented real-time access to the clinical trial in San Diego. What follows is an intimate journey with the patients and scientists who risk everything to be first. In the world of biotech, there are no tidy solutions.

programme.title: JFK: The Ultimate Conspiracy
programme.desc: It was one of the darkest days in American history and the most horrifying public events of the 20th century. Decades later...Kennedy’s assassination, is still a global mystery that affects the world to this date. Who took that fatal shot that killed the President? Why was he the target? And what was the motive behind the killing? Join us as we explore one of histories most complex and unsolved mysteries.

programme.title: The Diana Conspiracy: What Happened In Paris?
programme.desc: Join us as we uncover the conspiracy theories that could point to an alternative and much more sinister explanation for the sudden and tragic death of Princess Diana.

programme.title: Soros
programme.desc: Billionaire activist George Soros is one of the most influential and controversial figures of our time. He is maligned by ideologues on both the left and the right for daring to tackle the world’s problems. With unprecedented access to the man and his inner circle, director Jesse Dylan follows Soros and pulls back the curtain on his personal history, private wealth, and public activism.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Days
programme.desc: This is a fascinating documentary that gives insight into the last days of Hitler’s life as well as his death. With expert contributors like Guy Walters and Dr. Lisa Pine, this project uncovers an intriguing perspective on history.

programme.desc: This first chapter explores the birth of the American Empire by focusing on Franklin D. Roosevelt, Winston Churchill and Joseph Stalin.

Faced with the challenge of wanting both a professional and a personal life, they realize that life at the top can at times be isolated, and require sacrificing the authority and control they've earned professionally.

programme.title: Revisiting the Heart
programme.desc: Azia Steed is a lead homicide detective who handles a heavy caseload while juggling her personal life. After taking some time off, she runs into an old fling, Dr. Ezrah Jacobs III. Azia receives a case involving the murder of a known local basketball star. The more evidence is uncovered, the stronger the web of deception becomes.

programme.title: Hail Mary
programme.desc: Mary went from having everything to losing it all within a blink of an eye. She taps into her inner hustle to help her get back on her feet. What starts off as a temporary hustle leads to a path of destruction.

programme.title: The Bayou City Murders
programme.desc: Houston Police Officer Tamara Haynes takes a bold interest in recent murders of women in Houston’s South Side. However, the case are unique and have horrific similarities and there is likely a serial killer on the loose. Then a local prostitute that Tamara has connections to turns up missing, making this investigation personal. When she meets a man that she starts to fall for, the true nature of those involve becomes unmasked.

programme.title: Bumher
programme.desc: When Jalisa Church finds her fiancé Tim 24 hours after he proposes in bed with another, it leads her to find love in a very unusual way after meeting a man named Jacob Reaves.

programme.title: Prodigal Husband
programme.desc: Ex-NFL player Kedar Ellis is depressed about his future after a career ending injury. His loyal wife Lydia encourages him to find another way to make a living. Unbeknownst to him he is tempted, loses faith and leaves. Left alone to run the household, Lydia has to keep the family afloat, but first, she must find faith, strength and forgiveness!

programme.title: Too Saved
programme.desc: Lisa has prayed for years that God would save her boyfriend Bobby, but when he finally sees the light it's much more than Lisa bargained for. Is Bobby "Too Saved' to hold onto his relationship with Lisa?

programme.title: Show Me Your Glory
programme.desc: Jackie Powers, a former prostitute for many years, is desperate for change from the emotional, verbal, and physical abuse of her past. With her determination to persevere, Jackie finds new found faith in God and learns that everybody deserves another chance.

programme.title: Grace & Mercy
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Grace & Mercy is the story of two desperate sisters whose lives are forever changed by one fateful decision. "By trusting the Lord would provide 'a ram in the bush.' In poor health and dead broke, Mercy has a plan to financially provide a good future for her young daughter. With the help of her sister Grace, she robs her former employer. A silent alarm goes off during the robbery, and the two women escape into a nearby church. They hold the police back by taking the Pastor and his staff hostage by gun point. Outside, the LAPD try to avoid another public relations disaster by keeping the hostage situation quiet and the local media away. Inside, the captive Pastor and his church staff ease a potentially dangerous situation with their good-natured teasing and spiritual guidance. At the end of the day, the church members become a new family to the anxious sisters, who have learned to trust in the Lord. But will the Lord provide HIS own Grace & Mercy for these two troubled siblings?

programme.title: Easter Someday
programme.desc: Ava, a young girl, is tired of her parents demanding excellence from her, so she wishes to be someplace else and finds herself in an alternate universe called Someday. In order to get home, she must follow the clues provided by a magical book and overcome challenges from a giant rabbit with magical powers and powerful friends determined to keep her locked in Someday forever.

programme.title: Lost Honeymoon
programme.desc: After an Englishwoman dies, leaving behind two children, her devoted friend decides to take the children to find the woman's husband, an American serviceman who had returned to the USA.

programme.title: Good Against Evil
programme.desc: A writer, Andy Stuart, teams up with an exorcist, Father Kemschler, to battle Satan, and a group of Devil worshipers led by Mr. Rimmin.

programme.title: Li'l Abner
programme.desc: The goings-on in the rural Southern community of Dogpatch, USA.

programme.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
programme.desc: Cyrano de Bergerac - The charismatic swordsman-poet helps another woo the woman he loves in this straightforward version of the play.

programme.title: Lady of Burlesque
programme.desc: After one member of their group is murdered, the performers at a burlesque house must work together to find out who the killer is before they strike again.

programme.title: The Pirate of the Black Hawk
programme.desc: With the support of some pirates, the tyrant Don Manfred of Monteforte succeeds in taking power. Only the black corsair Ricardo and his crowd of followers dare to resist...

programme.title: Three Guys Named Mike
programme.desc: A stewardess becomes romantically involved with an airline pilot, a college professor and a successful businessman, all of whom are named Mike. After the three find out about each other, she has to decide which one she loves the most - but it won't be easy.

programme.title: The Big Combo
programme.desc: Police Lt. Diamond is told to close his surveillance of suspected mob boss Mr. Brown because it's costing the department too much money with no results. Diamond makes one last attempt to uncover evidence against Brown by going to Brown's girlfriend, Susan Lowell.

programme.title: Rockin' in the Rockies
programme.desc: While Rusty Williams is away at college, he leaves his cousin, Shorty Williams, in charge of his large ranch. Shorty, more concerned with his prospecting ambitions, wanders into town looking for backers. At the Wagon Wheel Cafe, he encounters a couple of vagrants.

programme.title: Tarzan's Revenge
programme.desc: In Africa to collect specimens for zoos Roger and Penny Reed, their daughter Eleanor and her fiancé Nevin Potter are led by the corrupt guide Olaf Punch who is in the pay of the local ruler Ben Alleu Bey. Tarzan rescues Eleanor when she becomes trapped in a mud pit. No one will believe her story of a white man who came to her rescue however. When a lioness tries to free her captured cubs, Tarzan is again forced to save Eleanor and then also frees the animals that have so far been captured. Punch has been payed to deliver Eleanor to Ben Alleu Bey to get the girl for him and when she is taken captive by tribesmen loyal to Alleu Bey, Tarzan has to save her one last time.

programme.title: Outpost in Morocco
programme.desc: After escorting an Emir's daughter to her father's stronghold, French Foreign Legion Captain Gerard's unit joins an isolated Moroccan outpost facing imminent attack by rebel Bedouin tribes.

programme.title: Drums of Africa
programme.desc: An expedition sets out to darkest Africa to find the fabled City of the Dead, and must battle thick jungle, hostile natives, wild animals and a deadly epidemic.

programme.title: The Sin of Harold Diddlebock
programme.desc: Twenty years after his triumphs as a freshman on the football field, Harold is a mild-mannered clerk who dreams about marrying the girl at the desk down the aisle. But losing his job destroys that dream, and when he finds a particularly potent drink at his local bar, he goes on a very strange and funny rampage (with a lion in tow).

programme.title: The Black Book
programme.desc: Robespierre, a powerful figure in the French Revolution and the subsequent Reign of Terror, is desperately looking for his black book, a death list of those marked by him for the guillotine and a key to help him eventually emerge as the country's dictator. He hopes his agents will recover it, but, if it falls in to the wrong hands, it would mean his political ruin and death.

programme.title: The Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Tom Collier has had a great relationship with Daisy, but when he decides to marry, it is not Daisy whom he asks, it is Cecelia. After the marriage, Tom is bored with the social scene and the obligations of his life. He publishes books that will sell, not books that he wants to write. Even worse, he has his old friend working as a butler and Cecelia wants him fired. When Tom tries to get back together with Daisy to renew the feelings that he once felt, Daisy turns the tables on him and leaves to protect both of them.

programme.title: Gung Ho!
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car. Finally, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah enjoy a little nightlife when they hit the club to take down an entitled princess who's high on charm, but late on her payments. But the debtor's not the only one who fights to get the car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Natalia del Mar
programme.desc: Adolfo manda a Pirana a buscar a Natalia e impedir que se vaya del pueblo, de modo que va a la casa de Teodoro a buscarla, donde ella se esta escondiendo. Alli se la encuentra sola, y al tratar de llevarsela, Natalia toma un arma de Teodoro y trata de asustarlo, y ellos comienzan a forcejear por el arma. Baldomero ve esta escena y aprovecha para disparar a Pirana sin que lo vean. Natalia corre hacia lo de su abuelo y le confiesa que mato a Pirana. Pasionaria se encuentra el cuerpo de Pirana solo en la casa de Teodoro y va a la policia a testificar, justo cuando llegan Jacinto y Natalia, para declarar lo sucedido. Natalia ahora se encuentra detenida, convencida de que mato a Pirana, y Pasionaria dice haberla visto y planea testificar en su contra.

programme.title: El Talisman
programme.desc: Camila y Pedro discuten. Pedro cree que Camila pretende vengarse de el. Ella se enoja y le dice que no quiere verlo mas entonces Pedro la vuelva a cargar en su espalda y la lleva al Alcatraz. Lucrecia le cuenta a Antonio que Pedro esta enamorado de Camila. Antonio le dice que le parecio verla, pero como estaba borracho no lo puede asegurar. Cuando Antonio descubre que Camila es la encargada de erradicar la plaga del Alcatraz, confirma su sospecha de que ella esta en Fresno e intenta conquistarla. Camila lo rechaza. Antonio le hace creer que Pedro y Lucrecia son amantes a escondidas. Camila se lo cree y se angustia. Lucrecia planea hacer mas real la mentira de Antonio.

programme.title: Cosita Rica
programme.desc: Paula C. es la muchacha mas popular del barrio Republica. Posee un angel que la hace inolvidable y encantadora. Por eso, el dia que Diego Lujan, el joven empresario y futuro heredero de un imperio de cosmeticos, se cruzo con ella, se le marcaron sus ojos para siempre en la memoria. Diego estaba a una semana de casarse con la modelo mas hermosa de la ciudad: Vicky Cardenas. Ella era la imagen exclusiva de las empresas Avila y la afortunada prometida de un soltero impenitente y codiciado, como siempre se le habia conocido a Diego. Pero el destino jugo sus cartas. El encuentro entre Paula C. y Diego fue lo mas parecido a una tormenta, o lo que es lo mismo, a una gran historia de amor. Porque a Paula C. le paso exactamente lo mismo cuando vio a Diego: el estremecimiento de un huracan.

programme.title: Morena Clara
programme.desc: Linda Hace Declaraciones En La Policia Sobre El Atentado Hacia Su Persona.

programme.title: Ines Duarte - Secretaria
programme.desc: Esta magistral historia narra los hechos que marcaron la vida de Ines Duarte, una joven secretaria a quien la sobreproteccion maternal convirtio en un ser reprimido, en una persona gris, en una desconocedora total de su potencial como mujer. Ines Duarte es una secretaria eficiente, muy util, muy fiel, muy trabajadora. Ella es la sombra de un gran magnate, Andres Martan. Ines lo resuelve todo, ella es casi necesaria para su jefe. El y su trabajo son la razon de su vida. Poco a poco, la pasion va haciendose mas presente en el corazon de Ines, colmandolo del mas fiel y secreto amor. Pero la vida de Andres va por otros caminos, para el, Ines es poco mas que un robot programado para servirle. Un matrimonio, hijos, viudez y mucha amargura van conformando el cuadro de la vida de Andres Martan, convirtiendolo en un hombre duro, encerrado en si mismo, en un despota. Pero los grandes cambios vendran, una nueva Ines irrumpira en la trama dando un vuelco total a los acontecimientos, creando multiples e inesperadas situaciones que sorprenderan y atraparan al televidente en las redes de esta formidable novela.

programme.title: Mi Ex Me Tiene Ganas
programme.desc: Es la conclusion de las historias. Antonia escribe en su diario lo que sucedio en el ultimo ano desde que el Brujo secuestro a Pilar, Miranda y Soledad. Finalmente, descubrimos que el Brujo era Jaime, y que el es el verdadero abuelo de Andrea. Antonia se llevo a la bebe, y la hija de Jaime enloquecio y se suicido. Jaime comenzo a matar a todos los allegados a Antonia porque pensaba que ella estaba muerta y queria descubrir el paradero de su nieta. Cornelio era un viejo amigo de la infancia con quien jugaba a los policias y asesinos. Eventualmente, su juego se hizo realidad. Jaime tiene atadas a Pilar, Miranda y Soledad en el sotano de la casa de antiguedades cuando Navas lo descubre y lo detiene. Jaime intenta hacer que Navas lo mate, sin exito. El es condenado y va a prision.

programme.title: Natalia del Mar
programme.desc: Pirana llega herido a la mansion Uzcategui, y Adolfo se encarga de sacarle la bala. Cuando se recupera, le cuenta lo sucedido, y Adolfo le ordena que declare la verdad para asi liberar a Natalia. Luego, Adolfo visita la carcel y habla con Natalia, alli le ofrece un trato que consiste en liberarla a cambio de que ella vuelva a vivir a su casa como su esposa. Natalia acepta, pero le advierte que ya no es la muchacha debil de antes, y que esta vez sera mas dura con quien la moleste. Adolfo la libera, y una vez en la mansion, Natalia vuelve a advertirle eso al resto de la familia Uzcategui. Baldomero se entera que su plan fue un exito, y que nadie lo descubrio al disparar a Pirana. Mas tarde se entera que liberaron a Natalia, y aun promete vengarse.

programme.title: El Talisman
programme.desc: Lucrecia y Antonio ponen en marcha su plan para que Camila crea que ella y Pedro estan juntos. Doris la da una bofetada a Camila porque cree que ella quiere conquistar a su marido. Camila le explica que en realidad ella no quiere tener nada con el, pero que el la acosa. Doris termina confesandole que Antonio nunca la quiso porque piensa que ella quedo embarazada para casarse con el. Florencia y Fabiola se encuentran a escondidas con Claudio y Gabriel para explicarles que su abuelo y su madre les prohiben que hablen o se acerquen a ellos. Claudio le confiesa a Florencia lo que siente por ella, pero ella le dice que no lo ama.

programme.title: Cosita Rica
programme.desc: Paula C. es la muchacha mas popular del barrio Republica. Posee un angel que la hace inolvidable y encantadora. Por eso, el dia que Diego Lujan, el joven empresario y futuro heredero de un imperio de cosmeticos, se cruzo con ella, se le marcaron sus ojos para siempre en la memoria. Porque a Paula C. le paso exactamente lo mismo cuando vio a Diego: el estremecimiento de un huracan.
