programme.title: TNA Slammiversary 2014
programme.desc: Eric Young looks to grab the TNA World Heavyweight Championship among all the controversy.

programme.title: TNA Turning Point 2004
programme.desc: December 5, 2004. Triple X and America's Most Wanted settle their two year blood feud inside the dangerous and sadistic Six Sides of Steel where the losing team must disband. Features AJ Styles, Jeff Hardy, and Randy Savage vs. The Kings of Wrestling, plus Diamond Dallas Page vs. Raven from Orlando, FL.

programme.title: TNA Turning Point 2005
programme.desc: December 11, 2005. Featuring Jeff Jarrett vs. Rhino for the NWA World Heavyweight Championship, plus Samoa Joe vs. AJ Styles for the TNA X Division Championship from Orlando, FL.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: We present ten cars that have achieved cult status and are still adored by numerous fan clubs.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: Sometimes you really have to question the taste of car designers. We take a look at ten of the ugliest cars.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: They say beauty is in the eye of the beholder. We promise to remain objective when we present the most beautiful cars.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: Car manufacturers regularly create special works of art that are limited, exclusive and therefore expensive. In this episode we show the rarest car models.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Francisco gives the BMW M2 a proper workout on the race track. Also: one of the greatest Alfa Romeo’s is reimagined for the 21st century. And: Ernest gets comfortable in the Jeep Grand Cherokee.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We help a viewer choose a reliable vehicle for under EUR 6000. Also: SUVs from Germany and Sweden come under the spotlight. And: we examine a whining sound in a Toyota RA.

programme.title: Garage Gold
programme.desc: We kick off the season with sending to George to the Old Car Show. And we kick off our Garage Gold Concourse competition with a Morgan Roadster and a Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: Sideways champion Vic Pardal is back for a brand new season of Petrolheads. First up, we stop at Motorex to see just how many people can cram into a Chevy. S’bu introduces a smoking new segment and we meet up with a local supercar crew.

programme.title: McLaren 570 GT
programme.desc: Onboard the McLaren 570 GT on the island of Tenerife

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: At the end of the 1960s, under adverse conditions, Heinz Melkus built the GDR's only sports car, the Melkus RS 1000 with lightweight plastic bodywork and gullwing doors. Also: Audi resurrects the Wanderer streamline racing cars.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Samba transforms from pack mule into high-priced classic. And: a former letter box with 37 seats. The 1962 'Graf and Stift' post bus now takes tourists to their hotel.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The BMW 503 four-seater convertible is one of BMW's most exclusive models. Also: Inspector Columbo's Peugeot 403 Cabrio. And: pre-war elegance with 1950s technology, the Mercedes S 170.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: Big Days for Great Classic Cars
programme.desc: More than 50 years ago, DKW presented their last car, the F 12 Roadster. Also: how a Ford Mustang ended up on top of the Empire State Building. And: more than 50 years of turbo power, the Porsche 911 Turbo.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: High-tech turbo cars from the wild 1980s are reunited at the Salzburgring race track. Also: the Lancia Beta Monte Carlo, a small Italian two-seater with mid-engine offers classic car driving pleasure at a low entry price.

programme.title: Bayer K 67
programme.desc: Modern materials and new production methods and a progressive look. In 1967, the Bayer K 67 concept car seemed to come directly from the future. It gave an outlook on the possible future production of series automobiles.

programme.title: Chevrolet Corvair
programme.desc: Despite a production number of nearly 1.4 million units the Chevrolet Corvair is virtually unknown in Europe. It was innovative, efficient, modern and cheap. Nevertheless, it was slandered, torn apart and later reviled.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Francisco gives the BMW M2 a proper workout on the race track. Also: one of the greatest Alfa Romeo’s is reimagined for the 21st century. And: Ernest gets comfortable in the Jeep Grand Cherokee.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We help a viewer choose a reliable vehicle for under EUR 6000. Also: SUVs from Germany and Sweden come under the spotlight. And: we examine a whining sound in a Toyota RA.

programme.title: Garage Gold
programme.desc: We kick off the season with sending to George to the Old Car Show. And we kick off our Garage Gold Concourse competition with a Morgan Roadster and a Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: Sideways champion Vic Pardal is back for a brand new season of Petrolheads. First up, we stop at Motorex to see just how many people can cram into a Chevy. S’bu introduces a smoking new segment and we meet up with a local supercar crew.

programme.title: McLaren 570 GT
programme.desc: Onboard the McLaren 570 GT on the island of Tenerife

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nürburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nürburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Artega GT
programme.desc: From 2006 to 2012 the German company Artega produced their GT sports car model. Thanks to the know-how of a former Porsche and BMW manager the Artega GT was able to be manufactured in a small series.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.desc: Every year 150,000 petrol heads travel to the Navada desert to attend the SEMA in Las Vegas, the biggest and best-known tuning exhibition in the world. Motoring journalist Kati looks for the latest trends and meets celebrities from the tuning scene.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.desc: From complexly rebuilt show cars to giant off-road monster trucks: anything is represented at the SEMA in Las Vegas. But these cars don't just stand there. Everybody from the tuning scene presents themselves during the legendary cruise of the show.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.desc: His bike trips through California are a source of inspiration for Ola Stenegard, Chief Designer at BMW Motorrad. He meets with world-famous legends from the motorcycle industry like designer Roland Sands or customizers Michael Woolaway and Alan Stulberg.

programme.title: Ken Block - Gymkhana Grid
programme.desc: Spectacular drifts are to be expected when Ken Block visits the Gymkhana Grid.

programme.title: Cadillac Escalade
programme.desc: The Cadillac Escalade at first seems like a typical rather beefy American car, but this luxurious SUV is more of a lovable, gentle giant, that should be able to gain sympathy with its clientele.

programme.title: Ford GT40
programme.desc: With their V8 cars, Ford showed that they were able to build race winners. The Ford GT40 was a prime example for that, especially in Le Mans.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took the Mercedes AMG SLS GT to an airfield and the Porsche 911 Turbo S to the racetrack in order to see these sporty driving machines in action and test their performance. In addition: the Audi R8 4.0 TFSI's innovative lighting technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Jaguar found their way back to the world of sports cars. The F-Type doesn't just look good, it's got what it takes, and the car is able to take on the competition like the BMW Z4. We also took a closer look at two other competitors, the Porsche Boxster S and Nissan's 370 Z.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Corvette has been the embodiment of the American sports car. Also: the Ford Mustang GT, an iconic model with a V8 engine at the price of a Volkswagen Passat. And: the Chevrolet Camaro, another classic from the land where cylinder capacity is still valued a lot.

programme.title: Lamborghini Huracan by O.CT
programme.desc: A lot of power thanks to a compressor. This optimized O.CT Lamborghini Huracán delivers over 800 horse power to get the blood flowing.

programme.title: Morgan ARP4
programme.desc: Since 1950, the exhilarating Morgan +4 has been the mainstay of Morgan production. The ARP4 is the latest addition to the +4 family and strictly limited to a run of 50.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option. The Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people. When it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list. We took a closer look at these three open-top contenders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Paris Motor Show features the automotive world of tomorrow. In 2016 Mercedes-Benz introduced their “Generation EQ” and Volkswagen announced to build 20 new electrified models by 2020, possibly in order to distract from the emission scandal.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What would make coupe fans opt for a more traditional two-door model like the Mercedes-Benz E400 instead of its bigger brother, the CLS with four doors? Also: does the Volkswagen Arteon stand a chance against the Mercedes CLS?

programme.title: Arden AJ23
programme.desc: A Jaguar that is able to terrify the world alone with its roar. This Jaguar F-Type R tuned by Arden is a real bad boy. Already in the series production configuration, the F-Type R Coupe is a dream car that can really bite but this Jaguar which has been upgraded from Arden, now calls itself "AJ23“ and is more powerful, louder and more aggressive than any of his brothers.

programme.title: Volvo S90
programme.desc: It looks sportier than one might expect from the Swedes. The taillights frame the powerful looking rear. On the inside, the Volvo S90 impresses with the finest materials and soft nappa leather.

programme.title: Audi MTM S8 Talladega R
programme.desc: The Audi S8 Plus is by no means underpowered, but it is and remains faithful to this model series' understatement. Those who want more power can get a boost from MTM.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Winning the iconic Dakar Rally for a record 13 times, Frenchman Stéphane Peterhansel had a rather unusual career as he switched from motorbikes to cars and was enormously successful with both vehicles.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: From the 1950s to 1970s Hans Herrmann came to fame as a successful Formula 1 and sportscar driver for manufacturers like Porsche, Mercedes-Benz and Maserati who also won also the 24 Hours of Le Mans several times.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: People called her the "Queen of the Nordschleife" when she used to drive her Porsche or BMW racing cars at the Nürburgring's famous Nordschleife. Sabine Schmitz was a successful racing driver before she took a career turn by working as a TV presenter.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The first Grand Cherokee manufactured under the reign of Fiat is up for our test. The fourth generation of this classic looks much more elegant than before. Also: Opel's first electric family limousine, the Ampera. And: the Ssangyong Korrando.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The new BMW One M Coupe from former race car driver Ralf Kelleners: the KS1 RS. Also: Toyota present their TS 030 hybrid at the 24-hours race of Le Mans. And: Subaru's XV crossover stands out from the company's model range.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The 'little' Mercedes-Benz S250 with a four-cylinder engine needs so little fuel that one could call this car a piggybank. Also: the power packages Nissan 370 Z and Wiesmann GT MF5. And: the ADAC Eco Test.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The new Porsche Boxter, a real open-top sports car. Also: Volkswagen presents the new Passat Alltrack, a real allrounder. And: Fiat's successful Panda model in its third generation version.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: Alfa Romeo present their Giulietta 2.0 model with new engines, a new TCR transmission and a minor facelift. Also: Mazda aim for compact SUV gold with the CX-5. And: the Mercedes-Benz E 300 BlueTEC Hybrid.

programme.title: Facel Vega Facellia
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, the Facel Vega Facellia was designed to compete with Porsche and Alfa Romeo and open a new market segment for the fledgling French luxury car company.

programme.title: Maserati Quattroporte GTS
programme.desc: 1963, over 50 years ago, with the Quattroporte Maserati invented a new vehicle category, the sports sedan. This GTS model is already the 6th generation of this iconic car.

programme.title: Porsche Cayenne E-Hybrid
programme.desc: Porsche presented the latest version of its luxury SUV Cayenne in southern France. The E-Hybrid combines the best of two worlds: it's very agile but can also drive short distances purely electrically.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The G-Power M5 Hurricane RS Touring is one of the fastest station wagons in the world. Also: the Artega GT. And: the Austin FX4.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The company Mechatronik is dedicated to the restoration and refinement of Mercedes-Benz classics. Also: the Nissan 370 Z takes on Porsche Cayman & Co. And: the Chevrolet Camaro and the Mercedes-AMG ML 63.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The MF5 GT, the powerhouse from Wiesmann. What's more: if you're looking for exclusivity and find even the performance of a Mercedes-AMG too low, you've come to the right place. The Brabus company is one of the most famous tuners in the world.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The International Motor Show in Geneva is the first important vehicle fair of the year. Of course, the top class refiners must not be missing. Also: the Mercedes-AMG SL 63. The sixth generation of the SL is more powerful than ever before.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The tuning forge MTM is known for its extremely dynamic, optimally tuned vehicles. What's more: the Nissan Juke-R is a projectile with the dimensions of a cigar box and 485 hp of power.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Grammy-winning musician Marty Robbins lived a double life, flawlessly crossing between the glitz of the Grand Ole Opry and track at Talladega. One of few musicians to ever achieve success in both genres, Ray is determined to return Marty’s iconic 777 car to the race track travel back to the 60’s and 70’s.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Legendary drag racer Don “The Snake” Prudhomme proves he is no stranger to the thrill of racing rivalry. Prudhomme’s career and subsequent competition with driver Tom “The Mongoose” McEwan earned the pair an unforgettable imprint on American pop culture. Legions of kids in the 60’s and 70’s flocked to the shelves for Snake and Mongoose Matchbox cars which helped make drag racing an undisputable American pastime. Famed director Ron Howard makes an appearance to discuss the incredible stories hidden within the world of Formula 1 Racing, the topic of his latest, epic feature ‘Rush”.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Ray finds Buried Treasures in the form of two race cars that had been left almost completely untouched since the last time they were on a race track. One is found sitting in a barn with the other trapped in an old car hauler. Upon uncovering the cars, we find both have big stories to tell.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: A journey to Indianapolis unveils the winning car of the 1955 Indy 500 sits on the roof of an auto mechanic shop. More than 50 years after it’s magic at the track, prominent Indy mechanic/owner Chris Paulsen begins to restore the car and Ray talks about the evolution of America’s illustrious Indy 500.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Smokey Yunick, the most innovative mechanic in NASCAR history, sold his famous truck that hauled equipment & cars across the country. Ray is on a mission to uncover this storied truck that helped launch the beginning of NASCAR’s cross-country popularity.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Ray travels to Long Island, New York with the hopes of learning more about America’s first major auto racing competition. The race, which began at the turn of the 20th century, helped develop the first major American racing stars and drove American manufacturing to competitive standard with the highly progressive Europeans.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Fred Dmuchowski is a New Jersey racing icon. He was a regular workingman who raced on weekends for fun and became a legend in his iconic 303 racer. Ray works to rebuild the 303 in homage to Fred who inspired him to pursue his career in motorsports.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: For Rick Hendrick, the Corvette inspired his first car purchase, which ultimately led to the creation of his car dealership empire and motorsports teams. Mr. H, as he goes by, gives us a rare look inside of his personal Corvette collection and takes us to General Motors World Headquarters to talk with GM Vice President of Global Design, Ed Welburn, about how this iconic car came about. Country superstar Brad Paisley makes a cameo appearance to talk about his prized ‘Vette and the influence of cars on his music.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: The last car Elvis drove the evening he passed was his beloved Stutz Blackhawk. Ray discovers that the car has been preserved and heads to Graceland to check out this iconic piece of American music history. Ray and the team reveal the impeccable preservation of the car at Charlotte Motor Speedway with Rick Hendrick (“Mr. H”) and, arguably Elvis Presley’s biggest fan, Dale Earnhardt Jr. While at Graceland, Ray and the team also get an exclusive look at the paneled station wagon Elvis used to get in and out of Graceland in disguise. It’s an intimate look at the King’s incredible automobiles and their secrets that only Elvis knew.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: This episode takes an inside look at the famous racing L88 Corvette. From its history, to its successes and heartbreaks, to the stories of the men that drove it. Now, it’s a car world’s version of the Flinstones meet the Jetsons, as the Owens Corning Corvette, which clinched 22 straight race victories, challenges the new Corvette C7-R at Sebring International Raceway. The original Owens Corning team reunites for the challenge and our crew goes behind the scenes for the Corvette test drive of a lifetime.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the world’s most sought after works specials.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “12hrs. & Running”: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: An family farm in the mid-west contains houses, barns, outbuildings, trailers, grain silos and buses full of old stuff and perhaps the biggest stash of undiscovered old motorcycles in the country. The collection was put together by their unnamed father. Seller agrees to have Dale broker rare Excelsior for high-end client. Dale has the buyer, but will he outbid his own client for the exclusive find?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: From break up to make up, Jeff Gordon and Ray reunite to go on a quest to find their Chevrolet Monte Carlo that claimed victory in their final race together at Phoenix, AZ in 1999. John Bickford, Jeff Gordon’s stepdad, makes the call that reunites the old team. Jeff and Ray look to bum parts off their boss, Rick Hendrick, to make their vision a reality: get the car, replace the parts as they were, make it run and get it to auction.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: One of the greatest battles in NASCAR history was Hall of Famer Richie Evans and rival speedster Jerry Cook. Ray is determined to uncover and revive the cars that made these men famous.Ray purchases one of Richie’s original #61 modifieds from Jimmy Spencer and restores it to its original glory while simultaneously building a replica of Jerry Cook’s #38. Throughout the build process, Ray uncovers stories about these legends through the eyes of guys who were in Rome, NY to witness it firsthand, like Robin Pemberton and Steve Hmiel.Both cars will hit the track at Martinsville, site of one of the greatest races in modified history and the tragic death of Richie Evans himself. Legends live again, as Ray recreates one of the racing world’s most celebrated rivalries on a track that has seen it all.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: General Motors VP of global design Ed Welburn takes AmeriCarna behind the scenes to talk about the history and development of the company’s concept cars that never made it to production. In a rare tour of the factory’s inner design studio, Ray gets an exclusive look behind the creative curtain at the GM plant in Detroit.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: In this episode, Ray celebrates the 50th birthday of the Ford Mustang through the lens of three distinct Mustang owners, who each hold a slice of the car’s incredible history. In 1964, Chicago schoolteacher Gail Wise unknowingly purchased the first ever Mustang 3 days before the car became available to the general public. Her husband reveals the incredible restoration that brought the earliest Mustang ever sold back to its 60’s glory. (Ford Motor Company knows she has the car and has verified it was sold before it was legal to sell.) John Grafelman is a farmer in Illinois and life-long Ford lover. A few years ago he found an old car hidden in a barn. It took some time, but he eventually convinced his friend to sell it to him. After some detective work, he discovers he purchased 1968 Ford Design Chief Larry Shinoda’s personal car that he tinkered with to invent the BOSS 302.Lastly, Ray travels to Dayton Ohio to interview Gale Holderman, the Ford stylist who won the company’s contest to draw and design the Mustang.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Post-World War II, a large generation of American soldiers was looking for cars that mirrored the incredible sports cars they saw overseas in Europe. After searching for an affordable way to recreate these cars, one manufacturer responded with a durable, cost effective option: a line of fiberglass sports cars. Very few of these cars still exist but there are collectors who are constantly looking to save parts and pieces of these virtually unknown vehicles. We learn about these rare cars from Geoff Hacker and his team at Forgotten Fiberglass, and take a visit to the Smithsonian Museum, which houses a fiberglass car of its own. This episode presents a unique look at how the narrative of American wartime experiences often shaped the nation’s automotive demands.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: Ray explores buying a unique, hand built car the Schultz family has kept in their New Jersey home for years. The car was originally called the Schultz El Fierro but it’s officially titled in New Jersey as a “Schultz Special” from 1958. It was used to drag race and held numerous racing records, but most important to the family was that it was driven by the legendary Carroll Shelby. With a frame and style much similar to the Shelby Roadster, the Schultz family wonders if it inspired one of the most well known automobiles in America. In another epic New Jersey story, Ray finds Mario Andretti’s 1965 IndyCar. The catch: it’s completely in pieces hidden away in a garage. The iconic driver talks about his days on the track with that car and Ray attempts to negotiate a deal to buy the parts.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: How do you cast a car in a movie? What are the secrets to the build? Hollywood car designers give Ray the ultimate tour of some memorable movie cars, including a look at the recently found “Hells Chariot”, the last surviving car from Grease. We also hear the backstory to “Bumble Bee” from Transformers, take a look at the making of the tanks for Hunger Games and stumble upon the iconic 1958 Chevy Impala from American Graffiti.

programme.title: AmeriCarna
programme.desc: While visiting the estate of automotive genius and land speed record holder Willie Glass, Ray uncovers a set of extremely rare Ardun cylinder heads, which is a hot rodders dream discovery. He also visits the infamous H & H Flatheads outside of Los Angeles and discovers a surprise connection to the Earnhardt family.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: A New Generation Takes over Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane at Ameilia Island have everything from classic to extraterrestrial.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: One of a kind cars at Amelia Island Caffeine & Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Concourse d'lemons: One Man's Trash Is a Car Enthusiast's Treasure
programme.desc: Rickey, Bryan and Adam explore all the cars that should never have been built at Concourse d'lemons.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
programme.desc: The Concourse d'lemons celebrates the oddball, mundane, & truly awful of the automotive world.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
programme.desc: Due diligence on custom builds and their quirky builders.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
programme.desc: British Invasion through the decades.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
programme.desc: Doubling down for cars and coffee.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
programme.desc: Mecum Auction's push for a $15,000,000 sale.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl
programme.desc: "Go Fast Girl" Katherne Legge's Model A Racer.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
programme.desc: Covert cars that slipped into the U.S.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
programme.desc: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
programme.desc: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Super Car, Hot Rods, Go Carts
programme.desc: Stacey rolls the SL-C back into the shop to show off the twin turbo system Schwartz Performance installed. If you thought 1000hp out of an LS-7 was impossible, THINK AGAIN! Even wilder is the fact that this engine is pulling that kind of horsepower on pump gas! If supercars and twin turbos are your thing, you have to see this! After that, Stacey goes through some of the problem areas that you will face when you are building a vehicle and how to pick the right project. Finally He digs into the 1st motorized vehicle that most of us had…the Go-Kart. There's something for everybody in this show. That’s why they call it GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We dig into the ultimate how-to project… building a shop! It’s an incredible transformation as Stacey and Crew take a huge open warehouse and build it into the new GEARZ shop. Along the way you’ll pick up all kinds of tips and tricks that Stacey uses when he’s setting up a useable work space. With today’s economy, there are more and more people thinking about opening a shop, or converting their existing garage space into a more useable area. This show can help you do that. After that, Stacey shows how to stop rust dead in its tracks by using the simplest tool in the box… a paint brush! It’s all here on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey makes a house call… to Pennsylvania! Why?... to pick up an old fire truck to use as a project truck to make even more house calls with! If this sounds confusing, then you NEED to see this show, because Stacey shows you how to take a vehicle that nobody really has a use for anymore, and convert it into something you can use for your home or business. Sound deadening, tool boxes, and an on-board air system are all things that you’ll see go on as the big green fire truck, begins the conversion into a rolling tool truck

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s anniversary time…the 100th episode of GEARZ! And we have put together a one-hour special of the history and making of GEARZ, in two episodes! Stacey takes a look back at how the show came about. Then he digs into some of the project vehicles, and looks at the ideas and reasoning that shaped these trend-setting vehicles. If you’re new to GEARZ or wondered how the show was put together, this episode will shed some light on that

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Part two of the 100th Episode special starts with a bang and a lot of tire smoke, as Stacey looks back at some of the wild test drives and feature vehicles that have been on GEARZ over the years. After that, they go behind the scenes and show you some of the funny and potentially dangerous situations that can happen when you work on a show like GEARZ. Finally, we showcase some of the incredible guests that have been on the show, to give you an idea of what to expect in the future. It’s all here and only on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in the big green fire truck, with every intention of changing the color and look. But he’s not using paint… he’s using a vinyl wrap! If you’ve ever wondered what the deal is with vinyl wraps and if it is a good thing to do to your project, you need to see this show! But that’s not all, as the wrap is going on, Stacey also takes the time to show how to restore and bring back to life your accessories and trim without spending a lot of money.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: If you’ve been around cars very much, you’ve heard the term “barn find”. It depicts that “diamond in the rough” vehicle that everybody wants to find. Stacey delves into the barn find phenomenon and unveils what could be the ultimate barn find… the lost Richard Petty Car! Follow the incredible story of the car that Richard and Maurice Petty built in their early days, that was then sold and disappeared for decades... only to be found by Stacey and returned to Richard Petty so it could take its rightful place in the Petty Museum. It’s gearhead archeology at its best, and you’ll only see it on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey hits the road to visit a GEARZNation member to see if he can lend a hand on his project. The owner is a 16-year-old kid and the subject is his ’96 Dodge pickup that’s looking a little rough from years of use and abuse. That quickly changes as Stacey jumps in to help give the truck a new face, and at the same time offers tips and tricks to breathe a breath of fresh air into the project. See what a difference some time, expertise, and a few parts can make on a beat up old truck! After that, Stacey takes a look at the amazing Moduline Cabinets, and digs into what makes them so great.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey shows you how to tackle the one restoration project that everybody dreams of doing one day... the frame off restoration! You’ll be surprised how simple a job like this can be if you follow his simple tips and tricks and plan the project out properly. In the world of high dollar builds, a simple frame off restoration can get you back on the road enjoying your car or truck and at a fraction of the price. But to get a grasp on how to do it, you have to see this show. After that, Stacey swaps some licks with recording artist Casey James who just happens to be a gearhead at heart… all here… all Gearz!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: So, you think you want some custom bumpers for your big ol’ truck? Stacey shows you how to find what you’re looking for in the aftermarket, and also how to fabricate and build your own custom mounts to make ‘em sit exactly where you want them. After that he digs into the history of the Sgt. Rock truck and how it is permanently connected to “the greatest generation”. But this truck isn’t just about WWII, as a special tailgate airbrushed by Mickey Harris reveals, It’s about the men and women that have sacrificed for the freedoms we enjoy today. This is one show that will have you waving the flag!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey hits the road to help out a Gearz Nation member with his ‘56 Corvette project. Since the guy really wants to drive the car, putting in a modern 5 or 6spd tranny would be really nice. But which one? Well, we not only answer that question, but also give the guy a little helping hand with the transmission too. If you’ve ever wished Stacey made house calls, this is the show to see. After that we take a look at some serious questions that people ask about becoming a tool dealer and if it’s really worth it. You wanted to know… we got the answers for you!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey dives into the world of the sleeper, by taking a non-descript ’73 Plymouth Satellite, and begins transforming it into a street pounding monster under the skin. Gone is the lethargic 318 engine and front suspension, and in its place Stacey begins fitting a new state of the art performance suspension. It you are into surprising people at stop lights and run-what-you-brung race nights, then a “Street Sweeper” just might be the sort of approach you want to take on your next project.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The Street Sweeper is back! Stacey delves into just how many parts it takes to completely change the drivetrain and suspension on a classic muscle car. Accessories, transmission, overdrive, headers, the list may seem to go on forever, but it’s all about finding the right parts in the aftermarket, to build the car that YOU want. After that it’s off to the races to see if E3’s new top fuel spark plug can handle the pressure of competition. If you want to see the ins and outs of building a car, GEARZ is the show to see!

Deewaar: Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
programme.desc: A group of Indian POW (Prisoners of War) from the 1971 Indo-Pak war rebels against the Pakistani army and tries to escape from their captivity. Helping the group in the mission is Gaurav, the son of a former Army Major also held captive by the enemy.

programme.title: Deadline: Sirf 24 Ghante
programme.desc: A renowned surgeon Dr. Viren’s daughter gets kidnapped and the abductors demand a hefty ransom within 24 hours. Even after abiding their rules and delivering the money, the kidnappers vanish with the money and Anishka, leaving Dr. Viren in distress.

programme.title: Naqab
programme.desc: A freelance photographer Imran meets an enigmatic singing woman who literally vanishes when he approaches her. Shaken up by the incident Imran begins to question his sanity when the disappearing woman keeps making appearances in his life.

programme.title: Gundaraj
programme.desc: Ajay lives a happy life with his loving family and girlfriend. To top it all, he earns a high-end job in the city. But when he starts his new job, he gets framed for assaulting three college girls and goes to prison which destroys his personal life.

programme.title: 2016 The End

programme.desc: Drivers talk about the ultimate road race, La Carrera Panamericana. A seven-day, 2,000-mile vintage rally race across México. This series brings together some of the most successful and experienced teams, to talk about how the race works, the challenges racers face, and why they come back year after year to rally through the beauty of México.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) will put his GLORY welterweight title on the line against ‘House of GLORY’ winner Anwar Ouled-Chaib (3-0) in the main event. In the co-main event, local fan favourite Nabil Khachab (26-4-1, 4 KO) finally gets his opportunity to enter the GLORY Grand Prix as he goes up against Serbia’s Nikola Filipovic (11-2, 6 KO) in a qualifying fight. Number one ranked Enriko Kehl (52-15-2, 30 KO) will be aiming undeniably book his spot as the next title challenger against champion Tyjani Beztati. The German meets the dangerous Arman Hambaryan (58-8-2, 27 KO) of Armenia.

programme.title: K1
programme.desc: Final Elimination tournament for the top sixteen Heavyweigh fighters. The winners qualified for the K-1 World GP 2008 Final.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 01: Stockholm from the Ericsson Globe in Stockholm, Sweden on May 26, 2012. This event featured the world title fight for the inaugural Glory Heavyweight championship between Semmy Schilt and Errol Zimmerman as headliner. The event also featured qualification bouts for the Glory 70kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: From the Forest National in Brussels, Belgium on October 6, 2012. This event featured a super fight between Remy Bonjasky and Anderson Silva as headliner, Also this event featured non-tournament super fight series.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The undisputed heavyweight king of kickboxing will be decided in the main event as long reigning champion Rico Verhoeven (60-10, 20 KO) goes up against arguably his most dangerous opponent to date in interim-heavyweight champ Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (25-2-1, 13 KO). Middleweight champ Donovan Wisse (19-1, 10 KO) puts his title on the line against number one contender Michael Boapeah (16-3-1, 7 KO). Wisse has looked unstoppable so far during his title run but now he faces an in-form Michael Boapeah who holds a win over the only man to beat Wisse. The welterweight division sees top ranked stars go head-to-head as Hamicha (40-2, 30 KO) takes on Diaguely Camara (24-4-1, 10 KO) and Jay Overmeer (29-5, 15 KO) meets Chico Kwasi (41-5, 22 KO). It’s also an important evening at middleweight with Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-8, 36 KO) colliding with Ulric Bokeme (31-4, 17 KO) and the recently debuted Iliass Hammouche (33-6, 7 KO) facing Ivan Galaz (58-10-1, 15 KO). A huge featherweight match-up between the number one ranked Abraham Vidales (15-2, 12 KO) and number two ranked Ahmad Chikh Mousa (58-8-1, 28 KO) plus an exciting light heavyweight bout between Ibrahim El Bouni (41-8-1, 22 KO) and Stefan Latescu (16-2, 7 KO) will round out the main card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 01: Stockholm from the Ericsson Globe in Stockholm, Sweden on May 26, 2012. This event featured the world title fight for the inaugural Glory Heavyweight championship between Semmy Schilt and Errol Zimmerman as headliner. The event also featured qualification bouts for the Glory 70kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An American ambulance driver and an English nurse fall in love in Italy during World War I.

programme.title: A Propos De Nice
programme.desc: What starts off as a conventional travelogue turns into a satirical portrait of the town of Nice on the French Cote d'Azur, especially its wealthy inhabitants.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild (AKA Pride of the West)
programme.desc: A greedy land baron has shut down the dam that supplies water to the town of Indian Head. Two truck drivers race to get a truck loaded with dynamite to the dam so they can blow it, but must battle their way through a gang of armed thugs hired by the land baron to stop them.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman; but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Mr Wong In Chinatown
programme.desc: A pretty Chinese woman, seeking help from San Francisco detective James Lee Wong, is killed by a poisoned dart in his front hall, having time only to scrawl "Captain J" on a sheet of paper. She proves to be Princess Lin Hwa.

programme.title: The Kid
programme.desc: On the streets of downtown Los Angeles, a woman and a young boy fight to protect something both highly valuable and extremely dangerous.

programme.title: La Signora Senza Camelie
programme.desc: A new starlet is discovered and has ups and downs in Italian films.

programme.title: American Refugee
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old France Hoang must choose between staying home to support his family or honoring his adoptive country by accepting an admission to West Point and joining the US military.

programme.title: Traces in the Snow
programme.desc: Traces in the Snow is a feature length documentary on Siberia’s punk scene in the 1980?s. Directed by Russian author and film director Vladimir Kozlov, this first-of-its-kind documentary uses rare footage of Siberian punk legends including the punk poet a

programme.title: Lukas The Strange
programme.desc: Lukas nino (Lukas the strange) is a story of an awkward teenager coming to grips with his own initiation into manhood just when there is a movie shoot in their neighborhood. The story opens several nights before, when Lukas is told that he has a tikbalang (half-horse, half man) for a father. His father, Mang Basilio disappears in their life the next day. Soon enough, Lukas wonders if he really is half-beast. The village is in a frenzy as the film crew arrives. Everyone tries to participate as leads, action stars and stunt extras. In the film that they are shooting, there is a story of the mystical river, where it is said to have the power to let those who cross it forget one painful memory: their biggest heartbreak. All those who have crossed and have forgotten will forget the events and the people attached to that memory. Lukas' father, Mang Basilio emerges, and they tell them about the river. Very private footage of Lukas' mother emerges from the river. The film is told by Lukas' friend, Lorena, who is fascinated by this strange boy who thinks he is a tikbalang.

programme.title: Flying Lessons
programme.desc: With her life at a crossroads, 25 year old Sophie Conway (MAGGIE GRACE) returns to the small town she always tried to forget. Once home, she’s faced with past lovers, a tangled relationship with her Mother, and Harry Pleasant, an Alzheimer's patient who in quite an opposite fashion, shares in Sophie’s struggle to remember.

programme.title: Eye For An Eye
programme.desc: When his wife is violently taken from him by a vicious gang, one man sets out get his revenge. But is an eye for an eye truly worth it?

programme.title: Killing Down
programme.desc: Steven Down (MATTHEY POMPKINS)is the only survivor from the U.S. army's military intelligence in Nicaragua Circa 1986, and was tortured by a masked paramilitary group. Seven years later, working as a freelance corporate security guard, Steven hears the voice of his torturer sitting next to him at a meeting. Could this be the same man? Only time will tell.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Magic Flute
programme.desc: A villain named McCreep steals the Smurfs' magic flute, an instrument that makes people dance wildly, and uses it to rob them. The Smurf King sends out Peewit to track down the thief and retrieve the flute.

programme.title: The Ambassador To Bern
programme.desc: A fictional account of the 1958 attack against the Hungarian embassy in Bern. Based on a true story about the aftermath of the 1956 Hungarian revolution.

programme.title: The Phantom Father
programme.desc: American professor Robert Traum embarks on an adventurous and amusing journey through Bucovina to find Sami the projectionist, the only person alive that can tell him anything about his Romanian Jewish descent. His symbolic journey is filled with danger, the unknown and the surreal, but finally rewarded with a double love: on the one hand he finds romantic love, on the other the passion for old cinema, nomad, popular, naive and generous.

programme.title: Trotteur
programme.desc: A young man races a steam locomotive through the winter landscape of another time. But what is he running away from?

programme.title: A Bucket Of Blood
programme.desc: A dim-witted busboy finds acclaim as an artist for a plaster-covered dead cat that is mistaken as a skillful statuette. The desire for more praise soon leads to an increasingly deadly series of works.

programme.desc: Count Dracula wants the blood of Mina, the wife of Jonathan Harker, the man in charge of drawing up the inventory of his personal library. programme.title: The Killer Reserved Nine Seats
programme.desc: Patrick Davenant invites a group of friends and his daughter to his family-owned theater. Within a short time, the guests realize that they are trapped. A masked killer begins to murder them one by one.

programme.title: Django the Last Killer
programme.desc: The wealthy Barret has a mortgage on Ramon's land, and just as Ramon is about to pay it off, he orders his men to rob him. From here begins a long series of vendettas involving Ramon's father, a business associate of Barret himself, and Raza, a professional killer.

programme.title: Nightmare City

programme.title: Even Angels Eat Beans
programme.desc: Striving for a higher standard of living, a former ice-cream man and a wrestler convince a well-known mobster to hire them. However, they both soon realize that criminal life is not what they were looking for.

programme.title: Murder Obsession
programme.desc: Michael Stanford, a promising young actor, suffers from the stress caused by his job. Fatigue creates large gaps in his memory and makes him unstable character-wise. Therefore, Michael decides to retreat to his mother's house, inviting the entire film crew as well.

programme.title: Boot Hill
programme.desc: Honey Fisher has become a powerful man in a small Western town. Fisher and his gang have managed, through swindling, murder, and terror, to gain leases on the important gold-yielding land in the area. Cat Stevens and Hutch Bessy join forces with circus performers and townsfolk to fight against Fisher and his henchmen.

The dark lord of the castle believes the woman resembles his beloved Dolingen De Gratz like a drop of water and that they are united by an ancient bond, a love curse.

programme.title: Streetlight Harmonies
programme.desc: An entertaining journey through the bands, songs, and harmonies of doo-wop. Streetlight Harmonies uncovers a definitive period of music and the artists that defined it. Millions know the music but few know the artists and their history.

programme.title: Mallory
programme.desc: Mallory Grossman a 12-year-old girl, took her own life after months of relentless bullying at school and online. Mallorys school failed to stop the bullying after continued outreach. Her family has never stopped fighting for justice.

programme.title: Wild Beauty Mustang Spirit of the West
programme.desc: An immersive journey into the world of wild horses that illuminates the profound beauty and plight they face in the USA.

programme.title: At The Edge Of The World
programme.desc: Against all odds, activists unleash an array of risky strategies to stop the Japanese whaling fleet in the stunningly beautiful but uniquely treacherous Southern Ocean.

programme.title: The Incredible Lamont

programme.title: Dennis Rodman's Big Bang in Pyongyang
programme.desc: An uproarious doc about Dennis Rodman's calamitous foray into North Korea.

programme.title: Downwind
programme.desc: Hiroshima. Nagasaki. Mercury, Nevada? The latter was the site for the testing of 928 nuclear weapons from 1951 to 1992.

programme.title: Jim: The James Foley Story
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day 2012, American photojournalist James 'Jim' Foley was kidnapped in Syria, two years before the infamous video of his public execution introduced much of the world to ISIS. JIM: THE JAMES FOLEY STORY, directed by close childhood friend Brian Oakes, tells the story of Jim's life through intimate interviews with his family, friends and fellow journalists.

programme.title: 86ED
programme.desc: A Michelin Star chef searches for redemption during a time of social reckoning and change.

programme.title: Filling in the Blanks

programme.title: Catching Air
programme.desc: "Catching Air" is a documentary showcasing diverse air guitarists, defying stereotypes and inspiring hidden talents.

programme.title: The Other Fellow
programme.desc: An energetic exploration of male identity via the lives, personalities, and adventures of a diverse band of men, real men across the globe all sharing the same name - James Bond.

programme.title: On These Grounds
programme.desc: An explosive video goes viral, showing a white school resource officer in South Carolina pull a Black teenager from her desk. One woman uproots her life to support the girl and dismantle the system, including facing the police officer.

programme.title: Hot Water on Long Island
programme.desc: About the toxins that exist within the groundwater and aquifer that supplies the drinking water for all of Long Island.

programme.title: Humanoids The Real Close Encounters of the Third Kind?
programme.sub-title: Humanoids The Real Close Encounters of the Third Kind?
programme.desc: This new controversial documentary is about alien contact cases, more commonly referred to as close encounters of the third kind. This film includes video footage never seen before of possible aliens which has yet to be disproven.

programme.title: Virginia Paranormal Case Files
programme.sub-title: History and Haunts of the Park Gate Plantation - Part 3
programme.desc: The team at Virginia Paranormal Investigations travels the state investigating claims of paranormal activity and compiling the Virginia Paranormal Case Files. The show offers a balanced look at paranormal investigation. VAPI has a reputation for being honest and approaching each case with an open mind. The evidence is real, the people are real, and the reports are real.

programme.title: Are You Haunted?
programme.desc: Sara, Phil and the rest of the Are You Haunted team travel to North Yorkshire, to investigate a venue for the very first time. Among the incidents here are reports of male and female apparitions, doors opening and closing, and much more.

programme.title: Unveiled
programme.desc: Embark on an enthralling journey with "Unveiled," a captivating TV series exploring the enigmatic world of aliens, UFOs, conspiracy theories, and extraterrestrial history. Discover a thrilling blend of scientific exploration, historical analysis, and captivating storytelling as "Unveiled" pushes the boundaries of human understanding and leaves audiences captivated by the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Town Tamer
programme.desc: A gunfighter is hired to clean up a wild frontier town, but there are forces afoot who want to keep the town as wide-open as it is.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows
programme.desc: Lazar, a bounty killer, teams up with a young gunfighter to blackmail Barrett, a former bandit and mine owner. At the end of the day, the bounty hunter clashes with Barrett, but something goes wrong.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: Comanche
programme.desc: Common efforts of the U.S. government and the Comanche nation to negotiate a peace treaty are sabotaged by renegade Indians and by the short-sighted Indian Commissioner.

programme.title: Damned Pistols of Dallas
programme.desc: Outlaw Fast Draw (Álvarez) assaults stagecoach with passengers Clay Stone (Beir), singer Katy Dior (Marandi) and gambler Fred Foster (Mathot), but Stone is ready to take revenge.

programme.title: Killer Goodbye
programme.desc: A young man goes back to his hometown ten years after killing the killer of his parents. Once there he is asked to help the sheriff.

programme.title: Navajo
programme.desc: A young Navajo Indian boy is caught up in the conflict of cultures when he rejects the white man's school. Told in semi-documentary style.

programme.title: Deadly Trackers
programme.desc: Jeff sets out to murder each one of the five outlaws who robbed, raped and killed his poor sister.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: Savage Pampas
programme.desc: In the late 1800's, an army captain tries to tame the open plains of Argentina which are dominated by Indians and bandits. To help do this, the captain brings in a party of women to keep his soldiers happy.

programme.title: My Name Is Shanghai Joe
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant, recently arrived in America, fights to free Mexican slaves from their cruel master.

programme.title: Kill the Wickeds
programme.desc: Good Samaritan drifter, Benny Hudson and a stranded woman, Jenny finds themselves being torture; when they accidentally walk into an gang's hideout in a ghost town.

programme.title: Gunsight Ridge
programme.desc: Stage line agent investigates a series of robberies by taking the job of a deputy sheriff in a border Arizona town.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Colorized American Western Movie from 1946 starring Randolph Scott: Abilene Town - A sheriff tries to stop homesteader conflicts in the West after the Civil War.

programme.title: Celeb Rides
programme.desc: Celeb Rides takes a look into the glamorous lives of your favorite celebrities. Take an up close look into their careers, their fun side and of course their dope whips!!! Join DJ Sabby and Ney The Bae as they take over the streets of Mzansi with the biggest names in the game.

programme.title: Side Chick
programme.desc: Lynn's affair with her mysterious lover leads her to uncover a dangerous secret, forcing her to choose between protecting her heart or exposing the truth.

programme.title: Saved By Grace
programme.desc: Grace loses her job, applies at the church, and faces self-doubt. Her faith is tested when the church faces foreclosure. She must find courage to save it.

programme.title: Brown Girl Begins
programme.desc: It's 2049 on a forsaken island off the coast of Toronto, where the survival of the islanders depends on young Ti-Jeanne to risk death by a spirit so she can take her place as a Caribbean priestess and save her people.

programme.title: New Money
programme.desc: The movie tells the story of a young girl, who goes from being a shop girl to a billionaire, after her father leaves her his empire to run.

programme.title: Mrs. Right Guy
programme.desc: Gugu, the walking wounded, rejects men long before they can get too close to rock her self-imposed exile from love. But to find bliss with the right guy, she must first realise that no man is created equal and that, in love, nice guys not only have staying power but can be just right too.

programme.title: How to Steal 2 Million
programme.desc: It's a jungle out there. That's how we meet our lead character Jack. It's been five years since he's seen his partner and best friend Twala. Jack did five years for a robbery gone bad. Twala never got caught and Jack never talked. But Twala is as treacherous as Jack is honourable. He's married Jack's former fianc√©e. Jack wants to go legit but after being rejected for a loan he needs a new source of capital. Twala presents him with an opportunity a job with a R2 million take. The complication is that the mark is Twala's father. Jacks partner for the job is the tough and sexy Olive. Little does he know she will prove to be more devious then his old friend.

programme.title: Smokin' Good
programme.desc: August Good, a former street dealer, sees a chance to redeem himself and build a better future for his family by starting a legal cannabis business.

programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling journey as a detective unravels a web of lies and deception in a high-stakes missing persons case.

programme.title: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: What starts as a lighthearted game of Truth or Dare at a celebration for a friend's new business quickly turns sinister and survival becomes the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Disgraced and hunted, Tiffany Cooper fights against time to dismantle a trafficking operation and save innocent lives. Betrayal lurks around every corner. Trust is a luxury she can't afford.

programme.title: Hope
programme.desc: A young man finds solace and strength in faith, rising from despair to newfound hope.

programme.title: Paquete #3
programme.desc: Un taxista peruano huye de la justicia de su país y viene a Venezuela. Conoce a un hombre que le ofrece un trabajo para un gángster ruso. Al igual que las arenas movedizas, queda atrapado en un mundo de sangre y ambición que lo hace darse cuenta de cuánto vale la vida y cuánto cuesta la muerte.

programme.title: No Hay Más Remedio
programme.desc: Roberto, Fonso y Ángel son tres viejos llenos de remordimientos y sueños no cumplidos. Deciden robar una farmacia como una forma fácil de alcanzar esas necesidades insatisfechas antes de que sea demasiado tarde. Pero lo que parece ser un trabajo fácil se convierte en un camino inesperado hacia una vida completa.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Two robots fight over the title “Best showman” in this episode’s Vengeance Main Event. In the build-up, we see a three way International Melee between the UK, Belgium and The Netherlands, Tag Team Terror, Challenge Belt and Mayhem battle.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots will be reduced down to one in this annihilator episode. Qualifiers from the Mayhem battles previously in the series. Which competitor will battle through the four rounds and defeat the opposition in the final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Extreme series returns to its normal format after the first Annihilator. Four mixed battles, followed by a Main Event, which in this episode is an All-Stars battle between Pussycat and Stinger.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Shunt and Dead Metal prepare to be let loose from the sidelines in this episodes Main Event, House Robot Rebellion. Three unfortunate competitors will be put into the arena as the House Robots have free reign in this destructive episode.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: We have reached the Quarter Finals for the All-Stars battles in this episode’s Main Event and another Mayhem battle puts another three robots up against each other.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four of the best robots armed with rear-hinged flippers go against each other to prove whose best in Flipper Frenzy. Other battles on the card are the Challenge Belt, Tag Team Terror, Wild Card Warriors and Mayhem battle.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Current World Champions Razer are matched against fierce competitor Firestorm in this All-stars match. Four robots make their way to the arena to take part in the German Melee, with the winner securing a place in the Second World Championship.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Featherweight Championship takes place in this episode, along with the Challenge Belt, Mayhem battle and more Wildcard Warriors. All these build-up to the Main event, the Tag Team Terror finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The second annihilator was supposed to be between the six winners of the mayhem qualifiers, but due to the severity of damage from the battle, two of the robots had to be replaced. Will the two replacements seize this opportunity?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Using competitors own video diaries, exclusive action from the pits and the best of the battles, Philippa Forrester will get down to the nuts and bolts of Robot Wars, The Second Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Philippa goes behind the scenes to find out how the shows fighting machines are made, whilst uncovering the trials and tribulations of their frantic creators.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of Robot Wars Series 2, more exclusive footage and access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of this week’s competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Witness hope, triumph, desperation and defeat as Philippa takes us back to the pits, where competitors make final touches to their Robots, hoping they come back in one piece.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of how the production team setup the arena for contests such as jousting and pinball. Gain an insight as to how competitors construct their robots from team video diaries.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More behind the scenes of the hit series Robot Wars. Philippa gets into the nitty gritty of why competitors choose to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat winners gather for the beginning of The Fourth Wars semi-finals. Pinball Warrior and Sumo Bash make way for the brutal knockout competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The last stage before the Grand Finals, and the pressure is on. With this level of carnage not all robots may leave the arena as they fight for the title, and their lives.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Fourth Wars is coming to an end, beginning with two rounds of playoffs, where four will be whittled down to two. Of the remaining two, one will become Robot Wars: The Fourth Wars champions.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first ever Robot Wars heat begins. Six brave teams enter the arena for the first time as the four House Robots are unleashed to do what they were made for, turning competitors into twisted and scorched lumps.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat B features six contestants, all battling for a spot in the series finals. To make it through, they must prove their mettle in the Gauntlet, Trial (British Bulldog) and battle it out in the Arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six more contestants enter the arena. This week the arena transforms into a Robot football pitch and Sergeant Bash meets his match. Which contestant will score a place in the finals?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Lightweight special; the six contestants this week make up for what they lack in size, with agility. Can they weave their way through the house robots in the gauntlet? Or will they knock each other off-course in this week’s trial, stock car racing?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six contestants enter the arena, but how many will leave? As the robots navigate their way through this week’s trial, the Labyrinth, who knows what lies around each corner? Victory or elimination?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: No cues necessary as six new contestants play robot snooker in this week’s trial. The victors of this heat will be joining the other winners in the Grand Final. Who will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The First Wars?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: We have reached the Quarter Finals for the All-Stars battles in this episode’s Main Event and another Mayhem battle puts another three robots up against each other.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The UK are up against renowned German Engineering in a UK vs Germany battle. Two more rivals have a chance to settle the score in another vengeance battle and other unmissable battles take place before the long awaited All-Stars Grand Final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Robots from around the globe ready themselves for the ultimate contest, The Second World Championship. Will lightning strike twice for defending champions Razer, or will they reign be snuffed out by one of the many fierce competitors?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six teams comprised of armed and emergency services enter their robots for battle, will their unpredictable and dangerous occupations prepare them for the carnage of the arena or will the house robots make them quake in their boots?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the All-Stars Championship, this heat determines which two robots go through to All-stars grand-final. Veteran robots all enter the arena once again as they put their experience to the test against each other.
