programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E09 | Awkward Silence...
programme.desc: Nothing brings the mood at the table down faster than a sore loser after a bad beat...which is EXACTLY what happens in this episode. The tension is thick at Turning Stone Resort Casino. Featuring Mike Sigel, Bart Hanson, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E10 | Pillow Talk
programme.desc: Joe McKeehen and Tom Canulli square off at our table months ahead of their 2015 WSOP final table show down. Featuring Richard Anthony, Dominick Christiano, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Matt Glantz, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E11 | Turn and Burn
programme.desc: There are some hurt feelings after some big hands in this invite-only cash game from Turning Stone Resort Casino in Verona, NY. Featuring Richard Anthony, Rep Porter, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Mike Dentale, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E12 | Coach Fight
programme.desc: Two prominent poker coaches square off on our table from Turning Stone Resort Casino in Verona, NY. Featuring Richard Anthony, Rep Porter, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Mike Dentale, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E13 | Shots, Shots, Shots
programme.desc: There is an alligator in the parking lot, and Hellmuth's luck runs out at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Jared Jaffee, Sorel Mizzi, Matt Glantz, Alec Torelli, Matt Affleck, Michael Sigel, Ben Tarzia, Jennifer Tilly, Samantha Abernathy, Dan O'Brien, and Phil Hellmuth

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E14 | Hard Knocks At Hard Rock
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly tries to dig herself out of a hole. Featuring Jared Jaffee, Sorel Mizzi, Matt Glantz, Alec Torelli, Matt Affleck, Michael Sigel, Ben Tarzia, Jennifer Tilly, Samanta Abernathy, Dan O'Brien, and Phil Hellmuth

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E15 | Upstuck
programme.desc: Laak and Hellmuth square off, and Jess Dawley shows us the breakfast of champions. Featuring Alec Torelli, Phil Laak, Asher Conniff, Josh Beckley, Abbey Daniels, Joe McKeehen, Phil Hellmuth, Jessica Dawley, Michael Laake, Esther Taylor-Brady, Blake Bohn

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E16 | Phil vs Phil
programme.desc: Laak has good news and bad news for Hellmuth as our cash game winds down at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Alec Torelli, Phil Laak, Asher Conniff, Josh Beckley, Abbey Daniels, Joe McKeehen, Phil Hellmuth, Jessica Dawley, Michael Laake, Esther Taylor-Brady, Blake Bohn

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E17 | The Robot
programme.desc: We bring our invite-only cash game to Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, and a new player calculates the odds. Featuring Matt Glantz, Sam Ganzfried, Dave Eldridge, David Baker, Igor Ioffe, Jennifer Harman, Phil Laak, Dan Wolf, and Jennifer Tilly.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E18 | Claudico: Part 1
programme.desc: We continue our cash game from the Rivers Casino, and we begin the first part of our series featuring the poker playing artificial intelligence named "Claudico". Featuring Matt Glantz, Sam Ganzfried, Dave Eldridge, David Baker, Igor Ioffe, Jennifer Harman, Phil Laak, Dan Wolf, and Jennifer Tilly.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E19 | Claudico: Part 2
programme.desc: Our cash game meanders on at the Rivers Casino, and we show Part 2 of our series featuring the poker-playing artificial intelligence named "Claudico". Featuring Tom Schneider, Dan Wolf, Mike Vierheller, David Baker, Jack Schanbacher, Phil Laak, Igor "Eric" Ioffe, and Mark "Pegasus" Smith

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E20 | Claudico: Part 3
programme.desc: Tom Schneider carpet bombs donkeys, and we conclude our artificial intelligence feature highlighting "Claudico", and advanced poker playing AI. Featuring Tom Schneider, Dan Wolf, Mike Vierheller, David Baker, Jack Schanbacher, Phil Laak, Igor "Eric" Ioffe, and Mark "Pegasus" Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E21 | Carrol Top
programme.desc: We bring our cash game for the first time to Choctaw Resort Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Pros and locals square off, and Jim Carrol has a bag of tricks. Featuring Cate Hall, Brandon Cantu, Todd Brunson, Dennis Phillips, BJ Imejjane, Kage Gardner, George Ritacco, Phil Hellmuth, and Jim Carroll

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E22 | Blind Hands and Props
programme.desc: Our game continues from Choctaw Casino Resort in Durant, Oklahoma, and props fly across the tabe. Featuring Cate Hall, Brandon Cantu, Todd Brunson, Dennis Phillips, BJ Imejjane, Kage Gardner, George Ritacco, Phil Hellmuth, and Jim Carroll

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E23 | Toddler Fight Club
programme.desc: We bring in a new cast of characters to give their best at Choctaw Casino Resort. Featuring Etay Brady, Daphne Turner, Matt Russell, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Phil Hellmuth, Craig Stanley, Gavin Smith, Greg Himmelbrand, and Alec Torelli

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E24 | Rich Friends
programme.desc: We find out why bluffs are like potato chips at Choctaw Resort Casino. Featuring Etay Brady, Daphne Turner, Matt Russell, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Phil Hellmuth, Craig Stanley, Gavin Smith, Greg Himmelbrand, and Alec Torelli

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E25 | Face Up With Phil Hellmuth: Part 1
programme.desc: Texahoma Hold'em at its best from Choctaw Casino Resort. Also, we go deep with Phil Hellmuth in our first ever interview segment called Face Up. Featuring Nelda Escamilla, Alec Torelli, Phil Hellmuth, Todd Brunson, Dany George, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Gavin Smith, Jason Ettredge, and Cate Hall

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E26 | Face Up With Phil Hellmuth: Part 2
programme.desc: Texahoma locals show our pros a few tricks. Also, we conclude our first ever Face Up interview with Phil Hellmuth. Featuring Nelda Escamilla, Alec Torelli, Phil Hellmuth, Todd Brunson, Dany George, Brandon Cantu, Roger Sippl, Gavin Smith, Jason Ettredge, and Cate Hall

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E27 | Our 100th Episode!
programme.desc: We head back to Seminole Hard Rock Casino in Hollywood, Florida with a few of our favorite poker players. Some of them wake up with good hands, but others are stuck in a chip nightmare. Featuring Ian O'hara, Stewart Newman, Phil Laak, Mukul Pahuja, Phil Hellmuth, Alec Torelli, David Silverman, Jeff Gross, Matt Seidman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E28 | Shades vs Goggles
programme.desc: Seminole Hard Rock Casino in Hollywood, FL hosts our cash game while the players test out different eyewear at the table. Featuring Ian O'hara, Stewart Newman, Phil Laak, Noah Schwartz, Phil Hellmuth, Alec Torelli, David Silverman, Jeff Gross, Matt Seidman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E29 | Kentucky Fried Poker
programme.desc: We head to Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA where our very own Chris Hanson becomes an honorary Kentucky Colonel. Plus, our crew tells the harrowing tale of #GroundPizza. Featuring Matt Glantz, Chris Horter, Mark Smith, Phil Laak, Dave Eldridge, Jennifer Harman, Tom Schneider

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E30 | Attack Of The Yinzers
programme.desc: The locals in Pittsburgh show the pros how its done from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Jennifer Tilly, Chris Horter, Nick Immekus, David Baker, Dan Wolf, Jennifer Harman, Jason Andrews, Dave Eldridge, Matt Glantz, Phil Laak, Tom Schneider, Mark Smith

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E31 | Down In The Valley
programme.desc: Poker Night in America makes its first visit to Thunder Valley Casino Resort just outside of Sacramento, CA. Featuring Mark Kroon, Maria Ho, Scott Ball, Phil Hellmuth, Alan Richardson, Lorrie Corvin, Mike Ross

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E32 | A Toast To Good Fortune
programme.desc: We continue our cash game from Thunder Valley Casino Resort, and as individual chip fortunes rise and fall some players realize their good fortune overall. Featuring Rep Porter, Maria Ho, Scott Ball, Phil Hellmuth, Alan Richardson, Bart Hanson, Mike Ross

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E33 | Billionaire Besties
programme.desc: Some of Phil Hellmuth's best friends from Silicon Valley join our table at Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring Anthony Pagan, Jason Calacanis, David Baker, Phil Hellmuth, Tom West, Chamath Palihapitiya, Taylor Paur

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E34 | Money Buys Happiness
programme.desc: The poker action is non-stop, and so are the name drops from Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring Matt Glantz, Jason Calicanis, David Baker, Phil Hellmuth, Bob Mather, Chamath Palihapitiya, Bart Hanson, Anthony Pagan, Maria Ho, Taylor Paur, Tom West

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E35 | California Cooler
programme.desc: The stakes heat up as the night winds down at Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring JC Tran, Mike Ross, Mark Bonsack, Phil Hellmuth, Keith Bowman, Bart Hanson, David Baker

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E36 | Favorite Poker Ho
programme.desc: We conclude the poker from our first visit to NorCal and Thunder Valley Casino Resort. Featuring Mike Ross, Mark Kroon, JC Tran, Doug Lorgeree, Bart Hanson, David Baker, Maria Ho, Phil Hellmuth, Keith Bowman, Mark Bonsack

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E37 | Sleeveless In Paradise
programme.desc: We film cash game poker in the Paradise Live stage at the Seminole Hard Rock Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Paul Harris, Jake Schindler, Samantha Abernathy, Mike Dentale, Mike Sigel, Joe DiPascale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E38 | Mike Check
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly meets a bunch of Mikes at our cash game table from the Paradise Live stage at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Greg Marcus, Alex Rocha, Michael Laake, Jennifer Tilly, Mike Dentale, Mike Sigel, Joe DiPascale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E39 | The One That Got Away
programme.desc: From Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida, Vanessa Rousso makes her first appearance on Poker Night along with some regulars to the show. Featuring Phil Laak, Vanessa Rousso, Matt Affleck, Jared Jaffee, Noah Schwartz, Alan Richardson, Glynn Beebe

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E40 | Straight Shooter
programme.desc: Phil Laak puts his chips in with "delicate, consistent, well-appointed strength" from Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Mukul Pahuja, Matt Salsberg, Matt Affleck, Phil Laak, Dan Shak, Esther Taylor, Asher Conniff

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E41 | Ladies Night III
programme.desc: Back by popular demand, we invited just the ladies to Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida, for a night of poker with considerably less body hair around the table. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E42 | Ace Race
programme.desc: Ladies Night III continues from Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E01 | Face Up With Jennifer Tilly
programme.desc: We showcase cash game action from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Plus, we do our first in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Jennifer Tilly, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Maria Ho, Jason Andrews, Griffin Abel, Dave Eldrige

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E02 | Any Two Cards
programme.desc: Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA hosts our cash game while our invited pros start to play a little loose. Also, we show Part 2 of our in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Matt Brady, Alec Torelli, Jennifer Tilly, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Daniel Wolf, Dave Eldridge, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jason Andrews

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E03 | The Rivers of Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Our pros go all the way to the river in our exclusive cash game from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Patsy Altomari, Alec Torelli, Keith Morrow, Jennifer Tilly, Daniel Wolf, Matt Glantz, Griffin Abel

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E04 | The Wizard
programme.desc: Misty morning, clouds in the sky, without warning, the wizard walks by our cash game at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Featuring Claude Petroy, Alec Torelli, Keith Morrow, Jennifer Tilly, Daniel Wolf, Stepan Gusak, Griffin Abel, Patsy Altomari, Matt Glantz

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E05 | Where There's Smoke...
programme.desc: We visit the poker room at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA, and rub elbows with some of the East Coast's most notable players. Featuring Greg Fishberg, Todd Brunson, Matt Glantz, Linda Kenney Baden, Mark Herm, Joe McKeehen, and Gajan Jeganathan

programme.title: Scott Martin Challenge

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: Strong fish concentrations appearing on the MARC VI's Simrad (simrad-yachting.com) encourage George and Scott Wenzel (4reel-charters.com) to drift over a deep, Islamorada, Florida Keys (fla-keys.com) wreck. Lowering live baits, they score a trophy class yellow jack. An occasional catch while bottom fishing, yellow jacks are hard-fighting and coveted table fare.

programme.title: Sport Fishing TV

programme.title: OA Shorts - Fishing
programme.desc: Outdoor America's Shorts brings you fast paced fishing combined with behind the scenes access showcasing both fan favorites along with up-and-coming personalities.

programme.title: In Fisherman
programme.sub-title: Terrific Times On Ice & Open Water
programme.desc: The In-Fisherman staff keeps it hip and happy-happy, as they fish a world-class fly-in destination for magnum pike and lake trout, go with soft secrets precision drifted for winter steelhead, and take you on a road trip for the ages for Mississippi crappies and coastal redfish.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Join James Lindner and Jeff Simpson on a Sunset Country adventure to Savant Lake, Ontario for lakers, walleyes, and pike.

programme.title: MUSKY HUNTER
programme.desc: Green Bay, Wisconsin, is home to the largest muskies in the heart of musky country. It’s a classic case of big water and big muskies, but it’s never easy. Jim Saric and Pro Guide Bret Alexander engage in a summer trophy hunt on “The Bay”.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: The only thing standing in Dave Lefebre's way for a second UMF title is veteran pro Mark Rose.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.sub-title: Bassin' Small Lake: Too Much Cover
programme.desc: Bassmaster elite angler Joey Cifuentes and Steve fish a small lake and learn quickly that it fishes much bigger than expected.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Is It a Weedeater? No, a Buzz N' Toad!
programme.desc: Bill fishes a topwater lure that can make your heart pound while causing big bass to go on a surface-breaking, feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Scott Martin Challenge
programme.desc: Bass Challenge in Ticonderoga for Lake Champion bragging rights.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.sub-title: Vertical Jigging with Hair Jigs for Illinois River Sauger
programme.desc: Jake Romanack joins forces with tournament pro Mike Hanson to target mid- winter Sauger on the Illinois River

programme.title: Scott Martin Challenge
programme.desc: Bass Challenge in Ticonderoga for Lake Champion bragging rights.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Joe Mantegna takes an in-depth look at the most successful machine gun ever made. John Browning's massive .50 Cal M2 heavy machine gun.

programme.title: Shootout Lane
programme.desc: Lena takes the family on a punishing winter high-mountain shooting adventure while enlisting alpine shooting specialist Lanny Barnes.

programme.title: Shooting USA
programme.desc: This time, it's Precision Rifle Competition, but with .22s. It's the PRS Rim-Fire Finale, the competition that opens up Precision Shooting to more competitors without the cost of centerfire and without the need for a thousand-yard range. Plus, the story of the US Army's iconic M-60 machine gun that is now one of History's Guns. Then, it's the test of fitness and marksmanship under physical duress at the Tactical Games National Championship.

programme.title: The Gunfather
programme.desc: The Tuminaro family traditions are passed down when Lou helps Little Louie start working on his new 10/22. Theresa’s favorite charity gets a boost and the boys face a little competition when Pop’s friend Patrick and his son come to town for a visit.

programme.title: Handguns & Defensive Weapons TV
programme.desc: Rich, Kourtney, Scott and guest Keith Wood go beyond the basics to tackle advanced shooting techniques that could help people prevail in a gunfight.

programme.title: American Airgunner Challenge
programme.desc: Shooting a target is tough when it's connected to a drone, but what happens when YOU'RE the one moving?

programme.title: The Sporting Chef
programme.desc: Chef Jay Veregge returns in this Sporting Chef kitchen take-over. Joining him are the usual cast of characters, and Buddy T!

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet
programme.desc: Bradley and his family celebrate Kodiak’s native history by offering an extreme catering experience to local Alutiiq tribes.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.sub-title: Bassin' Small Lake: Too Much Cover
programme.desc: Bassmaster elite angler Joey Cifuentes and Steve fish a small lake and learn quickly that it fishes much bigger than expected.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: Jon, Gary and Coby return to Naples, Florida this trip, and this time the guys are going to be diving some of the mysterious "Florida Holes" off the coast. Each hole varies in size, and according to researchers they likely formed 8,000 - 10,000 years ago, and are home to an abundance of diverse plants and animals.

programme.title: DOA's Family Ties
programme.desc: Nothing better than getting on the water with friends. Capt Ed and Capt Jamie join their South Texas buddy Capt Luis Flandes for a fun South Padre day on the water.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.sub-title: Largemouth and Smallmouth on Lake Pepin, WI
programme.desc: Honda Marine's John Lunde and Ray Brazier join Ben and Charlie as they catch both smallmouth and largemouth in beautiful western Wisconsin on Lake Pepin.

programme.title: Two Conchs Sport Fishing TV
programme.desc: Captain Jack's joined by client Scott Heinz this week and his two sons, Hudson and Hunter, for an action-packed day out on the water. While the Heinz Brothers aren't new to fishing at all, they wanted to come down to The Keys and put their fishing experience to the test by pulling in huge tuna out in the gulf. And what better way to end a great day of fishing than with a homemade sushi feast?

programme.title: Euronews Italiano
programme.desc: Euronews è l'unico canale internazionale con una prospettiva davvero europea. La nostra missione è quella di permettere a ciascuno di farsi una propria opinione presentando, con imparzialità, tutti i diversi punti di vista.

programme.title: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
programme.sub-title: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
programme.desc: On this week's show, we're gonna be talking about some timely fishing techniques for fishing in the heat of summer. programme.desc: Some of the best Sportfishing in the world takes place in Costa Rica. Especially out of a village named Nosara. The Nosara area is far from commercial fishing lanes and off tourists' beaten paths and is a best kept secret fishing and surfing destination. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we fish for Tuna, Billfish, and Dorado.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran James Turner
programme.sub-title: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran James Turner

All the action will take place on Lake Vänern, the 3rd largest lake in Europe, with anglers targeting pike and perch over three days of high-level competition. Stay tuned to see which kayak angler will come out on top!

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Mastering Crappie Fishing: Tips for Landing Big Slabs
programme.desc: In this action-packed video, we not only showcase the thrill of reeling in monster crappies but also share invaluable tips and techniques to enhance your chances of landing that trophy-sized catch. From selecting the right bait to understanding the behavior of crappies in winter conditions, we cover it all to help you become a more successful ice angler. - Watch closely as we demonstrate how the picker boat revolutionizes ice fishing, allowing us to explore untouched fishing grounds with precision and safety.

programme.title: Hobie Fishing - Kayak Fishing for Albies on Cape Cod
programme.sub-title: Hobie Fishing - Kayak Fishing for Albies on Cape Cod
programme.desc: Got Albies? A kayak is perfect for chasing these line screaming speed machines around as they boil up on schools of micro bait. Can you think of a more stealthy wait to target these finicky fish? On the tail end of this show we catch up with fly fishing legend, Lefty Kreh, and talk about the good ol’ days on back bay circa 1950 catching largemouth bass, and then we test it out ourselves from our Hobies.

programme.title: Painting The Town S2 E6 -- Amsterdam
programme.sub-title: Painting The Town S2 E6 -- Amsterdam
programme.desc: Frolic in the tulip fields with Eric Dowdle as he gets hands-on with Amsterdam and discovers what binds this unique city together.

programme.title: Bobby's Kitchen Basics Episode 7
programme.desc: Stop paying outrageous prices for keto-friendly condiments! We will show you how to make your own keto-friendly Ketchup, BBQ sauce, and Mayonnaise!

programme.title: Bobby's Kitchen Basics Episode 8
programme.desc: We have a couple of ketogenic meal prep recipes for you that are low carb and high in protein and healthy fat: Lamb Shoulder Chops and Stuffed Pork Chops.

programme.title: Food Challenges Episode 38
programme.desc: If you want to win your own food contests, let me tell you the tips and tricks. This video will get you ready for any pasta or burger challenges you want to take on.

programme.title: Food Challenges -- Season 1 Ep6
programme.desc: It is time for a team eating challenge! Nothing is more fun than friends trying to take down a food challenge, especially when it is the Gut Buster Pizza Challenge.

programme.title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Ice Fishing In A Hot Tent With A Woodstove on the Night of the Supermoon
programme.sub-title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Ice Fishing In A Hot Tent With A Woodstove on the Night of the Supermoon
programme.desc: We travel to a frozen lake, set up a snowtrekker hot tent, chop firewood for the cold night, and auger holes in the ice so we can ice fish, all while experiencing camping in a supermoon.

programme.title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Bushcraft Camp With my dog Part 1
programme.sub-title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Bushcraft Camp With my dog Part 1
programme.desc: Come along with my dog, Scout and I as we hike through the forest in a Canadian winter, I carry a backpack with enough camping and bushcraft gear for the 2 of us to camp out overnight under a tarp.

programme.title: Goodtaste With Tanji -- Episode 3
programme.desc: Its a feast for your eyes and your taste buds at Brennans of Houston with its wingback chairs and Cajun cuisine -- at the top of its game for more than 40 years. Then, uptown eats in the middle of nowhere at Garden Company Marketplace & Caf, along with Latin-inspired seafood from Alcomar in Austin.

programme.title: Goodtaste With Tanji -- Episode 4
programme.desc: Sail away with us to Salt Traders in Round Rock for Chef Jack Gilmores sensational seafood and chowder fries. Then old-world eats from a courageous Olympic rower at Little Gretel in Boene, along with too cool for school burgers from Bernies Burger Bus.

programme.title: Boonie Bears To The Rescue
programme.desc: The Brother Bears and Logger Vick discover a baby girl lost in their sprawling forest and undergo a chaotic crash course in infant care. But bad guys are on the trail of this mystery baby so the trio must team up to get her home safely.

programme.title: Family Kitchen Revival -- Life is Kosher
programme.sub-title: Family Kitchen Revival -- Life is Kosher
programme.desc: A truly inspiring immigrant story, Hagit asks Chef Jonathan Scinto to prepare a special meal for her daughters who’ve stayed by her side and inspired her to keep going through the most difficult times in her life.

programme.title: Eight Days Episode 8 - The process of healing
programme.sub-title: Eight Days Episode 8 - The process of healing
programme.desc: Dr.Tonny has a big talk a theclinic, Janine and Nicole have great treatment day while the otherguests have a great day at the house.

programme.title: Making A Chef S2 Ep9 -- Return of the Baker
programme.sub-title: Making A Chef S2 Ep9 -- Return of the Baker
programme.desc: Mark tries his hand at baking again, this time making croissants and king cake. Is king cake good year around? What to use for filling?

programme.title: Making A Chef S1 Ep6 -- Cook Outside The Box
programme.sub-title: Making A Chef S1 Ep6 -- Cook Outside The Box
programme.desc: Pasta is one of Marks favorite foods. He gets a lesson in pasta-making from Chef Dillon Han of the City Bagel Cafe and Italian Bistro. Back in the kitchen, Mark prepares ravioli from scratch to help prevent his brother from eating pasta from a blue box.

programme.title: Hard Knocks Fighting -- Fighter Profile: Dylan Schellenberg
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks Fighting -- Fighter Profile: Dylan Schellenberg
programme.desc: Dylan Schellenberg is a dedicated amateur fighter with a great attitude.

programme.title: Hard Knocks Fighting -- Fighter Profile: Colton Boxell
programme.sub-title: Hard Knocks Fighting -- Fighter Profile: Colton Boxell
programme.desc: Colton Boxell gives us an inside view of his intensive training routine. Colton is an experienced BJJ fighter and wrestler.

programme.title: Painting The Town S2 E7 -- St. Augustine
programme.sub-title: Painting The Town S2 E7 -- St. Augustine
programme.desc: Join Eric Dowdle as he uncovers how St. Augustine has historically defended itself from foreign invaders...and from Florida gators.

programme.title: Painting The Town S2 E8 -- Park City
programme.sub-title: Painting The Town S2 E8 -- Park City
programme.desc: Join Eric Dowdle as he unearths Park Citys summertime magic and the small mining town roots that boomed into a mountain resort.

programme.title: Bobby's Kitchen Basics Episode 9
programme.desc: First we show you a low calorie spaghetti squash recipe. Later we show you 5 easy to make meal prep recipes for weight loss.

programme.title: Bobby's Kitchen Basics Episode 10
programme.desc: In this episode, we feature keto approved meal preps that are big on flavor! First we show you a low carb burrito bowl. Later we show you a recipe for a Mexican tater tot casserole.

programme.title: Food Challenges Episode 4
programme.desc: Check out a few of the toughest eating challenges in this episode. Do you think I can eat the 15 egg omelet? Don’t worry, not only do I take on the challenges, I will also teach you how to win!

programme.title: Food Challenges Episode 5
programme.desc: Do you think banana splits are just for kids? Not with the Goliath Banana Split challenge I take on in this episode! I’ll also check out the burrito challenge and “commissioner” sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Bushcraft Camp With My Dog Part 2
programme.sub-title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Bushcraft Camp With My Dog Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a 3 part Series of me camping with Scout, my dog. See me camp out under a tarp with my dog in the winter time.

programme.title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Bushcraft Camp With My Dog Part 3
programme.sub-title: Joe Robinet -- Overnight Winter Bushcraft Camp With My Dog Part 3
programme.desc: Part 3 of a 3 part series of me camping with my dog Scout. I cook steak on a rock, have fireside chats, and tear down my camp.

programme.title: Goodtaste With Tanji -- Episode 6
programme.desc: Eating healthy doesnt have to be a drag at Austins Picnik with Butter Coffee and healthy remakes of your favorite food. Then, a dessert destination at Rails a Caf in Kerrville, plus killer morning grub at The Breakfast Klub in Houston.

programme.title: Goodtaste With Tanji -- Episode 2
programme.desc: Head to the sensational and seasonally inspired Supper in San Antonio at the historic Pearl and then to Austin for lunch at the award-winning Odd Duck. Then, dinner is served at The Original Ninfas in Houston, where the fajita is said to have been created.

programme.title: Nessie And Me
programme.desc: A 9-year-old boy moves to a lakeside village and befriends a captain who claims a mythical sea creature named Nessie lives in their peaceful waters. When Nessie proves to be real, the boy embarks on a special mission to save the town from a corporate villain and prove that anything is possible if you just believe.

programme.title: The Hairy Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: When Lucia loses a tooth, her dad tells the story of the Hairy Tooth Fairy, a mouse named Perez who collects kids' teeth and polishes them into pearls. But when Perez comes for Lucia's tooth, he's kidnapped by bandits who are after his pearly fortune. Lucia, with the help of her cousin Ramiro - disobeying her parents and not measuring the consequences will try to rescue Perez unleashing a fascinating adventure that will prove that you don't have to be a kid to believe

programme.title: Family Kitchen Revival -- Life is Kosher
programme.sub-title: Family Kitchen Revival -- Life is Kosher

programme.title: Play To Win
programme.desc: If you thought you knew everything about #PlayToWin...get ready for a wild ride! This one is POWERFUL. Have tissues close by!

programme.title: The Big Flipping Break

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: John Assaraf, with cameo appearances by with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, Blaine Bartlett, and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Sparsh Shah, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Professor Robert Thurman, the preeminent scholar and interpreter of Tibetan Buddhist philosophy for the modern world, who believes that Wisdom is Bliss and in fact, that’s the name of his latest book. Thurman is a very close friend of HH Dalai Lama and today he discusses deep ideas about mindfulness and presence and leads us on a joyful exploration into the nature of reality through Buddha’s threefold curriculum.

programme.title: The Inspiration Show
programme.sub-title: How To Find Spiritual Fulfillment with Kevin Hancock
programme.desc: Kevin shares how he went from a stressed executive to a spiritually-fulfilled leader, and the unique and inspiring force that led him to his there.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Restaurant owner Eldridge Williams takes center stage, seeking $750,000 to propel his beloved establishment, The Delta, to new heights. With a vibrant personality and a deep passion for hospitality, Eldridge shares his journey from Memphis to Chicago, where he crafted The Delta's unique ambiance inspired by the Mississippi Delta's culture. Despite facing challenges, including the impact of COVID-19 on revenue, Eldridge's vision for scalability shines through, anchored by his signature dish, tamales.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: John and Chelsea Jubilee from Energized Health seek $1 million to grow their thriving health business. With their unique scientific protocol targeting intracellular hydration, they aim to address the root cause of illness and disease. As the panel examines the intricacies of their business, including financials and expansion plans, concerns emerge regarding the practicality of rapid scaling, leading to a concentrated discussion on optimizing cash flow and enhancing profitability within the existing framework through marketing refinement and potential subscription models.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.desc: Having a tough time lately? Join host Lisa Garr as she speaks with beloved poet, teacher, and storyteller, Mark Nepo. Today Mark shares his insight from his latest work, “The Book of the Soul” and shares how crisis can wake us up to opportunity. Info: marknepo.com.

programme.title: The Inspiration Show
programme.sub-title: Can Men Be Spiritual And Masculine? With Arjuna Ardagh
programme.desc: Arjuna Ardagh shares how his project ‘Conscious Men’ helps enhance men's masculinity and spiritual fulfillment so they can lead better lives.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Phil Fogarty, owner of PSA Security, discusses his business struggles and funding needs with Joe Camberato, CEO of National Business Capital. Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions
programme.desc: Chad Honeycutt, owner and CEO of Evidence-Based Classroom Solutions, pitches his business. Chad discusses how his company addresses the deficit in evidence-based services for students with disabilities, particularly autism and emotional disabilities, in public schools. Despite significant revenue growth, Chad seeks investment due to cash flow challenges, primarily caused by delays in insurance reimbursements. The panel expresses concerns about profitability and the need for clearer communication about the company's mission.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Phil Fogarty, owner of PSA Security, discusses his business struggles and funding needs with Joe Camberato, CEO of National Business Capital. Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Kids of Valor Academy
programme.desc: Mona Jackson, owner of Kids of Valor Academy, seeks funding of $600,000 to support her childcare business, which currently operates four locations. Mona shares her inspiring journey, highlighting her commitment to providing affordable childcare in urban areas, driven by her own experiences as a teen mother. She plans to expand her academy to seven locations and aims to create a safe haven for women leaving domestic violence situations. Mona discusses her revenue, profitability, and organizational structure, emphasizing her all-female management team and the positive impact she aims to make in her community.

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Sun protection and Sunscreens with Dr. Deborah Longwill, Horse therapy to work through relationships with Dr. Shelley Green, Understanding Addiction with Dan Simmons

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Steve Perez pitches his business, Invisishield, which specializes in automotive accessories for OEMs and dealerships. Facing cash flow challenges exacerbated by multiple merchant cash advances, Perez seeks funding to consolidate debt, purchase materials, and acquire equipment.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: John Comack, owner of Green Energy Technology, a company specializing in EV charging stations, seeks funding to expand his business. With a vision for growth and a turnkey solution approach, John impresses the panel with his strategic mindset and grasp of the market.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Dan Notartomaso seeks $650,000 in funding for his companies, Peak Custom Construction and Oak and Iron Design Co. As Dan unveils his unique niche in high-end home remodels catering to professional athletes, the panel of experts delve into his ambitious plans and financial challenges. With rapid growth during the pandemic, Dan grapples with cash flow issues and the need for strategic investment.

programme.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
programme.sub-title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
programme.desc: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Mother-daughter duo Tosha Wright and Lisa Dunnigan from Teach Your Heart Out seek $600,000 in funding to propel their educational conference business to new heights. With a mission to rejuvenate and empower educators nationwide, they share their inspiring journey and ambitious plans with the panel of experts. Despite facing challenges such as the impact of COVID-19 on educational conferences and the need for strategic expansion, Tosha and Lisa impress with their passion and dedication to their cause.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Dr. Don Wood, CEO and founder of the Inspired Performance Institute, seeks funding to scale his groundbreaking trauma resolution program. With a mission to revolutionize mental health treatment, Dr. Wood's program, TIPP, boasts a remarkable 90% success rate in alleviating post-traumatic stress, anxiety, and depression. Rooted in his personal journey to save his daughter from chronic illness, Dr. Wood's method resets the mind's response to trauma, yielding rapid and lasting results in just four hours. Despite financial challenges, Dr. Wood's vision to reach millions drives his pursuit of strategic partnerships and media exposure, highlighting the transformative potential of his innovative approach to healing.

programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
programme.desc: HOPE IS HERE features inspiring and uplifting, relevant and refreshing, personal stories told by cancer survivors, their families, and the loved ones of those who lost the fight against this “emperor of all maladies” and sparked a movement that gives added meaning to their lives. programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2

Jill's fighting spirit and her desire to help find a cure and eradicate the stigma that only smokers contracted the disease would eventually define her legacy.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: The Montana adventure continues on private lakes targeting trophy trout. This is where fish stories are born.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny meets up with Jeff Coffee of ZOE angling group to talk shop, tie flies and fish in one of the most biodiverse lakes in the country.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny meets up with Chef Dave in the Golden Ilse to target Reds and Trout. Then head to Halyards to cook the catch.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny tries his hand at the seine net to catch some shrimp. Then meets up with Chef Dave to cook up some amazing Shrimp and Grits. After, Travel to Jekyll Island for the Shrimp and Grits Festival.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our college chapters. Hudson has been a long time member of TTHA as well as serving with the Texas A&M Chapter. We have a great time at G2 in pursuit of Axis deer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Over the years we have been able to hunt with a lot of amazing people. This episode takes us to Las Palmas ranch to hunt with Payton Angelle. Payton was awarded this hunt from the amazing people over at Sky High for kids.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they chase Whitetails at Morrow Ranch. This is a hunt that they had purchased earlier at the Disabled Outdoorsman in the year to be able to spend some time in the woods. A few days away to relax and spend quality time with loved ones should always be a priority. Morrow Ranch is definitely a go to place for low fence Texas hunting.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: WE join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father of 5. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable. Bobby has an action packed 2 day hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: This spring, our crew was able to dive into some turkey hunting at the G2 ranch with long time TTHA Members Mike Reeber and Dan Marcasol. After a slow start, the crew was finally able to connect on a great Rio Tom and a few hogs. Learning and sharing the stories of TTHA members is something we strive to do each year.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Six Mile Hill Ranch in Crowell, TX plays host to our TTHA Crew this week while we learn how Courtney Shaheen grew up in the outdoors and ultimately pursued her career as a Taxidermist. Courtney shares her path to becoming a world class taxidermist with Double Nickel Taxidermy and she even gets to take her biggest buck to date with the Six Mile Hill crew!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Josh Kinser from Big and J introduced his daughters to hunting throughout South TX. With trips earlier in the year cancelled, Josh and Hattie were invited to join the TTHA crew at G2 ranch. The first night of the hunt proved to be a success for Hattie, wrapping a TX tag around her biggest buck. Josh and Hattie will have memories to last a lifetime after this hunt!

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.sub-title: "In a Camp Down by the River"
programme.desc: The Duck Camp Dinners crew leaves the bayous and heads down river to Venice, Louisiana where they prepare for their first duck hunt in the delta.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Blake shares a family recipe with the DCD crew, Jean-Paul smokes ducks, and the crew heads out on a wild boar hunt in the marshes surrounding Venice.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: The DCD crew spends a day on the water fishing in an effort to complete the trifecta of a meat haul. Blake shows us where he spent much of his childhood and we get a glimpse of mother natures impact on community.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Jean-Paul breaks off from the crew to hunt a grit pile with a father son duo and sees first hand that it truly takes a village to feed everyone at their camp. We go on an airboat tour to discover what the state is doing to preserve our coast for future generations of hunters and wildlife.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: The Duck Camp Dinners crew is back in the bayous as Jean-Paul wraps up his last hung of the season before his son is born. Jean-Paul shares a duck recipe handed down by his father, they forage for wild mushrooms, get into swarms of blue wing teal and celebrate the season with fire.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Not my first trip to Texas, but my first chance to get a Texas buck did not disappoint on this trip. What started off as just a waterfowl photography shoot turned into an opportunity for me to grab a buck tag/license. No fence, low fence, or high fence…. Texas has some great hunting! There isn’t too many warm whitetail hunts that can be me excited but bonus hunts will get me every time!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: In this episode, John returns to Colorado and looks to connect with another archery velvet mule deer. With a great week of weather ahead, there should be plenty of stalk opportunities!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: John heads up to Saskatchewan to chase whitetails with BBD Outfitters. After some luck early in the week, an opportunity of a lifetime to take a moose is just a trigger pull away! John’s friend Leslie, former Marine, and catfish angler is up to bat first as she checks off a whitetail buck and moose herself in this loaded episode! You don’t know cold until it hits negative 33.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: With the Iowa Late Muzzleloader season almost over and a thick snow covering, hopes of filling “one more tag” were up in the air. A second chance at redemption was offered on an awesome 6.5 year old Iowa buck. Cold temps, food plots, and a favorable wind can be just the things needed to fill a late season tag.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: After receiving an invite to hunt mule deer in Colorado from a buddy, I jumped at the opportunity. My first time ever hunting Colorado did not disappoint. Spot/stalk on the ground with a bow will always be the most challenging, humbling, and sometimes rewarding ways to hunt. My reward... a first ever velvet Colorado Mule Deer!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: A last minute trip was added to the schedule when an opportunity to join the Rise Fishing Co crew in Andros Island for Bonefish and Barracuda. I started fly fishing a few years ago but this is the first time out in the open and dealing with ocean wind for the elusive Bones! Of all forms of fishing, this is for sure the closest thing I’ve matched to spot/stalk archery.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Spring turkey is here! John sets his sights on chasing gobblers in Iowa and after notching the first tag, it’s time to head back to Kentucky. John grew up in the Bluegrass state and doesn’t get to hunt or visit as much as he’d like but after this season, he’s reminded why it’s important to return back home and keep that hunting camaraderie alive and well!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Usually my summers are filled with trail cameras, food plots, and prepping for the whitetail season. This year I actually got ahead of the game and was able to carve out a week to go try some new hunting…. Bowfishing! I love to shoot bows and I love to fish, why not do them both at the same time?! It took awhile to get dialed in, but once I learned the refraction of the water & lights, thing heat up fast!

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation
programme.desc: Mathews - a name that is virtually synonymous with accuracy and quality in the archery world. Join us as we follow along with product engineer Mark Hayes and VP of Sales & Marketing Brad Treu to take a look inside the process that makes each and every Mathews something best-in-class and gives the shooter the best experience.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation
programme.desc: Today, the Bosque Del Oso State Wildlife Area boasts 30,000 acres of prime hunting opportunity, stellar elk winter range and some of the biggest bruiser bull elk in all of Colorado. Rewind to the mid-1990s, and that same land in the Upper Purgatoire River basin almost ended up a subdivided mess. Thanks to decisive action carried out by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation, Colorado Parks and Wildlife and others, the landscape remained intact and even today is available for all to access and enjoy.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike Anderson links up with Capt. Steven Crowder of - Madness Charters to catch sheepshead and redfish.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Ozzie Lessinger and Capt. Mike Anderson head out of - South Seas Resort for an inshore slam.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Cody Chivas takes Capt. Mike offshore for a mixed - catch of SWFL fish.

programme.sub-title: Kevin Hart, Kristen Bell, Michael Strahan, Bob Saget, and Danica Patrick

programme.title: Entrepreneur Elevator Pitch

programme.title: The Rise and Rise of Bitcoin
programme.desc: A computer programmer becomes fascinated with the digital currency Bitcoin, and through his involvement in the Bitcoin community, we learn about the impending global impact of this amazing new technology.

programme.title: Financialization of Water
programme.desc: Around the world, demand for water is exploding.

programme.title: The True Cost
programme.desc: The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

programme.title: Unknown Tax Havens
programme.desc: Exposing the secret world of unknown tax havens, a global network of tax-free storage facilities with art and goods for the super-rich - unknown, until now. Freeports at highest security levels. This investigates who's using them, and why.

programme.title: The Street Food Hype
programme.desc: Gourmet sandwiches, salads, cakes and also ethnic cuisine, fried fish, ribs or spleen: these are just some of the recipes offered by the army of four-wheeled chefs that fill the streets.

programme.title: German Dynasties - The Thyssens
programme.desc: The name is a myth. But not only heavy industry, exquisite art and immeasurable wealth are associated with it.

programme.title: Zeitgeist - Addendum
programme.desc: Zeitgeist: Addendum attempts to locate the root causes of the pervasive social corruption, while also offering a solution. This solution is not based on politics, morality, laws, or any other "establishment" notions of human affairs, but rather on a modern, non-superstitious based understanding of what we are and how we align with nature, to which we are a part of. The work advocates a new social system which is updated to present day knowledge, highly influenced by the life long work of Jacque Fresco and The Venus Project.

programme.title: The Economy of Tomorrow
programme.desc: The future is uncertain and full of challenges. How do we rescue our cities and tackle inequalities? How do we deal with an aging future and bridging the gender gap? It's time for some forward thinking.

programme.title: The Bitcoin Dilemma
programme.desc: This Documentary delivers a new installment of the latest developments in Cryptocurrencies, NFT's and DeFi. Created by Futurist and Filmmaker Ian Khan, the Bitcoin Dilemma interviews some of the world's most prolific technology and finance leaders to help understand the future.

programme.title: Most Powerful Bankers - EP 1
programme.desc: About the business savvy bankers of the financial world.

programme.title: Most Powerful Bankers - EP 2
programme.desc: About the business savvy bankers of the financial world.

programme.title: The Spider's Web: Britain's Second Empire
programme.desc: How Britain transformed from an imperial power to a financial power.

programme.title: Sparkling: The Story of Champagne
programme.desc: A love letter to the joys and pleasures of champagne.

programme.title: End Game - Technology
programme.desc: An investigation into the advancements in digital technology unique to the gaming industry. They can either enhance our lives and make the world a better place to live, or we may find ourselves in a dystopian future where we are ruled and controlled by the very technologies we rely on.

programme.title: Self-Made Inc.
programme.desc: This documentary profiles four individuals who have turned themselves into self-made celebrities and business giants.

programme.title: The Story of Maserati
programme.desc: Filmmaker Philip Selkirk examines the history of the Maserati automobile.

programme.title: Fintech Made in Switzerland
programme.desc: FinTech Made in Switzerland is the first documentary about the rapidly growing FinTech movement in Switzerland.

programme.title: Jackpot Winners and Lottery Curses
programme.desc: In the United States, nearly 80 billion lotto tickets and scratch-off cards are sold every year. Overnight, these winners find themselves in charge of an astronomical fortune and at the center of the limelight. A third of winners end up in ruins.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: GWR Incredible Record Breakers
programme.desc: Guinness World Records presents Incredible Record Breakers from all over.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Diners Drive-ins and Dives All San Diego, All the time
programme.sub-title: Diners Drive-ins and Dives All San Diego, All the time

programme.title: 123GO!
programme.sub-title: Amazing 3D Pen Hacks and DIY Jewelry Mini Decor
programme.desc: Do you like 3D pen and hot glue crafts? This video is exactly for you then! Here you can find a lot of fantastic 3D pen and hot glue ideas, DIY hacks and artistic crafts.

programme.sub-title: Breaking 100 Rules In 24 Hours || Sneak Candy Everywhere!

programme.title: 123GO!
programme.sub-title: Giga Expensive Vs Cheap Hacks For Future Parents
