programme.title: 123GO!
programme.sub-title: Viral Life Hacks And Smart Tricks For Parents!
programme.desc: Sometimes, our parents don't like change. But with these handy gadgets, life can be a whole a lot easier. What was your favourite gadget and why?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt... With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogapatra, the hideous, bloated, vulgar Queen of the Nile, cannot get to sleep and this causes huge bags under her eyes. Her beauty recipe requires squeezing sleep from Lazy Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy brings a Fuzzle back to the Smurf village where the tiny, loveable creature multiplies and threatens to eat the new dam. Harmony plays his music and the entranced Fuzzles march back into the woods where they attach themselves to an unsuspecting Gargamel.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: Handy's Window-Vision
programme.desc: Miner Smurf leaves no stone unturned and this is how he discovers a crystal that transmits images. Thus Handy is able to invent window-vision and, every morning from then on, the Smurfs are able to watch Hefty's workouts, Farmer Smurf's crop reports or even the Brainy Smurf Hour. But would you believe it? The evil wizard Gargamel takes advantage of this image-watching to catch Smurfs!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Magic Sack Of Mr Nicholas
programme.desc: If there is one thing that displeases the evil enchantress Chlorhydris, it's the mirth and love of Christmas. She sets out to kidnap Mr. Nicholas' magic sack, the one in which he carries all the toys that good children receive at Christmas. She doesn't know that a frowning Grouchy Smurf is hiding inside the sack.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills... With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: All The News That's Fit To Smurf
programme.desc: Curious Smurf has an idea: why not print a sheet with all the Village news? He's sure to interest all his readers of the Smurf Tattler. But things don't go exactly to plan when Papa finds super smurfberries.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grandpa's storytelling has to be heard to be believed. It's not so much that he tells tall tales, as long ones, but this time he gets so carried away that the formula on which he is working boils over... This is bad news. It might mean the destruction of the Village by evil aphids...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: How can the Smurfs save this future baby vulture? Right now, it's still in the egg and they must find a way of incubating the bird. And it just happens that the evil wizard Gargamel has found a way of changing himself into a bird to get at the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poor Lazy! All he wants is a good night's rest. But no, all the Smurfs throw a party for him and, what's more, he gets dragged into a silly argument about painting giant Bigmouth's toes a bright tangerine red... It's a long, sleepless night for poor Lazy Smurf!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs arrive in Camelot to witness several events: treacherous Morgan Le Fay steals Excalibur, the magic sword, and turns Merlin the Wizard, King Arthur and Lancelot into helpless victims.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There isn't a River Smurf anymore: someone has frozen it near its source. The Smurfs go to the Emerald Empress' country to see what the trouble is, and they meet the Patchwork Bear as well as the Iron Pyrites...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Smurf
programme.desc: Dreamy wants to encounter beings from outer space so much that no one believes him when he talks of having met one. Yet the arrival of this extraterrestrial is going to wreak havoc in the Smurf Village...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Directing the Smurfs to finish repairing the dam, Papa Smurf takes off on a herb-hunting expedition. While he is gone, Brainy causes havoc when he declares himself King and Papa Smurf returns just in time to save the dam from bursting.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In Holland in the Middle Ages, the Smurfs meet wounded Cupid, who cannot spread love as usual. The Smurfs take over and they meet evil Garg, who looks like someone they know.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Being Papa Smurf has its share of joys but also a few disadvantages. Such as being interrupted every five minutes, even when in the middle of delicate magic experiments. So Papa wonders if it's not possible to be replaced by a decision-taking Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A terrible giant called Bigmouth helps Gargamel hunt the Smurfs so he can feast on Soup a la Smurf. Papa Smurf tricks the big monster and then convinces him that Soup a la Gargamel is a far more appetizing dish than smurfy soup.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs' 200-year streak of good luck comes to an abrupt end when Gargamel finds Lady Luck's castle and, after locking her up in a dungeon, proceeds to tamper with her wheel of Fortune. Will the Smurfs remain inactive in the face of such ill luck ?

programme.title: The Magic Earrings
programme.desc: Hogatha manages to obtain the magic golden earrings of Sonoria that will enable her to hear Smurfy voices from afar. Following Lazy's snores, she almost reaches the Smurf Village until Harmony's horn-blasts blow in her earrings and she flies home in a rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grouchy learns that emotions can be great, particularly after the villainess of Chlorhydris creates a heart of ice to magically drain every one of care and love.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Journey To The Centre Of The Smurf
programme.desc: Winter is setting in on the Village of the Smurfs. The little Smurfs are freezing. But what is Clumsy doing with this strange rock he's discovered? And why is Miner Smurf so enthusiastic about their new discovery? Surely, one more addition to Clumsy's rock collection is not worth all this hoopla... The Smurfs will discover danger and surprises when they go underground.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: Revenge Of The Smurfs
programme.desc: A war is raging in the Middle Ages. Knights in armor in hot pursuit inadvertently destroy the Smurfs Village so a small band of Smurfs decide to avenge this wrongdoing. Won't Papa Smurf think this is too human-like a reaction?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He’d be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha’s dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: Cut-Up Smurfs
programme.desc: There's nothing Sassette enjoys more than cutting up paper dolls. She does it with flair and gusto. But Papa Smurf's revitalisation formula somehow gets sprinkled on Sassette's parchment creations with unforeseen results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: Magical Meanie
programme.desc: The Smurfs find a "meanie genie" that refuses to grant them their wishes until they call out the magic word. Unfortunately, Gargamel does some research in his library and finds that "pumpernickel pickles" will send the genie on a magical errand to capture the Smurfs. After Gargamel uses up his three wishes, Papa Smurf sings out the same magic word and the genie has to grant his commands to free the Smurfs, toss Gargamel into the river and bottle himself up forever.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogapatra, the hideous, bloated, vulgar Queen of the Nile, cannot get to sleep and this causes huge bags under her eyes. Her beauty recipe requires squeezing sleep from Lazy Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: The Magic Egg
programme.desc: Gargamel's magic egg ends up in the Smurf Village where the little blue people make one zany wish after another, causing total chaos. Papa Smurf has to outwit both Gargamel and Bigmouth before his magic potions undo the egg's damage and the smurfyness can return to normal.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lost in the Land of the Mystic Sands, the Smurfs encounter Ali Baba and his band of flying carpet-riding thieves, who steal the Smurfs' most precious possessions...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Trying a new spell on the Smurfs backfires when Gargamel turns himself into stone. The Smurfs are delirious with joy. Their archenemy will make them suffer no more!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Posing for a sculpture, especially a huge composition like that of Painter Smurf, is very tiring work, and you can't help moving a little. Now Papa Smurf finds a way to keep the posers perfectly still. There are drawbacks though, as the Smurfs will soon realise...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While the Smurfs are in Africa they meet Prince Bakuri, who can change anything into gold with a magical statuette of a rhinoceros. But a greedy trader steals the amulet and Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurf Friendship Day is that time in the year when, more than ever, the Smurfs show friendliness to one another. But won't Chlorhydris destroy those good feelings? And how can the Smurfs find a way to exchange Cupid's arrows for something nicer?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: The Masked Pie-Smurfer
programme.desc: When tempers flare, the Smurfs hire a masked pie thrower to get revenge on other Smurfs. Everyone becomes even angrier as pies fly and no one knows who's doing it. When Jokey is unmasked as the culprit, Papa defends him. He says that if all the Smurfs shared their feelings, they wouldn't need a secret pie thrower.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette discovers the evil with Chlorhydris's wicked plan to cast "a world without love" spell at the magic wishing well. It's a race against time for the Smurfs and Cupid to save the day!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills... With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In Holland in the Middle Ages, the Smurfs meet wounded Cupid, who cannot spread love as usual. The Smurfs take over and they meet evil Garg, who looks like someone they know.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs reach Ancient Spain and gentle Papa Smurf, busy on a crucial experiment, loses his patience. Actually, materially loses it. How it turns out is a surprise for everyone.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: Cut-Up Smurfs
programme.desc: There's nothing Sassette enjoys more than cutting up paper dolls. She does it with flair and gusto. But Papa Smurf's revitalisation formula somehow gets sprinkled on Sassette's parchment creations with unforeseen results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the Smurfs reach Ancient China, they learn that the child Emperor is in danger of being deposed, and by whom? By the evil Garg-Fu-Yun, who wants to rule in the child's stead!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A terrible giant called Bigmouth helps Gargamel hunt the Smurfs so he can feast on Soup a la Smurf. Papa Smurf tricks the big monster and then convinces him that Soup a la Gargamel is a far more appetizing dish than smurfy soup.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algun tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a el. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorias en mente, todo se acaba enrevesandose.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachon se disfraza de Pitufina para atraer a Piltkin, el gnomo que se ha enamorado de ella, y alejarlo de la Aldea Pitufa. Excavan bajo tierra y conocen a una gnoma que se enamora de Piltkin, quien se olvida de Pitufina y pasa a tener ojos solo para su nueva conquista.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha salvado a Pitufo Torpe de un terrible destino. Pitufo Torpe jura devocion eterna a su salvador y se esfuerza al maximo por saldar su deuda... con consecuencias desastrosas. Se hace necesario idear un plan ingenioso para evitar las bienintencionadas catastrofes causadas por Pitufo Torpe...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogapatra, la espantosa, hinchada y vulgar reina del Nilo, no puede dormir y eso hace que le aparezcan grandes ojeras. Su receta para la belleza incluye exprimir a Pitufo Perezoso para extraerle sueno...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Tontin lleva una Rebotilla al pueblo, donde la pequena y adorable criatura se multiplicara y amenazara con comerse la nueva presa. Pitufo Armonia toca una cancion y las Rebotillas encandiladas le siguen en fila india hasta el bosque donde se juntaran a Gargamel.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Dia de los Inocentes Pitufo resulta no ser tan divertido cuando Gargamel se pone un disfraz de Pitufoarbusto para capturar al pequeno Pitufo Feliz. Papa Pitufo pide ayuda a Pitufopluma para que llame a los pajaros y ataquen al falso arbusto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada manana, los duendecillos del agua depositan rocio sobre las hojas del bosque. No imaginas todo lo que ocurrira cuando Pitufo Miedoso se transforme con la varita magica que crea las gotas de rocio...

programme.title: La Pitufivision De Genio
programme.desc: Pitufo Minero rebusca bajo todas las piedras y, gracias a ello, descubre un cristal que transmite imagenes. Esto permite a Pitufo Carpintero inventar la pitufivision y, desde ese momento, los Pitufos pueden ver todas las mananas los entrenamientos de Pitufo Fortachon, los informes de las cosechas de Pitufo Labrador e incluso el programa de Pitufo Filosofo. Pero ¿quien podria haberlo imaginado? ¡El malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la pitufivision para atrapar Pitufos!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Costal Magico De Santa Claus
programme.desc: Si hay algo que desagrada a la malvada hechicera Clorhidris es la bondad y el amor propios de la Navidad. Trama un plan para robar el costal magico de Santa Claus, en el que transporta todos los juguetes que los ninos que se han portado bien reciben por Navidad. Sin embargo, no sabe que un enfurrunado Pitufo Grunon esta escondido dentro del saco.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demas Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males...con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Salomon el adivino posee un amuleto que permite a su portador conocer el futuro. Se lo entrega amablemente (quiza demasiado amablemente) a Pitufo Poeta que, desde ese momento, podra saber que sucedera a continuacion...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufo Carpintero se encuentra con una anciana trol en el bosque, que le suplica que le ayude a librarse de un grano rojo que tiene en la nariz... ¡dandole un buen puntapie! Pitufo Carpintero la ayuda sin mucho convencimiento. Y el resultado resulta sorprendente para el.

programme.title: El Pitufo Reportero
programme.desc: Pitufo Curioso ha tenido una idea: ¿por que no imprimir un boletin con todas las noticias de la aldea? Esta seguro de que sus cotilleos sobre los Pitufos interesaran a todos los lectores. Pero las cosas no salen exactamente segun lo previsto cuando Papa Pitufo encuentra superpitufrutas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La repulsiva bruja Hogata captura a Pitufina. Quiere robarle a la pequena belleza azul su cabello dorado. ¿Conseguiran salvar los Pitufos a su pequena companera antes de que sea demasiado tarde? ¿Lograra Hogata una cabellera como la de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Nadie le cree al Abuelo Pitufo cuando habla de junglas y sabanas lejanas, repletas de gatos salvajes gigantes, caballos a rayas, comedores de hojas de cuello largo y extranas tribus... Tan solo algunos Pitufitos dan cierto credito a sus historias. Pero, cuando Abuelo Pitufo escucha en el bosque el sonido del tambor real magico, un instrumento capaz de domar bestias salvajes, se lanza a la aventura para demostrar que no es un contador de historias al que el cerebro le juega malas pasadas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las historias de Abuelo Pitufo resultan increiblemente inverosimiles. Y lo peor no es que cuente largas e increibles historias, sino que esta vez se entusiasma tanto con ellas que la formula en la que esta trabajando se sobrecalienta... y eso son malas noticias. Podria significar la destruccion de la aldea a manos de las malvadas pulgas glotonas...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el Pitufo Filosofo pierde sus gafas deja caer las cosas, tropieza con los objetos, y se convierte en tan patoso como el Pitufo Tontin, que ahora tiene que leer a Filosofo y ayudarle a manejarse. Esta experiencia hace que Filosofo se sienta culpable por la forma en la que siempre se ha burlado de Tontin. Una vez que recibe un nuevo par de gafas, le trata con mas respeto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Falso Y El Feo Plumaje
programme.desc: ¿Que pueden hacer los Pitufos para salvar a este futuro pollo de buitre? Ahora mismo, aun esta en el huevo y deben encontrar la forma de incubarlo. Y sucede que el malvado mago Gargamel ha encontrado una forma de transformarse en un ave para acercarse a los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel infecta de odio el corazon de Pitufo Fortachon y, a continuacion, usa al pequeno Pitufo como senuelo para los demas. Afortunadamente, el amor de Pitufo Fortachon vence al odio y ayuda a sus pequenos amigos a escapar de las garras de Gargamel.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo y Bebe Pitufo mezclan las formulas de Papa Pitufo con consecuencias desastrosas, dejandoles a merced de un ejercito de hambrientas langostas que Gargamel ha soltado en el bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Una Fiesta De Pijamas Para Perezoso
programme.desc: ¡Pobre Pitufo Perezoso! Todo lo que desea es una buena noche de descanso. Pero no: todos los Pitufos celebran una fiesta en su honor y, lo que es peor, se ve arrastrado a una absurda discusion sobre pintar los dedos de los pies de Giganton de un brillante color mandarina. ¡Va a ser una larga noche en vela para el pobre Pitufo Perezoso!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papa Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las ordenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos llegan a Camelot, donde presencian varios sucesos: la traicionera Morgana Le Fey roba Excalibur, la espada magica, y transforma al mago Merlin, al rey Arturo y a Lancelot en indefensas victimas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Sonador vera cumplido su deseo de ser un Astropitufo cuando Papa Pitufo le hechiza para quedarse dormido, transformando el paisaje y a los Pitufos en una fantasia galactica. Gargamel vigila de cerca las travesuras de los Pitufos desde su bola de cristal, pero el hechizo de Papa Pitufo tambien tiene efecto en el y le transporta hasta el centro de una tormenta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El rio Pitufo ha desaparecido: alguien lo ha congelado cerca de su nacimiento. Los Pitufos viajan hasta el pais de la Emperatriz Esmeralda para descubrir cual es el problema y se encuentran con el Oso Parches y los Piratas de Hierro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebataran todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo... hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Sonador desea encontrar vida extraterrestre pero en la Aldea se burlan de el. Nadie le creera cuando les diga que ha hablado con un ser de otro planeta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papa Pitufo deja a los Pitufos reparando la presa del pueblo mientras el se va de excursion en busqueda de hierbas para sus pociones. Mientras esta fuera, Pitufo Filosofo provoca un revuelo al declarase a si mismo Rey y Papa Pitufo regresa a tiempo para evitar que la presa se destruya.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las preocupaciones de Papa Pitufo hacen que le salgan verrugas. La unica forma de librarle de esta enfermedad causada por la indecision es que frote el cuerno de uno de los Verrugosos, los desalinados, viscosos, estupidos y brutales enemigos de las haditas del Bosque de los Sauces...

programme.title: El Pitufo Osado
programme.desc: Esta vez, Gargamel tiene un plan infalible. Sin hacer caso de la risa burlona de Azrael, el malvado hechicero ha perfeccionado una sustancia magica a la que ha llamado «polvo temerario», que convertira a todos los Pitufos en temerarios e intrepidos aventureros. ¿Caera Papa Pitufo en la trampa de Gargamel? ¿Atrapara su enemigo a todos los Pitufos? ¿Tendra esta historia un final feliz?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En Holanda, en la Edad Media, los Pitufos se topan con Cupido, que esta herido y no puede propagar el amor como de costumbre. Los Pitufos ocupan su lugar y se encuentran con el malvado Garg, que se parece a alguien que conocen.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Ser Papa Pitufo da muchas alegrias, pero tambien tiene algunas desventajas. Por ejemplo, que alguien te interrumpa cada cinco minutos, incluso cuando estas en medio de delicados experimentos magicos. Eso hace que Papa Pitufo se plantee si seria posible que un Pitufo le sustituyera y se encargara de tomar las decisiones...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a traves de un rio a un lugar desconocido. Alli conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabaran encontrandose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con el y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos iran a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabara preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un terrible gigante ayuda a Gargamel a capturar a los Pitufos para hacer una rica sopa, pero tendra que enfrentar a Papa Pitufo primero.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La racha de 200 anos de buena suerte de los Pitufos se interrumpe bruscamente cuando Gargamel encuentra el castillo de la Dama de la Fortuna, la encierra en una mazmorra y comienza a manipular su rueda de la suerte. ¿Se quedaran de brazos cruzados los Pitufos ante ese cambio de fortuna?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogata consigue los pendientes dorados magicos de Sonoria, que le permitiran oir las voces de los Pitufos desde lejos. Siguiendo los ronquidos de Pitufo Perezoso, esta a punto de llegar hasta la Aldea Pitufa, pero entonces los sonidos del cuerno de Pitufo Armonia comienzan a resonar en sus pendientes y huye enfurecida de vuelta a casa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Grunon aprende que las emociones pueden ser fantasticas, sobre todo despues de que la malvada Clorhidris cree un corazon de hielo para despojar a todos de la bondad y el amor.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Viaje Al Pitufo De La Tierra
programme.desc: El invierno ha llegado a la Aldea Pitufa. Y los pequenos Pitufos estan helados de frio. ¿Pero que esta haciendo Pitufo Torpe con esa extrana roca que ha descubierto? ¿Y por que esta tan entusiasmado Pitufo Minero con su nuevo descubrimiento? Nadie entiende a que se debe tanto revuelo por una simple nueva roca para la coleccion de Pitufo Torpe... Al adentrarse bajo tierra, los Pitufos encontraran peligros y sorpresas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podria ser mas tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeno perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papa Pitufo. Aun asi, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quiza no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada vez que Pitufo Perezoso se queda dormido, tiene la misma pesadilla una y otra vez: se encuentra en poder de Morfeo, un malvado hechicero que quiere capturar a tantas almas dormidas como sea posible. Uno tras otro, todos los Pitufos van cayendo en las garras de Morfeo. ¿Todos? Quiza no, si Papa Pitufo puede evitarlo. Para ello, Papa Pitufo acude al Arenero en busca de ayuda...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Selwyn y Tallulah son un matrimonio de poderosos hechiceros. El problema es que estan todo el rato peleandose. La energia de sus discusiones esta formando una temible tormenta, y Papa Pitufo debe conseguir que hagan las paces antes de que la tormenta arrecie.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Por pura casualidad, un elefante que pasaba por el bosque se encuentra con Bebe Pitufo, y los Pitufos deciden crear un gran Circo. Van a visitar al hechicero infernal Baltazar y Bebe Pitufo se lo esta pasando genial...

programme.title: La Venganza De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Se ha desatado una guerra en la Edad Media. Unos caballeros vestidos con armadura destrozan por accidente la Aldea Pitufa, lo que provoca que una pequena banda de Pitufos decida vengar esta afrenta. ¿No pensara Papa Pitufo que esta es una accion demasiado propia de los humanos?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿A donde se han ido todas las ardillas? Pitufo Salvaje esta algo preocupado. Y estaria aun mas preocupado si supiera el malvado plan que ha tramado la horrible bruja Hogata para preparar un tonico capilar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufo Carpintero se encuentra con una anciana trol en el bosque, que le suplica que le ayude a librarse de un grano rojo que tiene en la nariz... ¡dandole un buen puntapie! Pitufo Carpintero la ayuda sin mucho convencimiento. Y el resultado resulta sorprendente para el.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Lo que mas le gusta a Sasita es recortar munecas de papel. Lo hace con estilo y entusiasmo. Sin embargo, la formula de revitalizacion de Papa Pitufo salpica por accidente las creaciones recortadas por Sasita con consecuencias imprevistas...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el Pitufo Filosofo pierde sus gafas deja caer las cosas, tropieza con los objetos, y se convierte en tan patoso como el Pitufo Tontin, que ahora tiene que leer a Filosofo y ayudarle a manejarse. Esta experiencia hace que Filosofo se sienta culpable por la forma en la que siempre se ha burlado de Tontin. Una vez que recibe un nuevo par de gafas, le trata con mas respeto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada vez que Pitufo Perezoso se queda dormido, tiene la misma pesadilla una y otra vez: se encuentra en poder de Morfeo, un malvado hechicero que quiere capturar a tantas almas dormidas como sea posible. Uno tras otro, todos los Pitufos van cayendo en las garras de Morfeo. ¿Todos? Quiza no, si Papa Pitufo puede evitarlo. Para ello, Papa Pitufo acude al Arenero en busca de ayuda...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: El Mal Genio
programme.desc: Los Pitufos encuentran un Genio en una lampara que se niega a concederles sus deseos sin la palabra magica.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogapatra, la espantosa, hinchada y vulgar reina del Nilo, no puede dormir y eso hace que le aparezcan grandes ojeras. Su receta para la belleza incluye exprimir a Pitufo Perezoso para extraerle sueno...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Busqueda De La Piedra Magica
programme.desc: En el lejano Valle de Nodrog, los Pitufos se encuentran con El Molians, que quiere conseguir la Pitufo-Piedra que Papa Pitufo necesita para curar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El huevo magico de Gargamel termina en la Aldea de los Pitufos donde los pequenitos azules piden un deseo loco tras otro lo que provoca un caos total. Papa Pitufo tiene que burlar a Gargamel y Giganton antes de que sus pociones magicas deshagan los estragos causados por el huevo y regrese la pitufarmonia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Perdidos en la Tierra de las Arenas Misticas, los Pitufos se encuentran con Ali Baba y su banda de ladrones montados en alfombras magicas, que roban las posesiones mas preciadas de los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel intenta probar un nuevo hechizo en los Pitufos, pero le sale al reves y se convierte a si mismo en piedra. Los Pitufos estan locos de alegria. ¡Su archienemigo ya no les hara sufrir nunca mas!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podria ser mas tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeno perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papa Pitufo. Aun asi, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quiza no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Posar para una escultura, sobre todo para una composicion enorme como la de Pitufo Pintor, es un trabajo agotador, y es imposible evitar moverse un poco. Ahora, Papa Pitufo ha encontrado la forma de que los modelos se queden completamente quietos. Sin embargo, tiene algunos inconvenientes, tal como los Pitufos comprobaran pronto...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Durante su estancia en Africa, los Pitufos conocen al principe Bakuri, que puede transformar cualquier cosa en oro gracias a una estatuilla magica con forma de rinoceronte. Pero un codicioso mercader roba el amuleto y a Pitufo Filosofo...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufidia de la Amistad es el momento del ano en el que, mas que nunca, los Pitufos demuestran su amabilidad con los demas. ¿Conseguira Clorhidris destruir esos buenos sentimientos? ¿Y como pueden los Pitufos encontrar una forma de cambiar las flechas de Cupido por algo mas agradable?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos van al rescate de dos ninos y su abuelo, cuando un misterioso extranjero aparece haciendo que su trineo se rompa en pedazos. Al llamar a la puerta de Gargamel en busca de ayuda, no se dan cuenta de que estan poniendo en peligro sus vidas y la de los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La repulsiva bruja Hogata captura a Pitufina. Quiere robarle a la pequena belleza azul su cabello dorado. ¿Conseguiran salvar los Pitufos a su pequena companera antes de que sea demasiado tarde? ¿Lograra Hogata una cabellera como la de Pitufina?

programme.title: El Pitufo Enmascarado
programme.desc: Una noche de Luna Azulada, tal y como la leyenda decia, un bebe pitufo aparece en el pueblo, y todos acaban agarrandole carino. Pero todo ha sido un malentendido y la ciguena vuelve por el bebe. Pintor y Grunon se han encarinado tanto con el bebe que les regresan al bebe.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Sonador anhela convertirse en rey despues de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras esta en su barco, cae a traves de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequenos seres que creen que Pitufo Sonador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequenos seres, descubre que no son terrorificos en absoluto. Pitufo Sonador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo habia sido un sueno, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya identica a las que extraian esos pequenos seres de su mina.

programme.title: ¿Como Hacer Un Arcoiris?
programme.desc: La madre naturaleza esta demasiado ocupada para evocar un Arcoiris para el Festival de los Pitufos, asi que Papa Pitufo pide prestado su libro de cocina para realizar la mezcla el mismo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina descubre la maldad con el maligno plan de Chlorhydris de lanzar un hechizo de "mundo sin amor" al pozo magico de los deseos. ¡Es una carrera contrarreloj para que los Pitufos y Cupido puedan arreglar las cosas!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demas Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males...con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a traves de un rio a un lugar desconocido. Alli conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabaran encontrandose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En Holanda, en la Edad Media, los Pitufos se topan con Cupido, que esta herido y no puede propagar el amor como de costumbre. Los Pitufos ocupan su lugar y se encuentran con el malvado Garg, que se parece a alguien que conocen.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos llegan a la antigua Espana y el amable Papa Pitufo, que esta ocupado con un experimento crucial, pierde la paciencia. De hecho, la pierde materialmente... con resultados sorprendentes para todos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Una de las cosas con las que mas disfruta Abuelo Pitufo es contar una buena historia de miedo, y a la mayoria de los Pitufos les encantan. Sin embargo, las cosas se complican para Pitufo Filosofo cuando Abuelo Pitufo habla de las pitufianimas y estas comienzan a acecharle...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Lo que mas le gusta a Sasita es recortar munecas de papel. Lo hace con estilo y entusiasmo. Sin embargo, la formula de revitalizacion de Papa Pitufo salpica por accidente las creaciones recortadas por Sasita con consecuencias imprevistas...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando los Pitufos llegan a la antigua China, descubren que el emperador nino corre peligro de ser depuesto. ¿Y por quien? ¡Por el malvado Garg-Fu-Yun, que quiere hacerse con el trono del nino!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina guia a los Pitufos de caminata por la naturaleza, pero Puppy se adelanto demasiado y tras perseguirlo acaban en el territorio de los Wartmongers. El Rey de los Wartmongers acaba haciendoles prisioneros en burbujas, pero un grupo de rebeldes les rescata y consiguen huir a lomos de Puppy.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un terrible gigante ayuda a Gargamel a capturar a los Pitufos para hacer una rica sopa, pero tendra que enfrentar a Papa Pitufo primero.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Stunning cards, festive decorations and intriguing scrapbook pages await your creativity. Explore the latest tools, techniques and designs to find the inspiration you need to develop your own style and let your personality shine.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Patterns are a design, motif or decoration, formed from regular repeated elements. They can also be naturally-occurring or a random arrangement of shapes, colors which have a regular or decorative effect. Patterns can be stripes, or lines, or alternating colors. The first project has a striped pattern of knots tied with plastic lacing. Next, make felt cookies with a polka dot pattern. Then add a chevron pattern to your art journal. Last, create a folding play mat with landscape patterns of a city scene around a lake.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today's show is all about texture -- texture is the feel or shape of a surface or thing. It's the smoothness or roughness, or maybe how soft or hard. We will learn about texture with a Paleolithic cave painting, a fun pony corral, and a friendly but prickly hedgehog. Learn how to add texture to your drawings with ordinary things from around the house in the Art Journal segment. Last, make a furry friend with giant chenille stems.

programme.title: Creative Cake Design presented by CraftsyTV
programme.sub-title: Can It Be Cake - Deluxe Cheeseburger Cake Creation!
programme.desc: Is it a cake or is it a burger?

programme.title: Make it Artsy
programme.desc: Look toward the gritty, industrial world for inspiration. Using industrial materials, Joe Rotella creates an artsy tray. Illustrator Jenn Mason designs contemporary earrings, then hardens them with heat. Joe Rotella revs up his micro lathe to carve a keepsake pen. Finally, take a road trip to the Columbus Idea Foundry, a center for the growing Maker Movement.

programme.title: Make it Artsy
programme.desc: Today, art becomes fashion. Mixed media artist Rae Missigman makes a wearable art journal for her artful ideas. Today's hottest jewelry trend is crafted into a bangle bracelet by Jen Cushman. Artist Candie Cooper affirms her art statement by embellishing boots. Jane Dunnewold has another idea about the maker's movement.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Use shapes in new ways. Modern Quilt Guild marketing director Heather Grant discusses the modern quilt aesthetic and modern quilt designs. Blogger Rossie Hutchinson joins quilter Elizabeth Dackson to talk about improv quilt events. Instructor Rebecca Kemp Brent uses the latest cutting and quilting technology to create a confetti star quilt design.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: She's Baaaaaack! Been itchin' for wine + stitchin'? Angela's kicking off a brand new season with a rather "puzzling" episode.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting
programme.desc: From cornstarch to cuticle pushers, Angela shares five ingenious hacks for using common household items for quilting.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: Tips for Avoiding Bulky Seams
programme.desc: Sometimes bulky seams can't be avoided, but DON'T panic! Angela has a few tips for how to deal with this quilting conundrum.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.sub-title: The World at War, Again - The 1940's
programme.desc: Factories hummed and women took up men's roles making military supplies as the second World War began. Fabric was rationed and women took fashion cues from military uniforms. Angela Wolf makes a contemporary jacket inspired by General Eisenhower's shortened uniform jacket. Embroidery expert Lisa Shaw shows how to design a handy embroidered clutch bag for an evening out.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Be ready to go -- anywhere, anytime. Sewing blogger and busy Mom Caroline Critchfield stays packed and ready with a handy bag made with clear vinyl and colorful fabric. Award-winning quilter Carolina Moore takes along paper-piecing projects so she can keep stitching wherever she goes. Alex Woodbury shares a charity sewing project.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Give your leather designs a real workout. Jewelry designer Katie Hacker warms up by creating a choker necklace with beads and leather cord. Jewelry-maker Jill MacKay cuts leather shapes and adds stamps, paint and beads. Then, she cools down by adding metallic effects to leather motifs.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: In this episode we investigate peaceful pursuits – when the actual making along with the finished product give us a sense of peace and a calm. Kim O'Neill demonstrates a piece entitled "breathe deep for calming" and adding scents to a lava rock bracelet. Then meet Jill Wiseman for bead weaving - the back and forth repetition can give that sense of peace. Finally, Kate Richbourg creates bead lariats in intricate patterns but simply constructed.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Flowers fill this episode. First Julie embellishes tags with a floral watercolor design to use on a page layout. Then Julie interviews May Flaum. Next, Kathy Cano-Murillo uses more flowers with her signature glitter style to add to her scrapbook page. Last, Julie cuts and pieces flower designs to use as card embellishments.

programme.title: Rooming Up!
programme.desc: Daniela's a ball of creative energy who's ready to take on any challenge thrown her way and to make her room glow like she does. Jo shows her how to make a totally chic DIY chandelier, decorate with wallpaper and add a rug that's soft enough to sleep on.

programme.title: Blank Wall Overhaul
programme.desc: James helps his friends transform their spare bedroom into a nursery by creating a wall mural of giant banana leaves, a much cheaper alternative to wallpaper!

programme.title: Rooming Up!
programme.desc: Daniela's a ball of creative energy who's ready to take on any challenge thrown her way and to make her room glow like she does. Jo shows her how to make a totally chic DIY chandelier, decorate with wallpaper and add a rug that's soft enough to sleep on.

programme.desc: Are you cut out for paper piecing? Join Angela and find out as she avoids ripping paper, her kids and chores to create a super cool rounded illusion, no curves required.

programme.title: Man About Cake

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Ready for some sweet reflection? Joshua's got you covered with supply picks, free recipes and a laugh-out-loud mirror glaze tutorial.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Cover us in ganache too, please! See JJR create a show-stopping triple chocolate cake.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Celebrate a love that's out of this world with Joshua John Russell's "cosmic love" illustrated cake!

programme.title: Contemporary Combo Part 3
programme.desc: Take on the final section of Teddy's contemporary combination to finish his entire piece! On top of executing the movement details and dynamics, practice performing all three sections together to challenge your stamina and choreographic retention.

programme.title: Jazz Basics 1
programme.desc: Join Nick in his first Jazz Basics class that focuses on weight shifts and working your feet through the floor. Practice using your plié as you take up space and travel through each exercise sequence.

programme.title: Contemporary Combo Part 1
programme.desc: Build off of Teddy's improvisation techniques and dive into part one of his contemporary choreography. Watch how Teddy's movement dynamics emulate the musical accents, and work on achieving clarity in your shapes.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: With some paper and a little creativity, we'll make a silly, slithery creature. Candie Cooper recreates impressionist art and Katie Hacker makes glittery slime. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes creepy eyeballs and silly spiders for Halloween fun from blogger Morena Hockley.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Let's turn toward ourselves for creative ideas. When she makes a lighted mirror, Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes you a star. Katie Hacker makes personal paper dolls and Franz Spohn draws a 3D self-portrait. Jenny celebrates Thanksgiving with Pilgrim-style table decorations.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "White Water"
programme.desc: The adrenaline has worn off for Chris and Casey, and the jet lag has set in. The brothers face frigid temperatures and unpredictable whitewater rapids. When they try to navigate the rough waterways, their safety is threatened.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Risk and Reward"
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers make an important decision that vastly impacts their expedition. In a desperate search of necessary food, they attempt to hunt big game for the first time in New Zealand, and encounter a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Driving the Bus"
programme.desc: Chris and Casey are introduced to the tastes of the New Zealand wild, and get a rude awakening. Mother Nature’s mind games start to mess with the brothers’ mental strength, while their inflatable raft continues to be a serious problem.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Round Two"
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Chris and Casey disagree on what their next course of action should be. Without clear cache directions, the brothers are left with a hard choice. Should they stay, or should they go?

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Peaks and Valleys"
programme.desc: Chris and Casey hike the mountainside, but the steep slopes and shifting shale make the trek anything but easy. The brothers face energy depletion and exhaustion, and they feel the pressure to find new food sources soon, or go hungry.

programme.title: 7 Days S1 - "Day 4"
programme.desc: Jalou and Kevin travel to far colder places to challenge each other in an ice climbing competition.

programme.title: 7 Days S1 - "Day 5"
programme.desc: In the Chinese desert, Kevin finds out that desert racing is difficult. While in Bolivia, Jalou wants to prove to her brother that women can be better drivers.

programme.title: 7 Days S1 - "Day 6 "
programme.desc: After exploring Peru, Jalou has to get over her fear when she goes white water kayaking. In Thailand, Kevin is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: THRU S1 - "The Basement"
programme.desc: After the emotional exits of Frank and Tung Tung, the competition continues with an Olympic touch. Will team red earn money for their jackpot this time?

programme.title: THRU S1 - "The Swamp"
programme.desc: Trusting Vitor was difficult, so the red team sent him away. Blue team fights back, without soldier Keith. No closed doors this time but mud, insect and reed.

programme.desc: Chris and Casey have hiked across New Zealand for weeks. Fighting for their lives has taken a toll on their emotions and abilities. They team up to hunt feral pigs, but the cache items used for survival create new challenges and deep frustrations.

programme.title: 7 Days S1 - "Day 4"

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Detroit"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in ‘Motor City’ in the dead of winter but given access to a half million dollar new Ford GT raises her spirits. Her goal is to learn more about muscle cars, born in Detroit, and her journey takes her in different directions.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "New York"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie hits New York City in a four million dollar rare Lamborghini Centenario. Her quest is to track down the players in the underground drift driving scene and visit the exclusive Manhattan Motor Club.

programme.title: Born To S1 - "James Woods"
programme.desc: James Woods is the rockstar of the free skiing world. He is defiant, a renegade, unafraid to push boundaries and winning is nothing short of a drug to him.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Jonesing for a Road Runner"
programme.desc: When high profile local car dealer Don Jones Jr. wants to bring back the car of his youth, where does he go? Anywhere he wants! But when your high school dream car is a 1969 Road Runner, your dream shop is Graveyard Carz.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Memento Mori"
programme.desc: Graveyard Carz has restored its fair share of 1971 ‘Cudas, so what makes this 1971 Hemi Shaker ‘Cuda so different? Don’t worry, we won’t ruin the surprise. This is the first time in Graveyard Carz broadcasts, that the car will be revealed backwards!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Another Dreamz Machine"
programme.desc: Mark and Justin begin assembly on the ultra rare 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon. Then the team shifts gears to focus on a Graveyard Dreamz, 1969 Charger tribute car that's made to order.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Flight of the Super Bee"
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghouls race to finish a one owner 1970 Super Bee that belongs to a decorated retired Marine. But as Mark and Justin forge ahead on this one owner car, a SNAFU on Will's side of the shop may cause a total mission failure.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "The Showdown"
programme.desc: Leaders Wayland Campbell and Levi Shirley push each other to their limits while other top drivers show just how fast 4x4 off road racing has become.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "To Hell and Back"
programme.desc: Last year's champion, Erik Miller defends his title. While 2nd place finisher, Jason Scherer, will be one of the many top challengers aiming to beat him.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "Finding the Line"
programme.desc: We follow Shannon Campbell, the first 3-time champion of the King of the Hammers. But his kids, also young drivers, push their dad to the brink of his limits.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel: Return of the Riley
programme.desc: Can the team behind Kestrel Beer and one of the world’s best drag racing engineers break multiple land speed records in a 1930s Kestrel Riley classic car?

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel S1 - "Record Day - Part 1"
programme.desc: The transformation is complete and it’s time for The Flying Kestrel to be put to the test.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Miami"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie is given the keys to a five million dollar Pagani Huayra L’Ultimo as she explores the sub-culture of lowriders with the seal of approval from Horacio Pagani himself. Will she be accepted into this tribe?

programme.title: HOOK'd Comedy Joe Clair, Howie Bell, Damon Rozier, Pat Brown, Eddie Bryant, and Turae.
programme.desc: Joe Clair & Friends live from Washington, DC. This standup comedy show features Joe Clair, Howie Bell, Damon Rozier, Pat Brown, Eddie Bryant, and Turae.

programme.title: HOOK'd Comedy Joe Clair, Timmy Hall, Vanessa Fraction, Marshall Brandon, Charles Walden, and Tony Woods.
programme.desc: Joe Clair, Timmy Hall, Vanessa Fraction, Marshall Brandon, Charles Walden, and Tony Woods.

programme.title: The Untold Story Of Rakim: Part One
programme.desc: A two part documentary about the story of Rakim. In-depth insights from those who were closest to the creative lyrical mastermind of Rakim.

programme.title: Lights Camera Action - T-Pain - Behind The Scenes - Church
DL Hughley Uncut - Guest Willy T Ribbs
programme.desc: Guest on DL Uncut is former race car driver Willy T. Ribbs. Willy was the first African American to test a Formula One racing car and first African American to compete in the Indy 500. DL, Jasmine and Willy discuss the sport of auto racing, the lack of diversity, and the future of sport in the changing times of America.

programme.title: A Fishing Story | Come Sunday
programme.desc: Featured guest Bishop Pearson is the iconic, charismatic pastor that has shaped ministries all over the world. He’ll discuss his elevation in consciences and the movie that chronicles his life’s journey.

programme.title: A Fishing Story | Defensive Force
programme.desc: Lawrence Guy is an outstanding NFL defensive tackle. He walks us through his learning challenges as a youth and how it's shaped him as a ma

programme.title: DL Hughley Uncut - Guest Actor & Comedian Aries Spear
programme.desc: DL’s featured guest on DL Uncut is actor comedian Aries Spears. From TV to film, actor Aries Spears spends some time with DL and Jasmine to talk about recent issues with Mike Epps and a social media post about black on black crime versus police racism against blacks.

programme.title: DL Hughley Uncut - Guest Actor & Comedian Chris Spencer
programme.desc: DL’s featured guest on DL Uncut is actor & comedian Chris Spencer. Chris Spencer, the creator of the Real Husbands of Hollywood spends some time with DL and Jasmine to talk about his recent projects and working during a pandemic.

programme.title: Traveling with Denella Ri'chard - Ecuador S4-EP1
Traveling with Denella Ri'chard - Tampa Bay S3-EP1

programme.title: A Fishing Story | Guest Anastasia Patterson
programme.desc: Anastasia walks us through how fishing has helped her spend quality time with her family and nurture relationships.

programme.title: Ali In The Valley - Classic Crab Cakes
Ali In The Valley | Best Braised Short Ribs
programme.desc: Slow braised short ribs in a tasty sauce! Pure comfort food! Short ribs are not always at the top of my list of food that I cook but when I do, it’s pure heaven and such a treat!

programme.title: Ali In The Valley | Best Clam Chowder Soup
programme.desc: Clam Chowder Soup is easier to make than you think and the homemade version is unbelievably creamy, flavorful and chockfull of clams!

programme.title: DL Hughley Uncut - Guest Atty Ben Crump
programme.desc: DL Hughley Uncut on GFNTV. Guest on DL Uncut is Civil Rights Attorney Benjamin Crump. Attorney Crump is best known for taking on the toughest cases with national civil rights implications. From Trayvon Martin to Michael Brown, Crump continues to push the envelope for justice for those whose lives have been changed due an unfair legal system.

programme.title: DL Hughley Uncut - Guest Charlamagne Tha God
programme.desc: DL’s featured guest on DL Uncut is one of the hosts on the nationally syndicated radio show The Breakfast Club – Charlamagne Tha God.

programme.title: GFN TV
programme.desc: GFNTV is an online platform that offers exclusive live stream events and the latest in premium urban video entertainment.

programme.title: GFN TV
programme.desc: GFNTV is an online platform that offers exclusive live stream events and the latest in premium urban video entertainment.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.

programme.title: Deep Relaxation with Tracee Stanley
programme.desc: Move beyond the mind and connect with a deeper part of yourself. Experiment and let go and explore your true nature to create a new way of being in the world.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 5
programme.desc: The geometry of the pancreas is exquisite. The real work of nutrient availability begins with the elegant coordination of liver, gallbladder, pancreas, and small intestines.

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Union with Yourself
programme.desc: The essential nature of the physical world is that it's not physical. The essential nature of the material world is that it's not material. As Rumi says, “We come spinning out of nothingness scattering stars like dust.”

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: How to Transcend Fear into Love
programme.desc: We live in a fear-based world. In today’s lesson, Anita offers you tools that have been specially created to overcome your fears with love. This is the greatest lesson she learned during her near-death experience when she traveled to the other side. It’s the lesson that saved her life.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
programme.desc: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: If you want to step into healing conversations, you have to have a clear understanding of where you’re going, and it starts within: the first healing conversation you need to have is with yourself.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: What does it mean to experience symptoms of imbalance? In this segment we review what’s happening in your body and how you can use food to bring it back to balance. We start with vata.

programme.title: Abundant Joy with Scott Schwenk
programme.sub-title: Abundant Joy - Day 3 Solar Plexus Chakra
programme.desc: Today, we look at Manipura, located near the navel or solar plexus, which is about how we use or are affected by power and will. As this region becomes empowered, as it releases its contractions, it moves up into the heart center and empowers the ability to give and receive love freely.

programme.title: Abundant Joy with Scott Schwenk
programme.desc: This toolbox episode will teach you how to listen, sit for meditation, set your manifestations, and find your mantra.

programme.title: Balance Your Hormones with Dr. Jolene Brighten
programme.desc: Did you know that 80,000 toxic chemicals have been released into the environment since the Industrial Revolution? What's worse is that very few have been tested for their long-term impact on human health. Today's session is all about detoxification, the natural process that our liver, kidneys, lungs, lymphatic system, gut, and skin perform daily to get rid of metabolic byproducts that our body produces and toxins that are absorbed from the environment. You'll learn how to avoid toxins and how to address those that you already are carrying due to the nature of the environment, as well as how to optimize your body's ability to detoxify.

programme.title: Good Mood Food with Jason Wrobel
programme.desc: It’s time to unleash your inner MasterChef today! Jason discusses his mindset and ethos around making a meal, including principles for balancing flavors, textures, mouthfeel.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Ayurveda relies upon the intelligence of the cosmos–if you want to understand how the universe works, you must tune in to your own cycles. In this course, you’ll learn how to use the principles of Ayurveda to bring the focus back to you so you can make more intuitive and informed health decisions.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The universe and everything in it was created with five elements: earth, water, fire, wind, and ether. For the creation of the planet, five elements came together in different proportions, and since we are made of the five elements, it takes these five elements to feed and nourish us. Once we understand our composition, and how these elements work in our body, we can start to understand what we need to replenish ourselves.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The basic rules of food consumption come from one of Nidhi’s favorite Ayurvedic texts: the Charak Samhita. Charak is considered the father of Ayurveda, and the text is at least 1,000 years old. In it we find simple and applicable rules that you can bring to your life today.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: A lot of people come to Ayurveda from Yoga and assume that it is purely a plant-based science. We want to bring you back to the perspective that Yoga is the science of energy, and Ayurveda is the science of matter. Ayurveda utilizes meats for the preservation of life; and in this segment, we address the quality and order of meats.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: In today's segment, we talk about food combinations that create imbalance due to the nature of the two unique foods. It’s important to understand what food combinations lead to undigested material, called ama, in your system, so you make more informed decisions that support your digestive health.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Why is it important for you to consider your kitchen to be a sacred place? In our modern time, our relationship with the kitchen is either non-existent or damaged, so almost everyone feels daunted when they think about Ayurvedic cooking. In this segment, you will discover how to change that relationship and start to view your kitchen, and the time you spend in it, as sacred.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: We are no longer the farm-to-table species. Processed food, meal prep, and stale foods are some of our biggest blocks to Ayurvedic living. Today, let’s look at how we can begin to view food differently and keep Ayurvedic principles alive.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: What is the Ayurvedic understanding of the mind-gut connection? In this segment, we cover the way our body works in harmony with the world around us.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: What does it mean to experience symptoms of imbalance? In this segment we review what’s happening in your body and how you can use food to bring it back to balance. We start with vata.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Menopause is the time in a woman's life when she stops menstruating, when her ovaries have released all possible eggs, and she enters a new era. In the last twenty to thirty years we've seen changes in the body and mood associated with menopause. This lesson covers how our lifestyle and food affect our experience of menopause.

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: If you want to step into healing conversations, you have to have a clear understanding of where you’re going, and it starts within: the first healing conversation you need to have is with yourself.

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: This session is an insight session that is designed to follow the previous lesson (so go back if you haven’t watched it yet). You’ll integrate everything you’ve learned so far and set yourself up for taking practical action in your life. By doing this work, you’ll step more fully into your vision for your life and your vision for the world.
