programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: Guided Meditation to Move Forward & Release Fear
programme.desc: Today’s meditation will guide you through forgiveness. Of letting go of obstacles and fears that hold you back from living the life you desire to live. By doing so, you’ll be able to forgive everyone who has hurt you in this life, release emotional baggage that may be weighing heavy on you, and step into a new realm of possibility.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. Build on yesterday’s practice to marry effort with ease. Invite your breath to be smooth and even as we continue to build on your foundation.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation
programme.desc: True faith is a valuable ally when facing obstacles.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
programme.desc: The second stage of 2014 Strongman champions League, in Cologne, Germany. 14 athletes from 12 different countries battled through six events on the second stop

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The third episode is hosted in Serbia where world records are broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the SCL takes place in Holland with events such as the Atlas Stones and Truck Pull being witnessed

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fourth episode takes place in Finland with events such as Bus Pull and the forward hold

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

The Longest Wave
programme.desc: THE LONGEST WAVE offers a rare glimpse into what motivates an athlete who has everything to lose to push his body and mind to the limit. A film about surf legend Robby Naish.

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Mikey February, Torren Martyn, Noa Deane, Mason Ho

programme.title: American Roundtable
programme.desc: We had a lot of questions about American surfing. Why has the number of Americans on Tour declined? Are American kids any less motivated than kids from other parts of the world? Is there anything wrong with the American amateur system? Should surfers from Hawaii surf for America? Are we less patriotic than other nations? We could’ve tried to answer these questions ourselves. We could’ve drank coffee and punched keys from the confines of our office. We could’ve driven up and down the forevers of the country’s coastal roads, finding refuge and realization at any of the peaks wedging within her precious coves. We could’ve spent late nights drinking wine or whiskey or just plain water and arrived at some sort of a conclusion. That would’ve been the easy way. Instead, we got on the phone.

programme.title: 7 Miles of Paradise
programme.desc: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Tanner Gudauskas, Brendon Gibbens

programme.title: REDirect
programme.desc: Eleven short surf films shot on state-of-the-art RED cameras, Featuring Chris Bryan, Matt Shuster, Riley Blakeway, Jensen Young Sik, Ryan Perry

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Dane Gudauskas, Mikey February, Mikey Wright

programme.title: El Ninos Wake
programme.desc: Surfer presents a new surf flim, El Niños Wake. Echoes from a historic west coast winter.

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Mason Ho, Oliver Kurtz, Noa Deane, Creed McTaggart

programme.title: Stranger Surfing
programme.desc: Stranger Surfing opens with a huge air flip by Gabriel Medina and the action just gets hotter and hotter. John John launches and pulls a 6 foot rotation air.

programme.title: Heavy Water
programme.desc: Heavy Water is a Michael Oblowitz film, produced by Red Bull Media House and All Edge Entertainment, that follows the life and times of Nathan Fletcher, part of the royal family of surfing and a key figure in big wave history.

programme.title: Relentless: The Inspiring Story of Dusty Payne's Return To Surfing
programme.desc: Dusty Payne has been through it all, from nailing closing sections in the most progressive surf films of his generation and competing at the highest levels on the World Tour, to laying in a hospital bed with metal plates in his head and a jaw wired shut after a horrific wipeout at Backdoor. But even at his lowest points, Payne's passion for surfing has always been the fuel to get him through the darkest hours and back into the light. In "Relentless," we followed Payne before his near-fatal wipeout as he competed and freesurfed his way through Portugal and scored all-time sessions with friends back home in Hawaii. We also captured the wave that nearly spelled the end for Payne and the months-long battle he fought to return to the water. What we learned was something that those closest to Payne already knew, which was that no matter how dire the situation, you can never count Payne out. This is his story. This is "Relentless."

programme.title: Forbidden Trim
programme.desc: A Marine is sent on a secret mission to Central America. He is seeking intel on a commando syndicate hiding out in the forbidden jungle. He encounters wild animals, a mystical guru, and a group of surfers who help complete is objectives.

programme.title: Trouble: The Lisa Andersen Story
programme.desc: Lisa Andersen is one of surfings few transcendent stars. 4x world champ and inductee into the Surfer Hall of Fame, she is a true surf icon. But this is not a story about surfing. Its the story of a woman brave enough to be vulnerable.

programme.title: Girl on Wave
programme.desc: Girl on Wave follows windsurfer Sarah Hauser and documents her journey as a New-Caledonian athlete competing on the American stage of windsurfing. Performing in competitions around the globe, Sarah is leaving a unique mark on the sport.

programme.title: Surf Shop Chronicles: Episodes 1
programme.desc: There's always been something special about surf shops. From the amalgamated scent of wax, new wetsuits and fresh boards to the intel on which local break is currently working best, where to get the best post-surf burrito in town and so much more, surf culture resides inside surf shops-that's what makes them special. In our web series Shop Chronicles, SURFER shares the stories of the most iconic surf shops around.

programme.title: REDirect
programme.desc: Eleven short surf films shot on state-of-the-art RED cameras, Featuring Bryce Lowe-White, Eric Knutson, Jason Baffa

programme.title: FULL SPEED
programme.desc: FULL SPEED will get any surfer amped to go surfing! Witness the hottest surfing on the planet. Sure to raise any surfer's heartbeat and peak their STOKE levels!

programme.title: Dirty Old Wedge
programme.desc: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it

programme.title: Quivers

programme.title: Fast and Loose
programme.desc: The day has finally come, dear reader, where we can show you our twin-fin-filled creation, "Fast & Loose". The film tells the story of the modern performance twin through the lens of Australian icon Mark Richards, who found inspiration in the boards of Reno Abellira, shaping tutelage in Dick Brewer and created a design all his own that he surfed to four straight world titles. To this day, Richard's feat of making his own boards and surfing them to such success stands apart as one of the greatest achievements of all time surfing. But what's perhaps more impressive is the way that twin-fin designs have evolved in the aftermath, disappearing for years before reemerging in modern surf culture as the go-to craft for those looking to balance performance surfing with high-speed, skatey fun. "Fast & Loose" celebrates that unique flavor not just through the story of MR, but through modern rippers like Zeke Lau and Kael Walsh, who took the classic twins and updated versions for a spin. It was a fun film to make, as it damn well should be when the subject is twin fins. Hopefully the feeling is contagious. Please enjoy.

programme.title: Coldwater Journal
programme.desc: Ben Weiland isn't your typical surfer. While most wave-seekers salivate over the idea of traveling to tropical reefs in equatorial climates, Weiland found his passion in hunting a different kind of surf. For the past 10 years, Weiland has scoured obscure coastlines at extreme latitudes searching for waves in some of the coldest, most inhospitable places imaginable. In the process, he's uncovered new waves and redefined surf exploration. Coldwater Journal documents Weiland's journey with fellow fringe wave connoisseurs Alex Gray, Dane Gudauskas, Timmy Reyes, Sam Hammer, Cyrus Sutton, Keith Malloy and more as they chase swells to the furthest-flung destinations and face the kinds of challenges most surfers could never conceive. From the bear-infested shores of Russia, storm-ravaged coasts of the Aleution Islands, Coldwater Journal chronicles a different kind of surf travel, and celebrates the spirit of true explorers.

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: The $1,000 Ladies Event attracted 201 entrants and would see the final table headlined by Karina Jett and Susie Isaacs as nine lucky ladies look to capture the WSOP bracelet and $58,530 first-place prize.

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: The $5,000 Seven Card Stud World Championship attracted 144 entrants and created a prize pool of $676,800. The WSOP bracelet and $221,000 first-place prize would look to be claimed by a savvy group of final tablists that included Marcel Luske, Jeff Lisandro, Joe Awada, Cory Zeidman, Dewey Tomko and John Juanda.

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: Phil Hellmuth headlines the $3,000 Pot-Limit Hold'em final table that includes Ram Vaswani and Phi Nguyen, while Gavin Griffin chases the title of youngest WSOP bracelet of all-time if he can emerge victorious. Who will win the $270,420 first-place prize and prestigious WSOP bracelet?

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: The only straight Razz tournament of the 2004 WSOP would see a field of 195 players. Chris Bjorin, Hoyt Corkins, John Juanda, Howard Lederer, and Dutch Boyd all look to deny T.J. Cloutier his fifth WSOP bracelet as all eyes are on the $90,500 first-place prize.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Western Mongolian with nomadic Kazak herders who hunt using golden eagles in a tradition that dates back to well before the great Mongol Empire. That nomadic lifestyle and the traditions that come with it are trying to find their place in an ever-encroaching modern world.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Kyoto, one of the most well-preserved cities in Japan where both domestic and international tourists flock to stroll the streets to get a sense of ancient Japan. We spend time with a classic starving artist trying to make it in the art world, a tattoo artist breaking new ground in what is still a taboo art form, and a modern artist with pieces in major museums around the world.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Puerto Rico to explore graffiti and mural culture. This is a surprising look at how something that is seen as a sign of blight, of a neighborhood in decline, is actually unifying neighborhoods around the island. The murals give residents a sense of history and pride as well as much needed income from tourists who are visiting these seldom-seen barrios to view the mural art.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to East Timor with writer Naldo Rei, who was instrumental in the 15-year bloody struggle for independence from Indonesia. Naldo and his fellow East Timorese are now looking towards an uncertain but hopeful future for a country with a lot of potential, including what Conservation International calls the most biodiverse swath of ocean right off the shore of their capital city.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to The Northern Coast of Australia to Arnhem Land, spending time with the Yolngu tribe – a group of people that some anthropologists date back to well over 30,000 years and who were instrumental in advancing the struggle for land rights for Aboriginals across Australia.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: While most of the world watched in shock when Russia invaded Ukraine, the artists, musicians, writers and keepers of culture in Ukraine rose to the challenge of defending their homeland in any way possible. This special episode looks at several of these people to see what inspired them to speak out, and what they want the rest of the world to see in their very real struggle for Ukraine's identity.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: While most of the world watched in shock when Russia invaded Ukraine, the artists, musicians, writers and keepers of culture in Ukraine rose to the challenge of defending their homeland in any way possible. programme.title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World
programme.sub-title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World: Rome, Kansas, Venice, Buenos Aires, Macao, Dallas, Florence
programme.desc: Your first class ticket to the cities of the world. This series features large and small cities from around the world to reveal their icons, culture, tourist and hidden highlights with information about local customs, the cities personality and history.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Travel Thru History is a unique, Emmy nominated travel series that explores diverse cities and historical sites around the World while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations. From the oldest building in the Western Hemisphere to the famous French Quarter, a spectacular chain of islands off the Southern coast of Florida to the birthplace of California, the Travel Thru History series is a must see to learn about America's rich and fascinating history by traveling to amazing cities across the states. It explores diverse cities and historical sites while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations.

programme.title: Painting The Town
programme.desc: Folk artist Eric Dowdle travels across North America, meeting the local people, sampling food, learning about culture and touring local attractions in an effort to determine what makes each place unique. Each episode culminates in the creation of a piece of colorful folk art that symbolizes the place Dowdle has visited.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World
programme.sub-title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World: Rome, Kansas, Venice, Buenos Aires, Macao, Dallas, Florence
programme.desc: Your first class ticket to the cities of the world. This series features large and small cities from around the world to reveal their icons, culture, tourist and hidden highlights with information about local customs, the cities personality and history.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Travel Thru History is a unique, Emmy nominated travel series that explores diverse cities and historical sites around the World while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations. From the oldest building in the Western Hemisphere to the famous French Quarter, a spectacular chain of islands off the Southern coast of Florida to the birthplace of California, the Travel Thru History series is a must see to learn about America's rich and fascinating history by traveling to amazing cities across the states. It explores diverse cities and historical sites while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations.

programme.title: Painting The Town
programme.desc: Folk artist Eric Dowdle travels across North America, meeting the local people, sampling food, learning about culture and touring local attractions in an effort to determine what makes each place unique. Each episode culminates in the creation of a piece of colorful folk art that symbolizes the place Dowdle has visited.

programme.title: Outta Town Adventures
programme.sub-title: Santa Barbara and Her Beautiful Neighbors
programme.desc: Even the names are exotic: Montecito, Buellton, Solvang, Goleta... and they’re surrounded by the stunning Santa Ynez Mountains to boot. Oh, and snuggled right up to the Pacific Ocean!

programme.title: Trinidad & Tobago: A Piece of India in the Caribbean
programme.sub-title: Trinidad & Tobago: A Piece of India in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Located in the Lesser Antilles in the Caribbean Sea, Trinidad and Tobago are the largest islands of a group with a unique blend of cultures.

programme.title: Passport Heavy
programme.desc: Embark on a whirlwind adventure with Passport Heavy! From Dubai’s skylines to covert treasures, we curate a 38-hour journey. In Cabo, explore Todos Santos and La Paz—top-notch vendors and magic await!

programme.title: It’s How You Get There
programme.desc: Sometimes the journey is just as important as the destination. These guys cover the best locations the world has to offer from the mode of transportation to experiences along the way. Its not where you go, "Its How You Get There"

programme.title: It’s How You Get There

channel.display-name: The Bob Ross Channel en Español

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Un verdadero clásico de Bob Ross: la majestuosa montaña cubierta de nieve, las ondulantes colinas, los frondosos árboles y arbustos y el sereno lago.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: El impertérrito esplendor del cielo, los árboles y el lago nunca ha sido tan bien representado como en esta alegre creación de Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Las montañas y el cielo cantan en armonía mientras los pinceles de Bob Ross cuentan una historia de tonos y profundidad impresionantes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross utiliza hermosos tonos de verde que estallan en esta emocionante y realista muestra de la maravilla de la naturaleza.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Los picos nevados apuntan hacia el cielo mientras Bob Ross rodea todo esto con una feliz reunión de galas de paisaje.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: El método fácil de Bob revela una vez más el esplendor de una casa de campo en un país de las maravillas del invierno y colinas de color púrpura

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: El uso de Bob Ross de los tonos azules da como resultado una representación de olas en la noche, todo ello metido dentro de una forma ovalada.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross encuentra un lago apenas visible abrazado por montañas nevadas y algunos de los mejores verdes de la naturaleza.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross te encantará al plasmar en el lienzo una escena montañosa brillante y alegre sacada de tus sueños.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.sub-title: Sorpresa en el arroyo de la pradera
programme.desc: Un tímido arroyuelo serpentea a través de una pradera dorada creada por la técnica precisa, pero fácil de aprender, de Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.sub-title: Óvalo de luz de luna de montaña
programme.desc: El misterioso cielo nocturno está atravesado por asombrosos rayos lunares que Bob Ross utiliza para iluminar una poderosa montaña.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Una tierra de fantasía invernal cubierta de nieve parece tan real, y Bob Ross te muestra lo fácil que puede ser su técnica especial de pintura.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Los picos lejanos parecen casi flotar entre las nubes mientras Bob Ross crea un río que fluye suavemente y salpica el primer plano.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Déjate atrapar por la magia mientras ves cómo Bob Ross crea una cumbre nevada y un hermoso lago rodeado de tonos verdes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: ¿No te has imaginado siempre paseando por uno de los hermosos cuadros de paisajes de Bob Ross? Observa cómo hace realidad su sueño.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob pinta lo mejor de la naturaleza: árboles de hoja perenne y aguas frescas y tranquilas ante una gloriosa montaña marrón. ¡Una verdadera belleza!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: La artista invitada Dana Jester crea una escena de montaña al estilo de Bob Ross, con estribaciones y árboles de hoja perenne, y arbustos

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross ilustra la ilusión del infinito mientras la montaña y el agua se desvanecen en la distancia, creada en una encantadora pintura de medio óvalo

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Bob Ross mientras pinta un tranquilo estanque y el follaje que lo rodea preparándose para una temporada de sueño.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Viaja a una solitaria cabaña escondida en el helado país montañoso del norte con Bob Ross: otra obra maestra de lienzo negro de la que enamorarse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Tonos de rojo, lavanda y oro rodean un burbujeante arroyo que fluye a través de un sereno cuadro ovalado del pintor favorito de la televisión, Bob

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Disfrute de un paseo casual por el sendero que da a un tranquilo estanque y respire el fresco aire otoñal.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Bob mientras pinta las creaciones más impresionantes de la naturaleza: ¡montañas cubiertas de nieve! Una belleza que hay que experimentar

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Adéntrate en la tranquila quietud del amanecer con Bob Ross mientras captura la esencia de un bosque envuelto por el sol en el lienzo.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Únase a Bob y experimente la magia de las primeras horas de la mañana en un óvalo mientras los goteos y salpicaduras de un arroyo perforan el silencio

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross crea la ilusión de una madera de deliciosa textura mientras te invita a entrar en otra dimensión de montañas con vistas a un tranquilo río

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Hoy Bob pinta una cálida escena besada por la nieve con una pequeña cabaña acurrucada en el abrazo de las colinas, los árboles y los arbustos

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Una excursión por la naturaleza con Bob: sigue el sendero cubierto de vegetación en lo más profundo del bosque y disfruta de la belleza de la quietud

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Adéntrate en un bosque cubierto de nieve con Bob Ross, una escena suavemente calentada por la belleza de los rústicos toques de color del invierno.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross te invita a disfrutar de una fabulosa vista de un lago de montaña con capas de suaves colinas y árboles envueltos en una espesa neblina.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: ¡Una forma inteligentemente construida sobre lienzo! Mira a través de cristales con el artista Bob y comparte un hermoso día de nieve al aire libre

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Visite una cabaña de Bob y experimente la tranquilidad de unas misteriosas montañas lejanas y un atractivo estanque justo al otro lado de la puerta

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Únase al invitado Steve Ross hoy mismo: experimente la magnificencia de las montañas y el lago de cristal abrazado por árboles y arbustos.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Arremánguese los pantalones y camine por la playa con Bob; disfrute de un cielo lleno de nubes y de las olas que chocan contra las rocas

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Imagínate en un mundo de cimas de montañas púrpuras y aguas brillantes que reflejan el cielo resplandeciente; ¡una escena mágica de Bob Ross!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: En un día claro, Bob Ross crea una montaña todopoderosa capturada por un cielo azul claro: otra espectacular obra maestra sobre lienzo.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Algo nuevo y diferente: pinta una escena invernal en una hoja de sierra de madera con la artista invitada Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Siente la brisa fresca y admira la belleza de las olas, los acantilados escarpados y cielos nocturnos: Bob pinta un paisaje marino de la costa oeste

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Coja una limonada fría y siga a Bob Ross mientras le guía a través de la belleza del bosque hasta un caluroso lugar de baño de verano.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Disfruta de la tranquilidad de un atardecer mientras das un paseo con Bob por las tierras boscosas justo antes de que caiga la noche.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Siente el cálido aire pantanoso y admira los árboles cubiertos de musgo español y los arbustos aterciopelados.. ¡todo al estilo de Bob, por supuesto!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross (Español)
programme.desc: Bob Ross crea palmeras que ceden a las rígidas brisas marinas mientras un cielo de nubes ominosas se cierne en el fondo.

programme.title: Otra Vaina
programme.desc: "Otra Vaina" is your gateway to the unconventional, featuring music that breaks the mold and defies expectations. With tracks from boundary-pushing artists like Bad Bunny, Camilo, Karol G, and more, this playlist offers a refreshing departure from the mainstream. From experimental sounds to bold artistic statements, each song dares to be different, inviting listeners on a journey of musical exploration and discovery. Whether you're seeking innovation or simply craving something new, "Otra Vaina" promises to challenge your perceptions and ignite your imagination with its eclectic selection of out-of-the-box tunes.

programme.title: Freestyles
programme.desc: "Freestyles" is your gateway to the most captivating and raw expressions of lyrical prowess showcased by top artists on the internet. Featuring mind-blowing performances from talents like Bizarrap, Shakira, Messiah, and more, this playlist celebrates the art of improvisation and creativity in its purest form. Each video is a testament to the artist's skill and ingenuity, offering viewers an exhilarating glimpse into the world of spontaneous musical brilliance. Get ready to be mesmerized by the electrifying energy and unmatched talent displayed in the world of freestyles.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: "House Party" is the ultimate soundtrack for your next bash, featuring the hottest tunes that set the vibe for an unforgettable night of revelry. With tracks from powerhouse artists like Daddy Yankee, El Alfa, Karol G, and more, this playlist captures the energy and excitement of a bustling house party. From reggaeton anthems to infectious beats, each song promises to keep the dance floor packed and the spirits high. Get ready to turn up the volume and let the music ignite the party atmosphere like never before!

programme.title: Best of:
programme.desc: Best of Bad Bunny is the ultimate compilation of Bad Bunny's most iconic music videos, showcasing his unparalleled talent and groundbreaking style. From chart-topping hits to fan-favorite anthems, each video offers a glimpse into the vibrant world of one of Latin music's biggest stars. Whether you're a die-hard fan or a newcomer to his music, this playlist is your definitive guide to the best of Bad Bunny. Get ready to immerse yourself in his mesmerizing visuals and infectious beats as you experience the brilliance of Bad Bunny.

programme.title: El Discovery
programme.desc: "El Discovery" playlist is your gateway to uncovering the latest tunes and emerging artists in the Latin music scene. Featuring powerhouse talents like Peso Pluma, Maria Becerra, Quevedo, and more, each track is a vibrant exploration of diverse genres and styles. From infectious beats to soul-stirring melodies, immerse yourself in this curated collection and embark on a journey of musical discovery like never before. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or a newcomer, "El Discovery" promises to ignite your passion for fresh sounds and undiscovered talents.

programme.title: Celebrating Women's Month
programme.desc: "Celebrating Women's Month" is a tribute to the remarkable talent and contributions of female music artists, showcasing their chart-topping hits and empowering anthems. From the fierce beats of Karol G and Young Miko to the timeless classics of Shakira and Ángela Aguilar, this playlist honors the diverse voices and stories of women in music. With electrifying tracks from Anitta, Villano Antillano, and more leading ladies, "Celebrating Women's Month" is a testament to the strength, resilience, and creativity of women worldwide. Join us in celebrating their extraordinary impact on the music industry and beyond.

programme.title: El Pulse
programme.desc: "El Pulse" is your go-to destination for the hottest chart-topping hits, curated to keep your pulse racing and your playlist on fire. Featuring chart-toppers from sensational artists like Feid, Bad Bunny, Karol G, and more, each track is a testament to the electrifying energy of the top charts. Whether you're into reggaeton, Latin pop, or urban beats, "El Pulse" delivers the ultimate collection of must-hear tunes that dominate the airwaves and keep listeners hooked. programme.title: La Grasa
programme.desc: "La Grasa" is the ultimate urban playlist, curated for those who thrive on the pulse of the streets. Featuring the hottest tracks favored by the urban crowd, this collection boasts electrifying beats and raw, unapologetic lyrics. With artists like Eladio Carrion, Yovngchimi, Tokischa, and more leading the charge, each song captures the essence of city life and the vibrant energy of its people. Whether you're hitting the streets or vibing with friends, "La Grasa" delivers the soundtrack for urban living at its finest.

Whether you're grabbing your morning cafecito or browsing the aisles for your favorite snacks, let the music of "La Bodega" transport you to the lively streets of Latin America with every beat.

programme.title: La Bodega
programme.desc: "La Bodega" is your auditory journey into the heart of a vibrant Latin bodega, where the pulse of the neighborhood meets the rhythm of the streets. Featuring an eclectic mix of sounds, from the timeless classics of Marc Anthony and Romeo Santos to the infectious beats of Yailin La Mas Viral and more, this playlist captures the essence of community and culture. Whether you're grabbing your morning cafecito or browsing the aisles for your favorite snacks, let the music of "La Bodega" transport you to the lively streets of Latin America with every beat.

programme.title: Otra Vaina
programme.desc: "Otra Vaina" is your gateway to the unconventional, featuring music that breaks the mold and defies expectations. With tracks from boundary-pushing artists like Bad Bunny, Camilo, Karol G, and more, this playlist offers a refreshing departure from the mainstream. From experimental sounds to bold artistic statements, each song dares to be different, inviting listeners on a journey of musical exploration and discovery. Whether you're seeking innovation or simply craving something new, "Otra Vaina" promises to challenge your perceptions and ignite your imagination with its eclectic selection of out-of-the-box tunes.

programme.title: Freestyles
programme.desc: "Freestyles" is your gateway to the most captivating and raw expressions of lyrical prowess showcased by top artists on the internet. Featuring mind-blowing performances from talents like Bizarrap, Shakira, Messiah, and more, this playlist celebrates the art of improvisation and creativity in its purest form. Each video is a testament to the artist's skill and ingenuity, offering viewers an exhilarating glimpse into the world of spontaneous musical brilliance. Get ready to be mesmerized by the electrifying energy and unmatched talent displayed in the world of freestyles.

programme.title: I Think My Babysitter is an Alien
programme.desc: When a world-famous astronaut returns home from his latest mission, he brings a unique souvenir to his wife and two children: a piece of an asteroid that hit his space station.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Zo Zo encounters his favorite bird - the falcon - in the park, and his new feathered friend takes Zo Zo for a thrilling ride in the sky! But when it turns out the falcon belongs to Zombie Hunter Joe, he and Zo Zo begin a battle to the death.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Isamu and Zo Zo Zombie make a new friend: the airy Bellow the Cloud. When the young nimbus shows them his ability to change shapes, and to transform water into rain or snow, Isamu gets the bright idea to feed him donuts.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Zo Zo and Isamu are headed to Uncle Zombo’s house with a load of groceries for him, but on the way, the vital bottle of Uncle’s favorite hot sauce is stolen by the Lake Monster! Time for a ferocious battle!

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.sub-title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes: Switzerland, Italy: The VIA FRANCIGENA to Rome
programme.desc: For centuries, pilgrims have set off on the Via Francigena in the hopes of reaching the tombs of the apostles Peter and Paul in Rome. The ancient pilgrimage route leads through the imposing Alps to the Great St Bernard Pass and from there cross-country through Italy.

programme.title: Penguin City - South Georgia
programme.desc: In the middle of the Antarctic Ocean, an entire mountain range arises from the water: South Georgia, the nursery of the Antarctic. Hundreds of thousands of penguins, elephant seals, fur seals and their young overcrowd the beaches. The rough weather and the extremely difficult access to the island cause filmmaking to be an endeavor requiring much of the film crew around Roland Gockel and Rosie Koch and the state of the art cameras. A lot of patience and sensitivity over a period spanning some five years now offers unknown and poignant insights into the life of the King Penguins on South Georgia Island

programme.title: Animalistic - Animals and us: The Dog
programme.desc: This documentary takes an intensive look at the relationship of humans and animals – the special bond, but also the problematic and contradictory nature of our relation with each other, from earliest domestication up until today. During the show, human and animal are supposed to meet, eye to eye, focused on our understanding and our actions. It centers around one species, one animal that we live with. Three humans get to share their perspective on the animal in question, tell their stories of their relationship. Through these stories we get to know how dogs, pigs or horses accompany our lives and influence them. Premium storytelling, visually innovative and emotionally touching – This is a persuasive mixture of information and entertainment. Moreover, the show provides us with an impulse to experience anew our lives with the animals in our surroundings.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species – polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) – that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face. Their young lives are full of learning, moments of great tenderness and life-threatening drama. Over three years all of our bears, despite hardships and losses along the way, prove they have what it takes, they all have learned their bear essentials.

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo’s lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: Germany's Mystic Forest
programme.desc: 2.000 rivers and streams dig deep into the underground and transport their water into reservoirs or "Germany's Wild Amazon", the Wupper. These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes. Accompany us on a journey where we explore every corner of this rugged land. Climb underground into the Bergisches Land, through the vast hidden cave systems that sprawl far beneath the forests. There is also much to be discovered in the water, dive with us in crystal clear streams and rivers with their diverse flora and fauna.

programme.title: Wild Sardinia
programme.desc: Sardinia has always been the epitome of pure wilderness, an emerald of volcanic origin in the Mediterranean. 1900 metres of coastline and an infinite maze of offshore islands. But Sardinia also has other facets: green valleys, rugged mountains, murmuring brooks, mysterious ruins and a unique fauna. Just off of Sardinia's coast is an untouched underwater paradise - uniquely beautiful, but also dangerous. Pilot whales, dolphins and mobula rays populate the waters at Capo Testa in the north of the island. In the west, the lagoons of Cabras represent a wild landscape of lakes in which thousands of flamingos live and hunt the red brine shrimps. In addition to the flamingos, grey and purple herons and little egrets breed here. Thousands of bats have found refuge in the craggy mountain world of the Supramonte and Gennargentu, with their countless grottoes and caves. In the sea we can observe the mass mating of sea slugs, and thanks to our camera robots and submersible boats we were able to observe beard worms with luminous red gills, as well as bright yellow tree corals in the area surrounding the hypothermal lava holes.

programme.title: Wild Switzerland
programme.desc: Gentle, green meadows, rugged rock faces, mysterious lakes, dense forests, tall mountains, low-lying river deltas, quietly meandering mountain streams and smack dab in the middle, a unique fauna - THIS is Switzerland! We trace the elementary power of nature and present animals and plants in landscapes that have hardly ever been touched by mankind. Switzerland is an alpine country, but it is also Europe's surge tank. Rivers such as the Rhine and the Rhone have their sources here. Glaciers, crevasses, icy cold caves and the underwater dome of the Verzasca are the unusual settings we chose for this film. We meet with rare, selected animal species and present their behavioural patterns, such as the Swiss or Arven jay, the lynx and albino catfish. Cold, wind, snow and extreme locations demand adaptation that make us marvel.

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.sub-title: Zoo Babies - Cute and curious, Ep. 3
programme.desc: We find out about the sweetest and most poignant animal baby stories. Whether on land, under water or in the sky - all of the babies in this series will conquer the hearts of all those watching. We accompany the adventures of the animal babies - lovingly cared for and brought up by their keepers. In the most gripping and informative way, both young and old will discover everything there is to know about Hamburg Zoo's toddlers.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies
programme.sub-title: Wildlife Nannies: The Rest of the Best
programme.desc: With more than 22 episodes, Wildlife Nannies has shot over 50 stories all over the world. From Salzburg to the beautiful Florida coast, from the breathtaking Canadian wilderness to Berlin – there were many heartwarming stories. This episode is a countdown of the ten stories that touched us the most. Best Of '5 to 1'!

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: An orphaned baby baboon has enjoyed the love of its human foster mother at CARE, an emergency wildlife center. How will he respond when he meets his first baboon friend? This is an important milestone in becoming a member of a troop. Animal rescuers from the Wildlife Foundation in Namibia need to catch a young female cheetah in captivity; this is tricky and potentially dangerous work. Their plan is to reunite her with her mother so that she can learn how to function and survive in the wild. Bush babies are especially cute so sometimes they are kept as pets. The care givers at Riverside Wildlife Centre put emotions aside and prepare one for release in the wild.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: Rhino horn is more valuable than gold and more recent increases in poaching leaves the survival of this species at risk. Every day a rhino monitoring team at Somkhanda Game Reserve keeps track of a rhino and her calf, but skilful tracking and telemetry don’t guarantee that they’ll find them. When it comes to their milk feed, the competition is fierce for four orphaned baby dassies at Daktari Wildlife Orphanage. Their care taker forms strong bonds with the animals he looks after and decides to visit the rocky outcrop where he’s released a dassie – can he find his friend? A baby porcupine is hand-reared at Tenikwa Wildlife and Rehabilitation Centre. Can his surrogate mom teach him to forage; otherwise they won’t be able to release him back in the wild.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: Raising wildlife can be a long-term commitment: elephant calves are dependent on their mothers for three years and chimpanzees rely on special attention for about seven. In this episode, we visit the Lilayi Elephant Nursery in Zambia and the Mefou Primate Park in Cameroon to meet the highly committed people who take on this responsibility. Night or day, a baby elephant can never be left alone and many of the chimpanzee orphans arrive highly traumatised. Their care givers need to work very hard to restore their trust and will to live. At the Kwaggasvlaktes Wildlife Centre in South Africa some baby Wildebeest rely on heart-warming help from humans and an unusual sheep to survive.

programme.title: Strandwolf
programme.desc: She moves through the seal colony on Namibia’s wild Skeleton Coast with purpose and focus, gingerly stepping around the adults who snap at her heels. She’s searching for smaller prey. Following her is a young German field scientist, Ingrid Wiesel, who has now spent 17 years with Tosca’s clan; tracking, observing, and learning everything she can about one of the world’s least understood and most unusual predators.

programme.title: Secret Life Of Deer
programme.desc: 30 million white-tailed deer live in the United States. They have begun to adapt themselves to living in a world of traffic, pets and backyards. In Cayuga Heights, New York, the suburb’s residents are trying to get used to this exceptional living arrangement. The deer can be spotted daily from kitchen windows and porches. Life in the suburbs is deer heaven – large areas of grass, no predators and plenty of water means their population is on a steady rise. In this documentary, white-tailed deer are outfitted with special cameras to take the viewer into their world. 'Deercam' allows us to see them in a new light – not frozen in the headlights of a car or as shy residents of the woods, but as intelligent and affectionate family animals.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: Hummingbirds live at the limits of what is possible. They have the highest metabolism with a heart rate of 1,200 beats per minute of any vertebrate. Their wings beat 50 times a second. They can hover on the spot, and even fly backwards. To our eyes, they are just a blur. But with the aid of high-speed cameras we can slow down their hyperactive lives and look into their secret world.

programme.title: White Lions: Born Wild
programme.sub-title: White Lions: Born Wild - Episode 1: Against all Odds
programme.desc: The two sisters are born as white as snow in May 2009 in South Africa’s Kruger Park. Growing up in this vast, wild wilderness they must not only overcome the same survival challenges that all young lion cubs face, they must also overcome the threats their high visibility brings. In the African bush, anything unusual stands out and is often eliminated by eagle-eyed predators. Will our cubs survive? The odds are stacked against them – 80 percent of all newborn lion cubs don’t make it to adulthood.

programme.title: White Lions: Born Wild
programme.sub-title: White Lions: Born Wild - Episode 2: Fight for Survival
programme.desc: ‘White Lions – Born Wild’ is a true wildlife story, with strong characters and closely studied behaviour. We follow the cubs’ progress as they embark on the pathway to adulthood, learning to hunt, learning to avoid danger, learning to live in their white coats. This is a strong behaviour-led film, a coming-of-age story of a very rare and unusual pair of lions. Through their eyes, we learn what it is really like to be a lion in Africa.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: The Real Dingo
programme.desc: For several years, dingo expert Brad Purcell has been following a pack in a secret Blue Mountain valley. Last year, for the first time, he observed adult dingoes teaching their pups how to kill. This training is essential if young dingoes are to learn the ropes and survive. Brad’s access offers a unique insight into Australia’s top land predator. Using the latest science, we explore how this controversial dog fits into the Australian landscape and how it has taken the role of top predator. Understanding what it takes to be a dingo has never been more crucial.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: The wings of cliff swallows in Nebraska are getting shorter – while female turtles in Chesapeake Bay are getting larger. On the Galapagos Islands, two species of finches are developing back into one. Increasing numbers of peregrine falcons are living in urban areas – and have adapted their behaviour: thanks to the city lights, they have learned to hunt at night.

programme.title: Aurora - Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: In the earth’s polar regions, a ghostly flicker and colourful glow often brighten the night sky. Whoever sees an aurora event will never forget this impressive experience. Finland’s Saami people, Alaska’s Inuit, Canada’s Native Americans and New Zealand’s Maori all have legends about the origins and meaning of this magic natural spectacle. These stories tell of spirits dancing in the sky, of a bright and better world where hunting game is abundant, of battling gods and celestial messages.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari’s Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area’s water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: Leap Of The Lynx
programme.desc: On the Iberian Peninsula, primeval landscapes are practically non-existent, so the Iberian lynx has lived on cultivated land for centuries – cattle, horse and pig pastures, cork oak forests, timberland, and even holy sites of pilgrimage. The diversity and beauty of these locations are truly stunning and their character and history as relevant to this story as that of the big cat itself. Until five years ago, both populations of Iberian lynx were quickly fading away. Their fragmented habitats were shrinking even further, they were starved by lack of prey and reduced by epidemics. But now, local authorities, scientists, landowners, and other groups have finally begun to act in unison.

programme.title: Namibia`s Desert Kingdom
programme.desc: Although the dunes are barren, the dry riverbeds show signs of growth. And out of the heat, vast shapes appear. A herd of desert elephants ambles along the dry riverbed sniffing the ground with their lazy trunks. These remarkable creatures can smell the water underground and know where to find it. An abandoned well attracts a troop of chacma baboons, followed by a small herd of oryx and springbok, and finally a group of jackals. None of them has seen the pride of desert lions lying in wait.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa’s most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.The lions' new home will be a sanctuary on the edge of Dinokeng, a South African game reserve spanning 18,000 square metres. The huge task ahead includes planning and designing the new enclosures, and securing permits to move the animals.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Not only are the animals regularly rotated into new enclosures to prevent repetitive behaviour developing out of boredom, but Kevin also has to practice loading them in and out of the van. Can the reluctant lions and hyenas eventually be persuaded to get on board with the move?
